name: Jeff Warner
subject: Jeff Warner For Congress - Newsletter-November Vol. 1, #1
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

Thank You for interest in the Jeff Warner For Congress campaign! This campaign can't happen without you and we covet your prayers and support. Know that we're praying for you as well.

**BREAKING NEWS!**
Jeff's competitor has withdrawn from this race for another position (We all know he was intimidated by Jeff's campaign :)) This is a big game-changer. At this moment, Maryland's 4th district has an open seat and as Jeff has previously shared, this seat could change the power base in the House of Representatives.

**Virginia Sent A Resounding Message**
Congratulations to Glenn Youngkin and the Virginia House of Delegates.

November 2nd's election was a "We The People" moment. "We The People" let our voices be heard and "We The People" resoundingly rejected the radical, out of touch direction of the Biden administration.

There is hope and Tuesday was just the beginning.

This is the time for another Great Awakening and for more people to get involved. A Constitutional Republic it is not a spectator sport. Let's leverage this momentum and make the 2022 mid-terms a continuation of this referendum for liberty and freedom.

**Pedophilia Pornography In Our Schools**
Jeff has had the opportunity to express his deep concern regarding pornography and pedophilia pornography in local schools. This material so descriptive and graphic, you may be charged with a crime for possessing or distributing such graphic images. Jeff had the opportunity to speak on the radio (WMAL-105.9) regarding this issue.
[Listen to Jeff on WMAL (approximately 2 min)](https://vimeo.com/642389987)

[Watch Jeff's interview outside the Department of Justice with Red Sea Media (approximately 1 min)](https://vimeo.com/642390236)

**The Campaign Re-Launches**
Launching the campaign has been quite challenging, yet little of value comes easily. As you know, Jeff is not easily deterred and is resilient. Finally, in mid-October, the campaign re-launched. Jeff has been speaking with local organizations, attending rallies and launching on social media.

**It's Time To Get Involved**
Jeff is standing with you and for you and Jeff needs you to stand with him as well. He needs your help.

**Social Media**
With whom can you share Jeff's website? Who can you invite? If freedom matters to you, now is the time to act. We need others who can share, like, post, re-post, etc.

We're looking for someone with social media savvy and experience. Who do you know who could help? Please have them contact us or let us know so we can contact them.

**Financial Support**
Jeff needs people to financially support the fight for liberty. Never underestimate the value of small, regular donations. Whether it's $5, $10, $20 or $50 per month, every donation matters. There is no such thing as a small gift. Jeff has been working on our local houses, yet know we need him in the People's House of Representatives. You don't have to be in Jeff's district to make a difference.
**[Donate Here](https://www.jeffwarnerforcongress.com/donate)**

**Home Rallies**
Who are others who share our mutual concern for our country and love liberty and freedom?
Who do you know that's concerned about higher prices (inflation), safety & security, the economy, the cultural tensions?
Consider hosting a home rally and have Jeff come and listen, inspire and encourage others.

Remember, Jeff is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff

**[JeffWarnerForCongress.com](http://www.JeffWarnerForCongress.com "www.JeffWarnerForCongress.com")**

************************************************
_© 2021 Jeff Warner For Congress, All rights reserved._
Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

For More Info or to unsubscribe from this list, email
[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

**

Standing With You And For You!
********
****
| **Jeff Warner** Congressional Candidate-MD4 (240) 736-4487 [**J****effWarnerForCongress.com**](http://www.jeffwarnerforcongress.com/ "http://www.jeffwarnerforcongress.com/")

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: America Rejects the Far Left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, I am proud of the voters in Virginia choosing to elect Glenn Youngkin to be their next governor.
Peter, **The Democrats thought Americans were ready to embrace the far left but they were mistaken.** Voters enthusiastically rejected their "Government knows best and Government spends best" agenda. Virginia flipped red, Minneapolis voters chose to keep their police department intact, and the race for governor in New Jersey is much closer than all the "pundits" predicted.This is a win everywhere for tax-paying parents, the local police, and our children. Parents want control over what is being taught in schools and Americans are tired of the anti police sentiment coming from the far left.**Our own gubernatorial race is 369 days away and we will need to do everything we can to replace Tony Evers. We need to show the Democrats that we reject their incompetence and false promises.**[**Please consider donating to our campaign so we can continue this momentum in Wisconsin and push back against the radical left wing agenda while promoting a better, more prosperous future for us all.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zmmjl-idtjvlhlh-r/) On Wisconsin,Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zmmjl-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zmmjl-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zmmjl-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zmmjl-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zmmjl-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

MAILING ADDRESS:
STEIL FOR WISCONSIN
1818 MILTON AVE. #1448
JANESVILLE, WI 53545 [Read our Privacy Policy](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zmmjl-idtjvlhlh-d/) You are receiving this email as you are subscribed for expressing interest in campaign updates from Steil for Wisconsin Inc.

For internal use only: RD355 [Preferences](https://steilforwisconsininc.updatemyprofile.com/j-zmmjl-C89B6A88-idtjvlhlh-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-u-zmmjl-idtjvlhlh-n/)

name: Adam Laxalt
subject: BREAKING: Nevada Senate race moves to "Toss-up" as momentum shifts toward us! {READ}
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans are ready to FLIP the Senate!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695772:69ITMn2Nj:m:1:3298722022:5F2E7D8391B3FEA13F521AF14C98B819:r)
Peter,

In the wake of historic victories in formerly deep-blue Virginia last night, Nevada Republicans are ready to flip the Senate as momentum shifts toward our movement.

This morning, the University of Virginia's Center for Politics - one of the most well-known political analysis organizations in the nation - has moved Nevada's Senate race from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss-up." Because I represent the biggest threat to their majority, Democrats are already focusing their false attacks on me.

This is a major sign of momentum and a clear recognition by the national media that Catherine Cortez Masto is on the ropes. [**Whatever you can give -- even just $1 -- we need your help to keep this huge momentum going.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695772:69ITMn2Nj:m:1:3298722022:5F2E7D8391B3FEA13F521AF14C98B819:r) [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695772:69ITMn2Nj:m:1:3298722022:5F2E7D8391B3FEA13F521AF14C98B819:r)
---

Virginia showed what we've known for a long time - especially here in Nevada - that parents are stepping up to fight for their children's education. They won't stand for critical race theory indoctrinations or efforts by radical liberals to get between them and their kids.

The results last night are no surprise to those of us but if we want change, we must continue the fight and make sure our voices are heard loud and clear next November, just as Virginians made their voices heard last night.

I am thankful for your continued support as we fight to protect Nevada. With your help - along with leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis who have endorsed my candidacy - we will be victorious.

Best,
Adam Laxalt

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695773:69ITMn2Nj:m:1:3298722022:5F2E7D8391B3FEA13F521AF14C98B819:r) A note for Peter, from Adam Laxalt:

Peter, thank you for your support as I take on the Democrat establishment to FLIP Nevada and the U.S. Senate. Our movement is off to a great start, but the battle has just begun.

Even CNN has rated my race one of the MOST LIKELY blue to red flips for 2022. It's clear, the road to the Senate majority runs through Nevada, but I need your immediate help to fight back against the Democrats' fundraising machine.

[**Help restore a Republican majority**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695773:69ITMn2Nj:m:1:3298722022:5F2E7D8391B3FEA13F521AF14C98B819:r)
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695774:69ITMn2Nj:m:1:3298722022:5F2E7D8391B3FEA13F521AF14C98B819:r)

subject: Merrick Garland: RESIGN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695804:JzYizn2nN:m:1:3253819041:B1271F3043BA5E55D3F3AAB2AD795BAA:r "Headline") Peter: This cannot be allowed to continue, not in America. Parents who want a say in their children's education are subject to threats of an FBI investigation. **A father who objects to the rape of his daughter at her high school is tackled by police and labeled a domestic terrorist.** Attorney General Merrick Garland has weaponized the federal government against American parents, **and for the good of the nation,** **he should resign immediately.** **[I said it directly to his face- you can see the full video here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695804:JzYizn2nN:m:1:3253819041:B1271F3043BA5E55D3F3AAB2AD795BAA:r "I said it directly to his face – you can see the full video
here.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695804:JzYizn2nN:m:1:3253819041:B1271F3043BA5E55D3F3AAB2AD795BAA:r "Video") **Barack Obama weaponized the IRS against conservative political and social organizations, and now Joe Biden is doing the same with the FBI.** Each liberal President pushes the envelope of power a little more each day and tramples on our Constitution. **[It is up to us to end this right now- I need you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695804:JzYizn2nN:m:1:3253819041:B1271F3043BA5E55D3F3AAB2AD795BAA:r "It is up to us to end this right now – I need you on my
team.")** We cannot win if we don't hold the line right here. **_No more_** government threats against American citizens who question our government. **_No more_** parents physically assaulted by government agents for standing up at school board meetings. **_No more_** children attacked and ignored in the name of "social justice." This treatment of American parents ends now. **[If you are fighting with me, I need you to make your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a big difference.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695805:JzYizn2nN:m:1:3253819041:B1271F3043BA5E55D3F3AAB2AD795BAA:r "If you are fighting with me, I need you to make your donation of
$1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a big difference.")** If we want a better nation, we have to fight for it. Which side of the fight are you on? I hope it's on the side of freedom. For a better future,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695804:JzYizn2nN:m:1:3253819041:B1271F3043BA5E55D3F3AAB2AD795BAA:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58695804:JzYizn2nN:m:1:3253819041:B1271F3043BA5E55D3F3AAB2AD795BAA:r "STAND WITH JOSH")

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zei2502e6l1qcodvidq7vujdo6agimurp5g0cmr8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chg66ob2c9h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli Sponsored message | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | ---|--- | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696095:6zLfnn2TN:m:1:3298722022:10C807F30D9935317B921961056006B6:r "General Michael Flynn") Peter, My name is Rachel Hamm - I am running for Secretary of State here in California to put some integrity back in our election system after everything we saw in 2020. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696095:6zLfnn2TN:m:1:3298722022:10C807F30D9935317B921961056006B6:r "Rachel Hamm")I am an America First Patriot, writing today to tell you that General Michael Flynn has endorsed my campaign. I am honored to support an American hero like the great Gen. Flynn, and **[I need every patriot who stands with him to also stand with me by making an IMMEDIATE donation to my campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696095:6zLfnn2TN:m:1:3298722022:10C807F30D9935317B921961056006B6:r "I need every patriot who stands with him to also stand with me by
making an IMMEDIATE donation to my campaign.")** You can read his full letter of support below. American history is full of patriots like General Flynn, who rose to the challenge and took on an untenable status quo. **[Join my campaign by making your generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or even $25 to help me take back this nation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696096:6zLfnn2TN:m:1:3298722022:10C807F30D9935317B921961056006B6:r "Join
my campaign by making your generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or even $25 to help me take back this nation.")** Thank you. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696095:6zLfnn2TN:m:1:3298722022:10C807F30D9935317B921961056006B6:r "General Michael Flynn") | Re-taking Washington, DC will never be enough to uncover and end the corruption in our election systems and processes; local action on the ground across our great nation is indispensable. America needs courageous patriots in key states and in key positions to make this happen. The California Secretary of State is among the most important, and I know Rachel Hamm will zealously perform her duties. Rachel is committed to ensuring California has honest elections and she has the tenacity needed to make this happen. She also has the strong intellect, the required energy and the necessary leadership skills to restore the prosperity and liberties the people of California deserve. That is why Rachel Hamm has my full endorsement for Secretary of State for California. Sincerely, Michael T. Flynn LTG, USA (Retired)

name: Thomas Jefferson
subject: Message from beyond the grave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Americans for Liberty
body:
“I have sworn upon the altar of God, eternal hostility against every form of tyranny over the mind of man.” - Thomas Jefferson [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8053%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9G0Ba%2bXjj9MPZfOlNP8FNA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17855%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ck9hv0G0Ej1KoafH69mXxA&sysid=1)
_“I have sworn upon the altar of God, eternal hostility against every form of tyranny over the mind of man.” - Thomas Jefferson_

Friend, Thomas Jefferson is one of our greatest Founding Fathers, a fierce defender of liberty, and a wise man... but sadly he is not the author of this email.

My name is Sean Themea, and I serve as the Chief of Staff for Young Americans for Liberty.

This is one of my favorite quotes from Thomas Jefferson. _Do you see how he stresses ETERNAL hostility against tyranny_? Jefferson realized the battle between liberty and tyranny would rage for hundreds of years beyond his lifetime. It is CRITICAL you and I continue to fight for liberty... or we allow tyranny to win.

**Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is making Thomas Jefferson proud.** YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American electoral politics.

[**Please support Young Americans for Liberty by sponsoring our top student activists. You can help them fight for liberty, defeat cancel culture, battle big government on campuses nationwide, and help YAL students turn out the vote for liberty candidates by clicking here to donate $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or ANY amount >>>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17856%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qoVUe%2bWXzUu1B2Iiwttz1w&sysid=1)

What are YAL student activists doing to make Thomas Jefferson proud?

**Here’s how it works: **

* **First:** YAL recruits tens of thousands of students across college campuses. These students join an active YAL chapter where they fight back against tyranny on campus.

* **Next:** YAL takes the top student leaders and brings them to premier training events. The students are equipped with the skills and knowledge to transform their campus and fight for liberty candidates or causes in the legislature.

* **Then:** Thousands of student activists make phone calls, knock on doors, and turn out the vote for liberty-minded candidates running for office.

Our student activists have accomplished the following:
* Helped elect 179 hardcore pro-liberty legislators
* Repealed 76 unconstitutional free speech “codes” on campuses
* Helped pass constitutional carry in Texas
* Helped pass school choice in Missouri
* Mobilized thousands of students across the country to Make Liberty Win

Now our students are fighting egregious COVID mandates on college campuses across the country while preparing for the 2022 election.

We have some big battles ahead of us.

**Like Thomas Jefferson said, we must be engaged in ETERNAL hostility against all forms of tyranny. Which is why I am launching a WAR CHEST fundraising effort to support YAL’s mission to build a bench of liberty candidates.**

Our plan is to recruit YAL students who will knock doors for hundreds of liberty candidates to state legislatures across the country. My goal is to raise $2,000,000 before the end of the year.

Friend, I am asking you to donate to Young Americans for Liberty today. Please donate using one of the links I’ve copied below:

[**Donate $20.22 >>
Donate $50 >>
Donate $100 >>
Donate $210 to sponsor a student >>
Donate $420 to sponsor two students >>
Donate $1,050 to sponsor five students >>
Donate Any Amount >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17855%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ck9hv0G0Ej1KoafH69mXxA&sysid=1)

Young Americans for Liberty is comprised of America’s best student activists. They are dedicated to winning and the ideas of liberty.

These YAL student activists are the ones talking to students on campuses, knocking on doors, speaking with voters, getting voters to the polls, and pressuring politicians to vote the right way on things such as school choice, cutting taxes, and gun rights.

By investing in Young Americans for Liberty, you are investing in a future generation of hardcore liberty activists willing to stand up for the Constitution.

We MUST not give up on America’s youth and allow socialists like AOC to win.

Help me make Thomas Jefferson proud.

[**Join Young Americans for Liberty today by making a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, $210, $420, $1,050, or any amount. **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17857%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=myQMO8sw3Q14MJwmWhV5Kw&sysid=1)

Thank you for everything.

Sean Themea
Chief of Staff
Young Americans for Liberty

Paid for by Young Americans for Liberty

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8053%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9G0Ba%2bXjj9MPZfOlNP8FNA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8053%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9G0Ba%2bXjj9MPZfOlNP8FNA&sysid=1)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Hillsdale College now offers our full online course “The Second World Wars” as a special DVD box set for your home library o
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu5bpgpbbptnlnsauv94lmb36sjpt8bbdoe04clo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chg66pb0cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College now offers our full online course **“The Second World Wars” as a special DVD box set** for your home library or to give as a gift. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from renowned military historian Victor Davis Hanson of the Allied and Axis strategies in the air, by water, and on earth that led to the victory of the Allies.[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znfai6b6jg07h7tfg8h8qnqiqtsou2ka87t37neg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chg66pb0cdh2bs) If you would like to secure a DVD set before they’re no longer available, you can do so by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. You can give a gift and reserve your DVD box set of **“The Second World Wars”** using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl7sfgtv6j4pg24tica8rt5et4r3jfd0pfocua70_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chg66pb0cdh2bs)** Thank you for defending liberty through education with Hillsdale College. Warm regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: RED WAVE Countdown clock has begun: One year. Both Chambers. Let's go>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Victory Action Fund
body:
|

| | |

---
**NATIONAL VICTORY ACTION FUND**
_One Year Out Fund_

To commemorate**ONE YEAR** until one of the most pivotal elections of our lifetime, National Victory Action Fund, an organization dedicated to building grassroots coalitions through small dollar fundraising for Republican candidates in critical races up and down the ballot, is launching a **One Year Out Fund. **

Our goal is to help conservative candidates build war chests and equip them with the resources needed to take on the progressive Left and the special interest network that is bankrolling their campaigns.

We're reaching out to you today to ask for your support in continuing our movement by making a _**contribution of $22 to our One Year Out Fund**_ to help Republicans win back the House and Senate in 2022.

---
| | | [Donate $22 for '22](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696320:JTZgBn2EN:m:1:3299561967:4FE40E383AD0F8037065C50B743E0BF3:r "1")
---

Republicans winning statewide offices in deep blue Virginia proves that ANYTHING is possible and our hopes of winning back the House and Senate in 2022 are very much alive.

_[If Republicans are going to go toe-to-toe with Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden, it's critical to build on the momentum we've gathered and set up our candidates for success.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696320:JTZgBn2EN:m:1:3299561967:4FE40E383AD0F8037065C50B743E0BF3:r "If Republicans are
going to go toe-to-toe with Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden, it’s critical to build on the momentum we’ve gathered and set up
our candidates for success.")_

Virginia demonstrated that Democrats may be on defense on the issues, but they've been on the offensive in fundraising for MONTHS. Liberal candidates have been massively outraising GOP candidates in KEY battleground states like Florida, Arizona, Georgia and New Hampshire.

In order to win in 2022, we're going to need to dominate both the issues AND the fundraising war.
**[Can we count on you to help us to victory by donating $22 to our One Year Out Fund?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696321:JTZgBn2EN:m:1:3299561967:4FE40E383AD0F8037065C50B743E0BF3:r "Can we count on you to help us to victory by donating $22 to our One Year Out Fund?")**
If conservatives don't step up their game to close the fundraising gap, we're giving up valuable air time for advertisements on TV, forgoing provisions for hardworking volunteers, cutting down on the number of phone calls we're able to make and even printing less yard signs.

**[The consequences will only get worse the further Republicans fall behind until conservative voices and views are completely drowned out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696320:JTZgBn2EN:m:1:3299561967:4FE40E383AD0F8037065C50B743E0BF3:r "The
consequences will only get worse the further Republicans fall behind until conservative voices and views are completely drowned out.")**

Republican candidates are counting on YOU to step up and help move this movement forward. Don't let them down. Don't let our momentum die. _**[Donate to the One Year Out Fund now>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696321:JTZgBn2EN:m:1:3299561967:4FE40E383AD0F8037065C50B743E0BF3:r "Donate to the One Year Out Fund now >>>")**_

Thank you in advance for your ongoing support for conservative candidates,

Sarah

body:

|

Conservatives across the nation are ordering their shirts to stand up against Joe Biden and Big Tech censorship by the boatload, _AND WE 'RE STRUGGLING TO KEEP UP WITH THE DEMAND. _

---

**First** ... they censored Trump.
**Then** ... they censored Conservative allies.
**NOW** ... they're censoring our right to say "Let's Go Brandon!" ** To FIGHT BACK against the Radical Left and Big Tech, we are offering you a chance to claim our brand-new "Let's Go Brandon!" shirt. It's FREE you just need to chip in for shipping!**

| | | [CLAIM YOUR FREE SHIRT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696305:JDktZn2wN:m:1:3253819041:3D4B480997AF22DC9445AF01E8D977B0:r "CLAIM YOUR SHIRT")
---

The Radical Left has censored and canceled too much for us to even keep up with. We need to fight back, and by claiming your "Let's Go Brandon!" shirt - you will be sending Nancy Pelosi, Sleepy Joe Biden and controlling Big Tech companies a clear message.
**We reserved (1) of these BRAND NEW shirts just for you** - _but we're running out FAST! It will only be on hold until 11:59 PM TONIGHT!_
**[It's FREE, just chip in $10 for shipping to get yours!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696305:JDktZn2wN:m:1:3253819041:3D4B480997AF22DC9445AF01E8D977B0:r "It’s FREE, just chip in $10 for shipping to get yours!") But hurry, there are only 1,000 of this specialty shirt available!**
---
| | | [CLAIM YOUR FREE SHIRT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696305:JDktZn2wN:m:1:3253819041:3D4B480997AF22DC9445AF01E8D977B0:r "CLAIM YOUR SHIRT")
---
_Just Chip in $10 for Shipping!_
---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696306:JDktZn2wN:m:1:3253819041:3D4B480997AF22DC9445AF01E8D977B0:r "Trump Image Link")

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696306:JDktZn2wN:m:1:3253819041:3D4B480997AF22DC9445AF01E8D977B0:r "Peter, can we count on you to step up?")**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: RE: Our first ad-buy deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
Just hours left to hit our goal...
| [](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094965:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)
---
Peter,
---
We all remember the riots and lawlessness that swept the country last year. But here in Wisconsin, we had it twice as bad...
---
_Our radical liberal governor, Tony Evers, stoked the flames of division, criticized the very police who were trying to protect us, and allowed the city of Kenosha to BURN._
---
That's why our campaign's FIRST ad is so important -- we need to remind EVERY voter exactly who Tony Evers really is.
---
**_But with the ad-buy deadline TONIGHT at 9:45 P.M., I'm counting on grassroots conservatives like YOU to help raise the remaining $23,575 we need to run this ad._**
---
**[Please watch my first ad and then make a contribution to our Ad Fund before the deadline to ensure our message reaches every last voter.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094965:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)**
---
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094965:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)
---
**[WATCH THE AD▶️](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094965:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094966:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094967:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094968:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094969:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094970:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094965:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)**
---
Peter, I decided to run for governor because I couldn't sit on the sidelines any longer...
---
_The hardworking people of Wisconsin deserve good jobs, our kids deserve to be allowed into the classroom, and our families deserve to live in safe neighborhoods._
---
But Tony Evers doesn't care what the PEOPLE deserve, he only cares about one man -- _himself_.
---
I saw the state that I love being failed time and again by a left-wing governor more determined to please special interests and liberal unions than protect his own citizens.
---
Enough is enough. We must FIRE Tony Evers.
---
_But first, I need your help reaching our goal for our Ad Fund so that every voter hears our conservative message and the TRUTH about Tony Evers._
---
**[Please watch my first ad and then make a contribution to our Ad Fund before the deadline TONIGHT at 9:45 P.M. to ensure our message reaches every last voter.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094965:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)**
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/59094965:WUUzy1HNI:m:1:1155937413:5C33AAFCAF181C453A0FF4D46F6D73A1:r)
---
Rebecca Kleefisch
Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin
Republican Candidate for Governor
---
Paid for by People for Rebecca.
---
PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562
---

subject: Checking in on Nikki Haleys Request Fwd: Timely Memo Enclosed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | |
Nikki Haley is asking for your help! **[Did you miss her message?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696917:6IPytn2VN:m:1:3299561967:76A5F3CB37A8BAE39D4C3E91BE9ACA40:r "Did you miss her message?")**

_She only reached out to the top 250 patriots in the country_ to include them in her confidential plan to close the $10 million gap between the Radical Left and House Conservatives, **but you never responded. **

**There must have been a mistake, but we need to set the record straight before 11:59 PM.**

---
| | | [SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696917:6IPytn2VN:m:1:3299561967:76A5F3CB37A8BAE39D4C3E91BE9ACA40:r "Generic Button")
---

In fact, you are the **ONLY** person who did not get back to her about your commitment to taking back the House, but we're giving you one more chance to let her know you're on her side.

**[Will you commit today to join the fight to overtake Nancy Pelosi's majority?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696917:6IPytn2VN:m:1:3299561967:76A5F3CB37A8BAE39D4C3E91BE9ACA40:r "Will you commit
today to join the fight to overtake Nancy Pelosi’s majority? ")**
_We need to hear from you before 11:59 PM! _
---
| | | [ACT NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696917:6IPytn2VN:m:1:3299561967:76A5F3CB37A8BAE39D4C3E91BE9ACA40:r "Generic Button")
---

Please don't let Nikki Haley down. We only have a short window of time, and if you don't act now, we may never catch up to the Democrats. **[Don't miss this opportunity.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696917:6IPytn2VN:m:1:3299561967:76A5F3CB37A8BAE39D4C3E91BE9ACA40:r "Don’t miss this opportunity.")**

Thank you,

Will

House GOP HQ

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: **Nikki Haley**
Date: Wed, Oct 26, 2021 at 3:54 PM
Subject: Timely memo enclosed
Cc: Nikki Haley, House Conservative Leadership

Before you read any further, I want you to know that this is exclusive intel that I can only share with a select number of people. Because of that, I ask that you don't share this email or its contents with anyone else.

All my best,

Nikki Haley

| |
From: Ambassador Nikki Haley
Date: October 20, 2021
Re: The Democrats Outraised Us

This is extremely important. Don't share this with anyone. This is confidential information that I am only sharing with a select group of supporters.

I'll be the first to admit it, House conservatives missed our quarter 3 fundraising deadline by a large margin. The Democrats outraised us by $10 million and are convinced that they can continue to outraise us until the midterms.

Let me tell you, I am NOT going to let that happen. This is the time to act, and it's our best shot at moving ahead of the Democrats once and for all.

---

That's where you come in. We've come up with a confidential plan to catch back up to the left, but we're only mentioning it to our top 250 supporters. I realize that 250 people can't make up $10 million, but I promise you that we have a plan.

**[I'm pleading with you - chip in to help us catch back up to the Democrats so we can take back the House >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58696917:6IPytn2VN:m:1:3299561967:76A5F3CB37A8BAE39D4C3E91BE9ACA40:r "I’m pleading with you, Patriot - chip in to help us catch back up to the Democrats so
we can take back the House >>>")**

Button")
---

If this first step of the process is successful, we will disclose more of our confidential plan, which I think you'll be very excited about. If everything goes as planned:

_We WILL flip 5 seats & we WILL win back the House!_

I have a good feeling about this, but it's up to you to decide if we'll accomplish our goals.

My very best,
Nikki Haley

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: How you Can Help the Diehl Campaign
body:
Build the Movement
| | | |
---
---
|
---
Friends,
I am thrilled to let you know that our campaign has experienced an incredible outpouring of support from voters across the state since we announced in July of this year!
So how can you get involved to support Geoff Diehl to be your next Governor of Massachusetts?
Join Your Local Republican Town or City Committee
The first hurdle to cross for the Diehl campaign is winning at the Massachusetts Republican State Convention, which will be held on May 21, 2022, in Springfield, MA. If you are a member of your local city or town committee, you are eligible to be a delegate to the state convention, where you can cast your vote to nominate the candidates to best represent the MassGOP.
If you want a voice in this election, you can have it! But you must be listed as a member of your town or city committee by DECEMBER 31, 2021, and you must be registered as a Republican.
Please check whether you are currently a member of your local committee here: [OCPF Filers Page ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012guNet9_5HVYIPP_ap53uK9y8MyDLfLOCXJc4jVRr2ijn8Eot87R-VTEo3ELjIT6gfDihy5b6v6KpwviA-avD27yU2sfucXyWn25EQ944Q3B_wKC7I8xRYqpk6lHL5p1EbmgHAb8RxQYHq1o4BrO_0ZwJk2JdPC6&c=xC6W8RyWIB-SSgbo20WDAc-OtF0YQa0SsWMPldvB_vkMP0JDtjUDbg==&ch=bClVkCcgq5SxmlziTewLyOyl4RJRVxGEY2fmAGqN4n8MlbFmLIyzXg==). Select "Local Party Committees/Republican," and type in your town/city's name.
If you'd like to become a member and be eligible to be a delegate, please contact the Chairperson of that committee, attend their next meeting, and ask to be voted in and added to the member list. Then, follow up with them to ensure they file their committee paperwork with your name as a member with OCPF before DECEMBER 31, 2021.
If your town does not have a Republican committee registered on OCPF, please contact us, and we will assist you in forming one.
If you have questions about this important step you can take to ensure a Diehl victory, please contact our campaign: [info@geoffdiehl.com](mailto:amanda@geoffdiehl.com).

---
|
---
|

---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
[Diehl for Massachusetts ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012guNet9_5HVYIPP_ap53uK9y8MyDLfLOCXJc4jVRr2ijn8Eot87R-Z4ZaWAWXAZyiMwPgLhY5tDYHh5RX2MPieJ4NSLaJ7WD7UTwPPAvy-lH1L77ZLe88Xuvu6FmTsslzN7_wnmjSaswaieOZ3tYvSsghZ7PJsLlgnjyqdQcPbIQSL6guRnKAA==&c=xC6W8RyWIB-SSgbo20WDAc-OtF0YQa0SsWMPldvB_vkMP0JDtjUDbg==&ch=bClVkCcgq5SxmlziTewLyOyl4RJRVxGEY2fmAGqN4n8MlbFmLIyzXg==)

| Peter,

In Virginia, in New Jersey, and right here in New York, Republicans wildly outperformed expectations and flipped so much from blue to red...

**And all of these upset victories sent one very clear message -_a _RED TSUNAMI_ is on its way in November 2022! _**

We are witnessing voters hold every one of these Democrat "leaders" accountable, from Joe Biden to Bill de Blasio, for their tax hikes, crime spikes, and failed education policies. [**__These conditions are creating a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to Save New York!__**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58697341:67c7_n2NM:m:1:3298722022:1280A8F77E646EE536809B4B87B2F4C4:r)

If it can happen in solid blue Virginia, it can happen here - so will you help usher in a Republican victory and make sure another state rejects the radical left agenda?

| **We won 't get another chance like this to fix all the damage these tyrants have created and take back New York and America.**

**_This is how we end the attacks on our wallets, our safety, and our freedom!_**

Virginia voters just made it clear that they reject far-left policies like **_" Woke" indoctrination of our kids._** We can do the same here in New York, and also reject their **lawless "Defund the Police" and cashless bail crime spikes, their draconian mandates shuttering firehouses, and so many of their other horrible failures!**

Because it's now crystal clear - the American people don't want their leaders to dig in their heels after jeopardizing their rights and safety... **They want these leaders _GONE!_**

We can send them packing in New York if we build on the momentum right now... [**_Pitch in to this critical and WINNABLE fight today!_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58697341:67c7_n2NM:m:1:3298722022:1280A8F77E646EE536809B4B87B2F4C4:r)

name: Celeste Fortenberry
subject: FBI lies to target Patriots with fake crimes!
body:
FBI agents used deception to gain entry into our home
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu1fnc51j16gutke75n4m2inmdkg1sbqfq5emiig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfep9ke9hb8t5kesqjcsphc1ibcs5n69ijepr2m3hm7db5mdpr6t9kmoor3dbke3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6cc5kmdi3fchicoon1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphm8p35c5h6eoh5u)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zupt0o23t7v8j7kb2uftors679v3u3lvuef2i6t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot, **Here 's the sad truth**: we can't trust the FBI. They are going after parents who care about what happens in their children's schools. That's just one of many examples. And now agents in the FBI are trying to destroy the family life, political career, and stellar reputation of my husband--Congressman Jeff Fortenberry of Nebraska. FBI agents used deception to gain entry into our home;
* **Frightened** me and our five young daughters; and

* **Interrogated** Jeff in our own living room as we waited in worry and fear.

All so they could ruin him. Jeff trusted them; but they deceived him. Repeatedly. And now they're falsely accusing him of lying. **[That's why I'm reaching out on Jeff's behalf, to ask you to support his Legal Defense Fund.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z868023a1ll7g5946mfoi3ui9mesjpvri9sdgce8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)** [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr09su3qug4m6ip1m3t66ur7rj23c6t7irgeklj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs) | | | | [Chip in $25!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2tco6e0mfps1h0sqat466dn2dan6f28k3tkvtv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $50!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z67kjfp7jupe4jl9rvslcmne4e0ulk10dptao3no_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $100!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zevkks91vffs1l9ko5b7aeuvcrtv6mfg0lfce6s8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)
---
I know Jeff better than anyone. I hope you'll trust me when I tell you Jeff is a man of deep faith, extraordinary honesty, and unshakeable integrity. He works UNBELIEVABLY hard for his family and for his country. I can't tell you how proud I am of him, and how blessed I am to be married to him.

So why are they going after Jeff?

He's a conservative Republican, from a farm state. They want to stop his work and flip his seat. They can't call him crazy, so they're accusing him of a fake crime.

Jeff is articulate, diplomatic, and compassionate. But that doesn't mean weak!

When it comes to defending the rights of the most vulnerable, rescuing Americans and allies abandoned in Afghanistan, and standing against injustice, you won't find a more dedicated fighter than Jeff.

And now he is facing serious threats from Biden's FBI. They could destroy his political career, and even cause him to lose his freedom.

**Every time FBI agents take down a good man like Jeff, it emboldens them to go after more Americans. Jeff wants to put a stop to that.**

But he can't fight alone against the piles of taxpayer money they have at their disposal.

Will you please help him?

**[We can't get through this without generous patriots like you helping with my husband's Legal Defense Fund. Anything you can give will be received most gratefully, and used prudently.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zad7goh2k931gd6kvh1ea12ua89vgql06jusbk4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)**

[Your support today](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk0vqamt9o7rrf4e2m2208qogndp0obr5oa3les0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs) will help Jeff defeat this attack by Biden's FBI.
| | | [Chip in $25!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze1p8i1eeodpsk2f6lg0pr5ns4mvsqt019nlkogo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $50!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zei8143ssa6amb5nsi3j8mjdhg3dced3lpumb08g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)
---
| | | [Chip in $100!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z382fpea3itju82qshk17256s4p9hfuqapebve6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)
---
You can count on Jeff to fight hard for survival and for justice . . . for our family's sake--and for every American patriot's sake.

Thank you for taking the time to consider our appeal. Thank you for anything you can give. Thank you for your kind thoughts and words; and thank you, if you're so inclined, for your prayer support.

Blessings,

Celeste Fortenberry
Wife of Rep. Jeff Fortenberry

| | | | [Donate!](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zio28b5njn6d2r504shnbio4kdu7k48svdc56a80_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chi6aob2cth2bs)
---

subject: Can we count on you to help us start November strong?
body:
The radical Left is building a massive war chest for the upcoming House election.

| Friend,
The radical Left is building a massive war chest for the upcoming House election. They are desperately trying to hold on to their corrupt power in Washington. But they know how angry the American people are with their socialist agenda. They're trying to buy our seats.
Unfortunately, we weren't able to meet our fundraising goal for October. However, I know Florida is a stronghold for the America First movement and we can count on you to help us start November strong!
---
| | | [HELP KAT CAMMACK](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X1p8-WvBA7YxfKap8yPDsAlrRTvs6jP8e4-7VF6FpugWHhja_kNGG5AemIXgiHyMbfQIEQ703QdRKFJtMVwnph90rtExNhWaqi7VeC-qK5KHNPp5n1MlnVyvC5x-Zg9AoXYZiHxnZ_egdkXot3TRqgai_y1oxRE2_2UusdFlWWMOV3kUbh_JwaHlJFZApOEYlmScAd8jiLI=&c=xNuux88gsCQjKqYGGoOxUBpFpD3L9MrQTq76S4rYzrt0dfHEmZqkkQ==&ch=htEXgcegglIL_wuEHi_q4p7eOYWfRMynFZRe-gLp6zarPH7_7VELMw==)

| Right now, the Socialists are destroying our nation from Washington. The massive spending spree, tax hikes, and Bidenflation are shrinking American wallets. But we can't end the socialist agenda while the Left still has the majority.
We need to take back the House for the America First agenda.
With your support, Kat can continue her fight against the swamp Socialists and will fight for your rights as an American, but she can't do it without meeting the November fundraising deadline.
[Can Kat count on you to help her start November strong?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X1p8-WvBA7YxfKap8yPDsAlrRTvs6jP8e4-7VF6FpugWHhja_kNGG5AemIXgiHyMbfQIEQ703QdRKFJtMVwnph90rtExNhWaqi7VeC-qK5KHNPp5n1MlnVyvC5x-Zg9AoXYZiHxnZ_egdkXot3TRqgai_y1oxRE2_2UusdFlWWMOV3kUbh_JwaHlJFZApOEYlmScAd8jiLI=&c=xNuux88gsCQjKqYGGoOxUBpFpD3L9MrQTq76S4rYzrt0dfHEmZqkkQ==&ch=htEXgcegglIL_wuEHi_q4p7eOYWfRMynFZRe-gLp6zarPH7_7VELMw==)

| | | [START NOVEMBER STRONG](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X1p8-WvBA7YxfKap8yPDsAlrRTvs6jP8e4-7VF6FpugWHhja_kNGG5AemIXgiHyMbfQIEQ703QdRKFJtMVwnph90rtExNhWaqi7VeC-qK5KHNPp5n1MlnVyvC5x-Zg9AoXYZiHxnZ_egdkXot3TRqgai_y1oxRE2_2UusdFlWWMOV3kUbh_JwaHlJFZApOEYlmScAd8jiLI=&c=xNuux88gsCQjKqYGGoOxUBpFpD3L9MrQTq76S4rYzrt0dfHEmZqkkQ==&ch=htEXgcegglIL_wuEHi_q4p7eOYWfRMynFZRe-gLp6zarPH7_7VELMw==)

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: Fighting for HBCUs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
This issue is near and dear to my heart.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38315874/314920238/326428347?refcode=EM_c_211105hbcus_hbcu_lbr_actives_5_ng_nalogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTFhZjQ2My0zYTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xwmQMHTP064ur-pJ94t5HAtjDF_jts1yOyplsfQNVE4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38315875/314920239/326428347?refcode=EM_c_211105hbcus_hbcu_lbr_actives_5_ng_nalogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTFhZjQ2My0zYTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xwmQMHTP064ur-pJ94t5HAtjDF_jts1yOyplsfQNVE4=) Historically Black Colleges and Universities have been the cornerstone of higher education for Black students for decades, and as the Congresswoman for the students and faculty of Delaware State University, I know it is imperative that we continue to invest in these institutions.

Just last month, I spent some time at DSU for their Homecoming football game. I spoke with President Tony Allen, and he highlighted that he is committed to making Delaware State the most diverse, contemporary HBCU in America.

I was also able to speak to alumni and students about the issues affecting HBCUs today, and I was proud to highlight my work in Washington to uplift HBCUs. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38315876/314920240/326428347?refcode=EM_c_211105hbcus_hbcu_lbr_actives_5_ng_na_graphic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTFhZjQ2My0zYTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xwmQMHTP064ur-pJ94t5HAtjDF_jts1yOyplsfQNVE4=) Just this year, I sponsored the IGNITE HBCU Excellence Act in the House. This legislation will provide for the long-term improvement of HBCUs across the country, and coupled with further investment from the Biden Administration’s Build Back Better Plan, will be a game-changer for HBCUs struggling to improve infrastructure and expand opportunities for students.

I’m going to continue fighting for these investments in our future, and so much more, as long as I’m in Congress.

Thank you for your support,

Lisa Blunt Rochester ** ** | **Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38315877/314920241/326428347?refcode=EM_c_211105hbcus_hbcu_lbr_actives_5_ng_nana_bio&refcode2=biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTFhZjQ2My0zYTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xwmQMHTP064ur-pJ94t5HAtjDF_jts1yOyplsfQNVE4=)****
---

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38321965/314947255/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGNkNWUyNC00NTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqMJaQoZWLAojQb1eZLIuaRiV6jposMx4tGUKfwDFOA=)

Hey there,

I wanted to quickly reach out and **thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goal this past month** \-- without you, this campaign wouldn't be possible.

We don't accept corporate PAC donations. We rely heavily on hardworking grassroots supporters like you to keep us going. That can make things tougher for us than for other campaigns, but I wouldn't have it any other way.

**The election results on Tuesday night are another reminder that flipping Pennsylvania and winning this seat will be hard. But we've been in tough fights before, beating three of Trump's candidates in three Republican districts in three years.** We've had super PACs spending tens of millions of dollars attacking us, and all the forces of the national Republican party trying to defeat us.

**We're the only campaign in this race that's been through these kinds of tough fights together.** And each time, we've won -- because you have always stood with me and stepped up to make it possible.

**So let's do it again in 2022, friend.** Let's keep sticking together, keep putting in the hard work, and keep our eyes focused on flipping Pennsylvania in 2022.

Thank you.

clean_body: | = Hey there, I wanted to quickly reach out and thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goal this past month \-- without you, this campaign wouldn't be possible. We don't accept corporate PAC donations. We rely heavily on hardworking grassroots supporters like you to keep us going. That can make things tougher for us than for other campaigns, but I wouldn't have it any other way. The election results on Tuesday night are another reminder that flipping Pennsylvania and winning this seat will be hard. But we've been in tough fights before, beating three of Trump's candidates in three Republican districts in three years. We've had super PACs spending tens of millions of dollars attacking us, and all the forces of the national Republican party trying to defeat us. We're the only campaign in this race that's been through these kinds of tough fights together. And each time, we've won -- because you have always stood with me and stepped up to make it possible. So let's do it again in 2022, friend. Let's keep sticking together, keep putting in the hard work, and keep our eyes focused on flipping Pennsylvania in 2022. Thank you. \-- Conor = = *

Dear Peter,
It’s hard to believe but we are nearing the end of our 95 County Tour and I want to invite you to hear all about what I’ve learned from the incredible people of Tennessee.
The momentum this campaign has amassed is humbling, yet exhilarating. Tennesseans want change. People are done with the divisive political games coming from the Tennessee General Assembly and ready for our government to focus on everyday issues like access to quality healthcare and meaningful job growth, especially in our rural communities.
Between every stop of our state tour, I’ve made countless calls to folks asking them to support our campaign. We must continue to raise money in order to bring our message to the voters of this beautiful state and we’re so grateful to Sherry and Mark Deutschmann for hosting a fundraiser for us in Nashville on Tuesday, December 7th.
Consider this your invitation! I’d love to meet you in person and I humbly ask for your support. Host committee giving levels start at $250 and tickets are $100. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashvilledec7]

-Dr. Jason Martin

Hi Peter, it's Abby, and I want to talk to you briefly about why our race against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa is so important. You see, with Senate control split 50-50, every single Senate seat matters immensely – and as of this moment, Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable: **Polling shows that only 27% of voters want to reelect him. I need your help to take advantage of this momentum.**
**[**If we win in Iowa, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep our Senate majority. So ahead of my next fundraising deadline at midnight, will you make a donation of $5 or more now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38322011/314947577/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk366-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmQ1NWY5MS00NTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xytGijNXm8nZub6ao7L9YABDmcOxvQ61VYJ1IzRrpXE=)**
I have every intention of doing what it takes to compete against Sen. Grassley and win this race. I made history in 2018 as the youngest woman to flip a congressional district from red to blue. That’s why Fox News and the Senate GOP campaign arm are already attacking me – because they know I can win.

**But Mitch McConnell’s allies have tens of millions of dollars in their campaign war chests. National Republicans are going to do everything within their power to protect Sen. Grassley, keep Iowa red and take back control of the Senate. We cannot let that happen. That's why I'm counting on the grassroots support of people like you – donating $10, $20, $50 at a time – to help me win this.**
**With nearly two-thirds of Iowans saying it's time for Sen. Grassley to go, this is our single greatest opportunity to flip Iowa blue and make sure Democrats maintain Senate control:[So please, can you rush a donation of $5 or more to help me defeat Sen. Abby

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Reviving Northwest Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38322033/314947710/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjYwOWFkMC00NTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DsNHo3J403la4pqGDdgXP1zYvj8SzTLnJoVSJfcGd6k=&emci=d0d85d73-a83d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3b609ad0-453e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Peter,

One of the reasons I am running this campaign is because I have watched Northwest Georgia get left behind in a changing economy. GA-14 has had a void in leadership for far too long.

Time and again, our representatives have failed to invest in our infrastructure - leading to crumbling buildings, no public transportation, and a complete lack of broadband internet. But this fight isn't over. My Rural Revival Plan is aimed at fixing the issues we desperately need.

I know we can push for progress because I’ve seen us do it before. Dalton, known by many as the carpet capital of the world, has diversified its local industry by building the largest solar panel assembly plant in the western hemisphere. This manufacturing plant has poured millions of dollars into our communities and provided good paying jobs for many Georgians.

One of the core elements of my campaign is about reviving rural infrastructure and bringing jobs to Northwest Georgia. It is accomplishments like this that will help push us forward. Green energy is a fantastic way to diversify rural economies, while also working to fix our growing climate crisis.

Marjorie Taylor Greene is not from here, and continues to show us that she has no interest in helping the people of GA-14. **[Chip in $10 today, and when I’m elected we will bring more good paying clean jobs right here to Northwest Georgia. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38322034/314947711/-804235033?refcode=em1105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjYwOWFkMC00NTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DsNHo3J403la4pqGDdgXP1zYvj8SzTLnJoVSJfcGd6k=)**

Together we can do this,
Holly McCormack.
|

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d2bomyE_mGinV4nrVWWFtcbk5IIzkHRpFcxn9zz7fTsZlHnBdk_sgjgSMub8LlqSYmr_717XK6C0rof2AGe27rwO54gW1LypMWWqwhT61Lvs_9w6kZPD1QBCNDiH5zfVPh1XmBL50EQbOfXOtmoFcKLioSJ3fzNShVeHCCJOvaHYrvwAWW3_Kz6vmAiBOpLs&c=xMU1yrOMW4UdENNjBgGq-J-CwwK6n-j3iBs83FYCSdaJOojokaWxfA==&ch=6n410kvJYMCFoqv8uwE9E52iaHmaUytqC0q7nnHsKp5NNsZ-sk6Q5A==)

| Peter
Do Democrats seriously think that their constituents are hoping they relitigate January 6th for the 1,000th time rather than deal with crushing inflation, the Border Crisis, or problems we have abroad?
They can't even pretend to represent the American people anymore...
Their sole focus is on crushing a movement that they know is more powerful than they are - [don't let them ignore our country's problems just so they can focus on going after ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d2bomyE_mGinV4nrVWWFtcbk5IIzkHRpFcxn9zz7fTsZlHnBdk_sgjgSMub8LlqSYmr_717XK6C0rof2AGe27rwO54gW1LypMWWqwhT61Lvs_9w6kZPD1QBCNDiH5zfVPh1XmBL50EQbOfXOtmoFcKLioSJ3fzNShVeHCCJOvaHYrvwAWW3_Kz6vmAiBOpLs&c=xMU1yrOMW4UdENNjBgGq-J-CwwK6n-j3iBs83FYCSdaJOojokaWxfA==&ch=6n410kvJYMCFoqv8uwE9E52iaHmaUytqC0q7nnHsKp5NNsZ-sk6Q5A==)[YOU!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d2bomyE_mGinV4nrVWWFtcbk5IIzkHRpFcxn9zz7fTsZlHnBdk_sgjgSMub8LlqSYmr_717XK6C0rof2AGe27rwO54gW1LypMWWqwhT61Lvs_9w6kZPD1QBCNDiH5zfVPh1XmBL50EQbOfXOtmoFcKLioSJ3fzNShVeHCCJOvaHYrvwAWW3_Kz6vmAiBOpLs&c=xMU1yrOMW4UdENNjBgGq-J-CwwK6n-j3iBs83FYCSdaJOojokaWxfA==&ch=6n410kvJYMCFoqv8uwE9E52iaHmaUytqC0q7nnHsKp5NNsZ-sk6Q5A==)

name: Elfreda Desvignes
subject: Meeting is cancelled for today
body:
The meeting is cancelled due to the Atlanta Braves Parade.

We are rescheduling for next Saturday at 11am.

Please confirm by emailing me back.

Thanks,
Antionette

| Peter \-
Well, it's official. Now the CDC has joined the FDA in approving the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine for children ages 5-11.
My question is...what parent is out there taking orders from these bureaucrats about what's right for their kids??
This is the same CDC that was caught coordinating with the teacher's unions to keep schools closed and our kids stuck in Zoom classrooms. And now they want to test out this experimental drug for a virus that is statistically negligible for children.
I won't stand for this, and I hope you'll join me in stopping this insanity!

---
| Let's start with the facts regarding the FDA's recent endorsement of COVID vaccines for children - if you're under the age of 14, the threat of this disease is negligible.
What parent or government in their right mind would want to inject our healthy children with this experimental procedure?! This is what we can expect from the same FDA that unleashed a fatal opioid crisis on its people just 25 years ago!
I'm sounding the alarm bells on this because if I don't, who else will? Too many are content to let Big Pharma and Big Government get away with this scheme - and now our CHILDREN are being caught in the crosshairs!

name: The Wade Brigade
subject: Wade’s always working!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem1105121 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem1105121] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Good morning Peter,
For the past few decades, Wade has been dedicating his time to serving his community – before social media was there to record it.
Now, at Brigade HQ, we’re lucky to capture the moments of Wade meeting & greeting friends-of-friends and the small actions he takes to better our neighborhood, community, and district every day.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/Email.png]
The Bryan County Wade Brigade reached out to people all across Bryan County to collect household items in support of the Roman Catholic Diocese of Savannah’s efforts to help Afghan refugee families who will be coming to live as our neighbors all across the First Congressional District of Georgia, which is part of the Diocese. Wade helped with delivery and repackaging as well as had the chance to hear from people on the ground doing this work. Our thanks to Rena Patton for leading the Wade Brigade in this effort.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/IMG_6568-em.png]
On Tuesday, Wade attended the annual Savannah Chatham CASA [https://www.savannahcasa.org/] (Court Appointed Special Advocates) meeting. CASA trains volunteers to advocate for children who have experienced abuse and neglect, and Wade has been a strong supporter & volunteer.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/IMG_6511.png][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/IMG_6503.png]
On Saturday, the community group Hello Neighbor [https://www.facebook.com/helloneighborsav/] held an event in Tatemville to promote conversations and interactions between diverse members of our community! Wade attended, and events like these are a reminder of the good that organizations and leaders can create.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/250293154_136909012016299_2856060279294557309_n.jpeg]
And of course, there was time to vote on Tuesday! There has been plenty of national discussion about this election and what it means for 2022. But what we’re focused on is building a coalition of neighbors, supporters, and community leaders to send Wade to Washington.
Talk soon,
The Wade Brigade
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=whem110521] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringga1/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com
Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e91b8881-3e3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/0b6c8573-4a3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjZjODU3My00YTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rqWz6ldSlxdWQd_pll9qdlX4bq6AbXZ9rdcQHR0lYwA=&id=127098231 .
Wade Herring for Congress
PO Box 9145
Savannah, GA 31412
United States

name: Ras Smith
subject: What's best for our kids is what's best for our state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
Reynolds and the rest of the GOP would rather put corporate and private interests first by cutting budgets and siphoning money from Iowa's public schools. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38324394/314959654/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk5MTc0NC00YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTulNQ0zvMX_hW3ykJ3I9-pCMRgrJUnvTZQ38zL31gY=)
Friend,

A lot of the press and political pundits spent this week opining on how education was a defining issue in Virginia's election on Tuesday. As a former counselor, coach, and student support worker -- as well as a father of two daughters, and the husband of a teacher -- here's why I believe they're (mostly) right and what we can do about it:

**It's simple: What's best for our kids is what's best for our state.** If we're not doing right by our kids, little else matters. Right now, far-right politicians are sowing fear and division about what's being taught in our schools because it paints an easy target for parents' rage at a system that's failing too many of our kids.

[**If you agree that we need to push back on the far-right's fearmongering to truly put kids and schools first, chip in $3 right now. **Public education is central to Iowa's heritage:** The slogan on our state quarter is literally "Foundation in Education" -- a tribute to the fact that _Iowa was once home to the best public schools in the country._

But right now, Reynolds and the rest of the GOP would rather put corporate and private interests first by cutting budgets and siphoning money from Iowa's public schools.

I've seen this firsthand as my wife Amelia has been forced to drastically increase her workload -- teaching at multiple levels due to a lack of staff.

**We have a plan to get Iowa schools back to #1, but right now we need your help getting the word out about our campaign to more Democrats and undecided voters.[Chip in $3 today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38324402/314959662/-73891749?refcode=em-11521-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDk5MTc0NC00YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTulNQ0zvMX_hW3ykJ3I9-pCMRgrJUnvTZQ38zL31gY=)**

### Good Morning!
---
Happy Friday!Last week, I had the honor of participating in the Oconee County Republican Party's 10th Congressional District Forum. It was a very constructive event, and I enjoyed meeting so many different people (over 275 at the forum!). The forum highlighted the main difference between my campaign and the majority of the other candidates. A link to the video is listed below with the timestamp. I encourage you to watch all the candidates and vote for the person who best represents your interest.I hope you all have a great weekend. Find a way to give back to your community this week, and remember: JESUS LOVES YOU. "So we do not lose heart. Though our outer self is wasting away, our inner self is being renewed day by day. For this light momentary affliction is preparing for us an eternal weight of glory beyond all comparison, as we look not to the things that are seen but the things that are unseen. For the things that are seen are temporary, but what is unseen is eternal." 2 Corinthians 4: 16-18 (ESV/NIV)Forum Video: [https://vimeo.com/639330157](https://mgcp01.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=61854d4018730c7e650eb8c5&u=https%3A%2F%2Fvimeo.com%2F639330157&w=609c0485dbf6602665aef372&l=en-US&s=ggQOzZaZwEr1ER35iT8gqIGspVA%3D) Timestamp: 1:33:25Andrew AlveyGalatians 5:13
---
Pictures from a recent event with the Henry County Republican
---
---
| |
---|---
| |
#### We are called to serve each other. Let’s start today.
---|---
| |
---|---
| |
#### These two women have been my biggest supporters throughout the entire campaign. Thank you mom and Hana for being the amazing, beautiful, supportive, and resolute women of Christ that you both are. I thank God every day for each of you.
---|---

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Add your name to STOP DARK MONEY before it's too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
Tomorrow is the deadline to add your name and be heard on this important issue.

Friend,

The Supreme Court's calamitous _Citizens United_ decision **opened the flood gates of unattributed and _unlimited_ campaign contributions** in our political system, the practical effect of which has been tragic. Money has always played a role in politics, but now it’s become the most important factor.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38324614/314960931/-893239255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWMyN2Q0MS00ZDNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R8Rw6_L6z-ToAyxvn4ZyNHB7_Rtmn_P-r6Frp058V9k=&emci=52a74fa3-073c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c1c27d41-4d3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12898431)

---
Rather than having conversations with voters about real solutions to challenges we face as a nation, candidates must raise increasingly large sums of money if they hope to be successful. **Campaigns should not be auctions, but that’s precisely what they’ve become, thanks in large part to DARK MONEY.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38324615/314960932/-893239255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWMyN2Q0MS00ZDNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R8Rw6_L6z-ToAyxvn4ZyNHB7_Rtmn_P-r6Frp058V9k=&emci=52a74fa3-073c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c1c27d41-4d3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12898431)

clean_body: Tomorrow is the deadline to add your name and be heard on this important issue. Friend, The Supreme Court's calamitous Citizens United decision opened the flood gates of unattributed and unlimited campaign contributions in our political system, the practical effect of which has been tragic. Money has always played a role in politics, but now it’s become the most important factor. Rather than having conversations with voters about real solutions to challenges we face as a nation, candidates must raise increasingly large sums of money if they hope to be successful. Campaigns should not be auctions, but that’s precisely what they’ve become, thanks in large part to DARK MONEY. We have a once in a generation opportunity to change this, but we need your support. subject: Biden's mandate and Walz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
What will you stand for | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/01cb94d2c85d/bidens-mandate-and-walz?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Well, it's here. [Joe Biden's vaccine mandate](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=7d1e020b74&e=33b11688c1) for private employers now has teeth through OSHA. Do you think Tim Walz is going to stop it and advocate for freedom/personal choice in Minnesota? **Fat chance. **😡

The fact of the matter is: I'm the only candidate who has battled for health freedom at the risk of my own career. I stood in the breach and didn't blink, and I will FIGHT as governor. [**I need your support right now, to ensure we have a legitimate fight against these unconstitutional "mandates"**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c7cb458c1d&e=33b11688c1)! They've investigated my medical license five times fo speaking out!

Joe Biden's mandate (and his whole agenda) needs real opposition at the state level. You know I called for Minnesotans to disobey such ridiculous decrees until we become a [Health Freedom Sanctuary State](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=b52b41d116&e=33b11688c1). I stand by that! Whether it's having a say in what your child learns in school or what happens to their bodies, YOUR VOICE is powerful, necessary, and important. You are not married to the state - and they don't get to dictate your health choices or impose mandates that force you to lose your job!

Tim Walz isn't going to fight for you! _I will._ I need you to go _all in_ right now, so we can battle against this tyranny. [**Give $30, $60, $90, or more.**](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=635f234f3d&e=33b11688c1) Tim Walz and Joe Biden are compounding the growing unemployment, supply chain issues, and inflation with these political maneuvers! Enough is enough!

If only Tim Walz would have watched my interview with "Stand for Health Freedom":
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=d4065f67f3&e=33b11688c1)
---
| If we want to have a similar result as Virginia did Tuesday, we need to have a candidate who understands the issues and will stand by his convictions! That's me - and that's our campaign. [Go all in](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=58d0fef01b&e=33b11688c1) right now and financially support us so we can go battle against the Far-Left Machine and Tim Walz's war chest. He doesn't deserve another term!

We can fight back.
We can win.

In Freedom.

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor
Minnesota
---
