body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us6.campaign-archive.com/?u=4d7cccc20d08657a33b6f91f9&id=0d8776ad8e&e=321b6045b9)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I wanted to extend my gratitude for your generous donation. This isn’t just a campaign. This is a war for our great Republic. Your generous support enables us to continue to work to counter the evil forces attempting to steal our children's futures.

Socialists and their media and corporate partners seek to destroy our historic nation by selling out to Chinese Communist influence and ultimately surrender control of our future to a Chinese Communist global superpower. Regrettably, they have shown they are willing to resurrect their party’s abhorrent legacy of racism in order to achieve their goals and have targeted our children with messages of hate for their fellow Americans. They have shown they are willing to encourage and even cheer the burning, destruction, and decline of our great American cities in order to cement their hold on power. Patriots languish in prison while violent criminals repeatedly offend with no consequence. Much of the population of Central America has responded to the tacit invitation extended by our Marxist leaders and pour across our non-existent border each day. Our corrupt leaders gladly invite electoral fraud in order to ensure victory, because they know the majority of voters reject their traitorous policies. They are destroying our great nation before our eyes.

This cannot stand.

I am up against opponents on both sides who don’t appreciate the grave peril we face, despite their party affiliation. We can only beat the radical revolutionaries if we have more generous supporters like you. If you know of any other patriots that would join our fight, please send them to my website [(](https://noah4nv.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4d7cccc20d08657a33b6f91f9&id=54edfc231b&e=321b6045b9)[www.noah4nv](https://noah4nv.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4d7cccc20d08657a33b6f91f9&id=4d75eb67a4&e=321b6045b9)) to learn how to get involved, or I would be delighted to call them personally as well. Just let me know. My personal number is 702 623 2181 and would love to talk to any fellow Patriots who would join this fight alongside me. Thank you, Noah Vincent Malgeri

**[Friend, this is a long email about my mom. I hope you'll take a moment to read the entire message, then consider donating $3 to support my campaign to improve the lives of working mothers in Western North Carolina and across this country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38325457/314964613/1573898945?refcode=em-11521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjkxMDM1Ny01MTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hrmyk-5M_JaSCdb0fwUT3JowLq9q2Qqs5xFbgu05TsU=)**

Things were tough growing up.

My dad was an alcoholic with an abusive streak.

At the age of 12, I considered taking my own life.

But I had the two beings who kept me safe: God and my mother.

My mom is a pillar of strength, and raised me with _mountain values._ She taught us resilience, and the importance of maintaining the heart of a servant.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38325458/314964614/1573898945?refcode=em-11521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjkxMDM1Ny01MTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hrmyk-5M_JaSCdb0fwUT3JowLq9q2Qqs5xFbgu05TsU=)
_Me, my mom, and my brother Sam._
Mom's lessons are why I became a pastor to help folks struggling to get by. She's also why I became a teacher, football coach, and school principal to mentor kids who grew up like my brother and me.

**I've seen firsthand how working families are being left behind by extremists who would rather divide us than fight for education, economic relief, and health care access. Count my opponent Madison Cawthorn among the worst culprits.**

**[We can defeat Cawthorn, friend, but only with help from thousands of grassroots donors across the country. I'm humbly asking you to chip in $3 before midnight to flip NC-11 from red to blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38325459/314964615/1573898945?refcode=em-11521-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjkxMDM1Ny01MTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hrmyk-5M_JaSCdb0fwUT3JowLq9q2Qqs5xFbgu05TsU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38325460/314964616/1573898945?refcode=em-11521-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjkxMDM1Ny01MTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hrmyk-5M_JaSCdb0fwUT3JowLq9q2Qqs5xFbgu05TsU=)

A report from _Rolling Stone_ alleges that Paul not only met with organizers of the January 6 rally before the event -- **he promised them blanket pardons to encourage them to plan the protests.**

Representative Paul Gosar (R-AZ) is a danger to our democracy. Don't believe us? Just ask his family.

Rep. Gosar is so dangerous that his own family has spoken out _on multiple_ occasions against him. They made a video in support of his opponent in 2018 and his brothers went on _CNN_ to apologize for Paul's "despicable" response to the January 6 attack on our Capitol.

So why are his family members such outspoken critics? Let's take a look at some of what Representative Gosar has done:
* Peddled Trump's election fraud lies and voted to reject the results of the 2020 election,
* Called the violent white supremacist mob that attacked our Capitol "peaceful protestors,"
* Attended multiple events with a white-nationalist activist who described Gosar in Congress as "a reason for hope,"
* Promoted dangerous QAnon conspiracy theories.

And that's just to name a few.

Representative Paul Gosar is a danger to our democracy. We can't afford for him to remain in Congress any longer, that's why we're working to defeat Rep. Gosar next year and replace him with a leader who will defend our democracy.

name: Patty Murray
subject: Update on the fight for quality, affordable child care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Find out how your family could save money on child care.
#
Peter,
We’ve had a child care crisis in this country for a long time now. It was on my mind when I first ran for Senate -- and I’ve been working to get people in the other Washington to pay attention to this crucial issue for years. To this day, being able to find quality, affordable child care is still the thing I hear about most from parents, workers, and business owners living and working here in Washington state.
With more and more working parents in Congress -- and a pandemic that has only made the lack of child care options worse -- we are now finally on the cusp of getting this done.
And as the work continues on Capitol Hill to make Build Back Better a reality, I want to make sure you all know how exactly this will help you and your families -- and why I’ve been pushing so hard for so long to get this done.
**My child care bill was the basis for President Biden’s Build Back Better framework, and it will make a real difference in the lives of working families by:**
* **Lowering the costs of child care for families.** When eligibility ramps up, a family of four in Washington state who makes less than $254,000/year will pay no more than 7% of their income on child care. And families who make less than $150,000/year will save $164 a week. Many families will pay nothing at all.
* **Building up the supply of child care providers.** This will ensure families can get the support they need close to home.
* **Supporting increased wages for child care workers.** Right now, the low pay makes it hard for providers to find staff, which has led to severe shortages of child care options.
* **Establishing universal pre-k for 3 and 4 year olds.** Two extra years of public education will make a huge difference for kids, families, and our competitiveness as a country.

It’s simple: it shouldn’t be this expensive to raise a family in our country. And taking these steps to put money back in families’ pockets and rebuild our child care system is the kind of action we need to come back from this pandemic stronger and fairer. We are closer than ever to getting this done -- and I’m so grateful you’re with me in this fight.
Thank you,
Patty
** **

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Gazelka is Lying to You
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_is_lying_to_you&n=1)
---
November 5th, 2021
## Candidate Gazelka is Lying to You
This week, Republican gubernatorial candidates have squared off in a couple debates. And it's very interesting to see how the career politicians have distorted their records, trying to make you believe they are some sort of conservative champions. Leading the pack of fib tellers and liars is former Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka who went on the attack against our organization when asked why he wouldn't sign the Never Again Pledge. Gazelka alleged that the Fake End Powers Bill (SF4) he passed was another version of the Never Again Bill. So dishonest. **Remember, the three non-career politician candidates (Mike Marti, Mike Murphy & Dr. Neil Shah) have all signed the pledge. ** Scott Jensen also threw out a tale of his own when questioned about not signing the pledge - saying he carried a bill like the Never Again Bill in May of 2020 (not true). Jensen still won't sign the pledge. Rep Erik Mortensen and I cover all of this, and lies about taxes, omnibus bills and the 2nd Amendment, in this video. Please give it a watch. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6oiei52nUpL_6MSr3MiS1Qt1G2mrBSb6WU02LCgtGNDJTisR2JU6T6aFIkhyvLJb-rFLODqC81LNPpZfWjFBGbY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_is_lying_to_you&n=2) The results in Virginia on Tuesday suggest Tim Walz can be beat in 2022\. But nothing will change if just another weak-kneed RINO replaces him. Hopefully Minnesotans choose wisely. **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_is_lying_to_you&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_is_lying_to_you&n=3)
---

name: Team Maggie
subject: We need all hands on deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Republicans could "comfortably take back...the Senate in 2022" | | |
---
**"...[Tuesday's] results are consistent with a political environment in which Republicans would comfortably take back both the House and Senate in 2022."** Folks – if this week's election results indicate anything, it's that we're going to need all hands on deck to hold this seat and protect our vulnerable Senate majority. In 2016 Maggie Hassan won by only 1,017 votes. That's less than half a percentage point. And 2022 is shaping up to be even closer. News outlets and political experts across the country agree that Maggie is the most vulnerable Democratic Senator up for reelection – CNN recently reported that New Hampshire will be **_"the marquee Senate race of the 2022 election."_** **[Before we go any further, can Maggie count on your support to protect this critical seat and our slim Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38330446/314975822/-1803038125?refcode=e20211105_dontwait&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWZjNTc4Ny01NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RdvLZeHLQFTzgDv5nLfFpFrwWwuk6KMVLcs4dDSQaUM=)** | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38330448/314975823/-1803038125?refcode=e20211105_dontwait&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWZjNTc4Ny01NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RdvLZeHLQFTzgDv5nLfFpFrwWwuk6KMVLcs4dDSQaUM=)

Team — elections have a profound impact on climate change.

**Under the Trump administration, we saw massive rollbacks of environmental regulations in the name of climate change denial.** This Republican-manufactured culture war on climate change is _killing our planet_ and affecting everyday Americans.

The EPA conservatively estimates that **weakened emissions rules will lead to 850,000 tons of methane added to the atmosphere by 2030,** and that’s only one of the dozens of policy changes under the Trump administration.

President Biden’s Build Back Better plan will invest over $555 billion towards solving our climate change crisis — that’s a critical down-payment, but more action will be necessary in the years ahead. NextGen PAC is dedicated to building grassroots power to elect more progressive leaders and build a stronger majority in Congress committed to doing everything it takes to prevent global catastrophe.

[**_So team, will you join NextGen in the fight against climate change and help us crush our goal of 75 grassroots donations before November 22 by donating $10 or $25 today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38330562/314975874/-783913782?refcode=EM_FR_211105climate_C_TN_30DO_6_NG_TESTB_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZmZGViOS01NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9c4OA5Lh4ROTgqDHshs8NrJmI30Zu3gm4spxpxUzz5o=)

subject: Need $5 to help pay for stamps.
body:
A good old-fashioned campaign method: sending out postcards! |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38330732/314976058/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDk0ZTNmMS01NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eITGWxndq37LDrUUPsFEO4JOcsmRsSx_IuHecG0su_s=)
Friend,

Summer is over, but I'm still campaigning across the North State -- hosting events and talking to as many voters as I possibly can.

As much as I wish I could, I'll never be able to reach every single voter by myself, so we’ve been focusing on another old-fashioned (but very effective) campaign method: sending out postcards!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38330737/314976067/-209993060?refcode=em-11521-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDk0ZTNmMS01NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eITGWxndq37LDrUUPsFEO4JOcsmRsSx_IuHecG0su_s=) There’s nothing quite like getting a personalized note from a neighbor about why they’re standing with our campaign. And the great news is that our volunteers can be _very_ persuasive. The more of these we're able to send -- the better.

**We're gearing up to sign and send thousands of these postcards, but we need help funding postage costs. If you’re looking for a direct, tangible way to help us flip this seat -- this is it!**

subject: checking in, Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I know you're busy so I'll keep this email brief and to the point.
Hi, it's Steve Scalise.
I'm checking in to make sure you saw this important email from Newt Gingrich.
To say I'm worried would be an understatement. We House Republicans just missed a HUGE fundraising deadline to win back the Majority for President Trump.
_In fact, it's gotten even worse..._
**Nancy Pelosi just headlined a major fundraiser for her Democrats. It turned out to be their biggest fundraiser IN HISTORY. They raked in $5,000,000+ in a single night.**
Listen, I hate asking for money but unfortunately, we're out of options.
[**Can you help us out? Please?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58700596:67wlQB2Nd:m:1:3299561967:E649F0210A1790F7EED61AEF95D6A802:r)
_\-- Steve_

* * *
Hey Patriot -- this is Newt Gingrich. I know you're busy so I'll keep this email brief and to the point.
House Republicans just missed their most important deadline of the entire year.
**I 'm sounding the alarm. **This was the biggest test yet of our America first movement... and WE FAILED.
[**I 'm looking for a few more American heroes to step up before we COMPLETELY RUN OUT OF GAS.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58700596:67wlQB2Nd:m:1:3299561967:E649F0210A1790F7EED61AEF95D6A802:r)
Steve Scalise, Elise Stefanik, Kevin McCarthy, Nikki Haley, and Donald Trump Jr. have all reached out directly to you.
Why? Because our ENTIRE America first agenda is hanging in the balance...
Don't you want to help?
[**Again, we only need a few more American heroes to step up by tonight. This is your chance, Patriot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58700596:67wlQB2Nd:m:1:3299561967:E649F0210A1790F7EED61AEF95D6A802:r)
_\-- Newt Gingrich_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Red Wave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
A political shockwave occurred earlier this week in the Commonwealth of Virginia. Not only did Glenn Youngkin win.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470922?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Red Wave**_ A political shockwave occurred earlier this week in the Commonwealth of Virginia. Not only did Glenn Youngkin win to become Virginia’s first GOP governor in 10 years, the Republican Party had a clean sweep. That a solid conservative like Glenn Youngkin was able to win in a deep blue state like Virginia is a testament to a couple things. First, of course, Youngkin is a great candidate who ran a great campaign focused on issues people in his state cared about. But, also, it’s a complete repudiation of the failed policies of Democrats at the state and federal level. It’s hard to look at the results of this year’s elections and see any good news for Joe Biden and his handlers, Pelosi, Schumer, and the other Democrats in power in Washington. Heck, we came very close to having a Republican governor win in New Jersey! What happened earlier this week shows that Americans are tired of the division, leftist, failed policies of the Democrat Party and are poised to elect more and more common sense conservatives.

But it won’t happen automatically, and we can’t take any vote or any campaign for granted. The policies are on our side. The energy and enthusiasm is on our side. If we work together and work hard, like we’ve always done come election time, I know Indiana will do our part to keep the momentum going and make sure the Red Wave that is coming in 2022 includes the Hoosier State!

Thanks
Kyle

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer visits with members of the Indiana GOP team who volunteered to phone bank for Virginia gubernatorial nominee Glenn Youngkin. Hoosier volunteers made over 60,000 calls for Team Youngkin’s successful campaign._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
On Halloween, **Governor Holcomb **handed out candy to trick-or-treaters at the residence. Thank you to Albanese Candy and Zachary Confections for donating the candy to help make it a special night for Hoosier families.

**Governor Holcomb** announced that nearly $102 million in Community Crossings grants have been awarded to 218 community partners across the state. Through this program, we are able to help Hoosier communities complete vital infrastructure projects.

**Governor Holcomb** received his flu shot from Dr. Box. Getting your flu shot is a great way to protect yourself and others from the flu. For more information and to learn where you can get your shot, click here: [https://www.in.gov/health/erc/infectious-disease-epidemiology/diseases-and-conditions-resource-page/influenza/influenza-vaccination-information/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=00edbffca6&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb high-fiving a trick-or-treater. Gov. Holcomb awarding Community Crossings grants. Gov. Holcomb receiving his flu shot._
---
|
---
| _**Gov. Holcomb Responds to Biden Vaccine Mandate**_ Governor Holcomb offered the following statement in response to OSHA publishing the emergency temporary standard (ETS) which mandates companies with 100 employees or more require the COVID-19 vaccine or weekly testing: _**“I direct the Indiana Department of Labor to work with the Attorney General on a lawsuit challenging the federal government regarding the OSHA ETS. This is an overreach of the government’s role in serving and protecting Hoosiers. While I agree that the vaccine is the tool that will best protect against COVID-19, this federal government approach is unprecedented and will bring about harmful, unintended consequences in the supply chain and the workforce.”**_
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer Statement on Biden Mandate Overreach**_ Kyle Hupfer, who serves as Chairman of the Indiana Republican Party and General Counsel of the Republican National Committee issued this statement on the Biden Administration’s vaccine mandate guidelines for private businesses: _**“Joe Biden talked down vaccines during the campaign, promised to shut down the virus, and said vaccine mandates were not a policy he would pursue. Fast forward to today, and now he wants to put hard working Americans out of work if they refuse to take the vaccine. Make no mistake, I firmly believe the vaccines are safe, effective, and the best way to protect you and your families from COVID-19. However, the federal government has zero authority to force private business to impose this mandate on their employees. I applaud the RNC, Governor Holcomb, and other leaders throughout the country who are fighting this unlawful overreach.”**_
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Tera Klutz Announces Reelection**_ Auditor of State Tera Klutz announced her bid for reelection earlier this week. Successes under Auditor Klutz’s leadership include Indiana earning national recognition for improved government transparency, managing Indiana’s financial systems throughout the pandemic, and improved efficiencies and cost saving measures in the state’s bill paying process. The State of Indiana has maintained a Triple A credit rating from all rating agencies throughout Klutz’s term. Auditor Klutz has prioritized recruiting more CPAs onto the auditor’s team and continues to prioritize the safety and security of taxpayer funds.
_**“Hoosiers have seen the difference the first CPA to hold the auditor’s office has made. Tera Klutz is a great auditor for the State of Indiana and I’m thrilled she’s gearing up to run for another term. The Indiana Republican Party looks forward to supporting her efforts and helping her win another four years.” -Chairman Kyle Hupfer.**_
---
|
---
|
---
| _**NRCC Adds HD 1 to Target List**_ The Red Wave that started in Virginia and New Jersey earlier this week has expanded the map of possible Republican House picks. The NRCC is adding Indiana’s 1st Congressional District to their list of targets!

Read the NRCC's update here: [https://www.nrcc.org/2021/11/03/nrcc-expands-offensive-map-announces-13-new-targets/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0a85f598ff&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Big Win in Virginia**_ Virginia Republicans won big on Tuesday, led by Governor-elect Glenn Youngkin. This was an all-hands-on-deck effort and members of our Indiana GOP team volunteered to help Virginia Republicans get the vote out. We made over 60,000 calls to help get out the vote for Team Youngkin. The total victory in Virginia this week sets the stage for more Republican victories in 2022!
---
|
---

clean_body: A political shockwave occurred earlier this week in the Commonwealth of Virginia. Not only did Glenn Youngkin win.. | | | | | | | | Red Wave A political shockwave occurred earlier this week in the Commonwealth of Virginia. Not only did Glenn Youngkin win to become Virginia’s first GOP governor in 10 years, the Republican Party had a clean sweep. That a solid conservative like Glenn Youngkin was able to win in a deep blue state like Virginia is a testament to a couple things. First, of course, Youngkin is a great candidate who ran a great campaign focused on issues people in his state cared about. But, also, it’s a complete repudiation of the failed policies of Democrats at the state and federal level. It’s hard to look at the results of this year’s elections and see any good news for Joe Biden and his handlers, Pelosi, Schumer, and the other Democrats in power in Washington. Heck, we came very close to having a Republican governor win in New Jersey! What happened earlier this week shows that Americans are tired of the division, leftist, failed policies of the Democrat Party and are poised to elect more and more common sense conservatives. But it won’t happen automatically, and we can’t take any vote or any campaign for granted. The policies are on our side. The energy and enthusiasm is on our side. If we work together and work hard, like we’ve always done come election time, I know Indiana will do our part to keep the momentum going and make sure the Red Wave that is coming in 2022 includes the Hoosier State! Thanks Kyle Photo: Chairman Hupfer visits with members of the Indiana GOP team who volunteered to phone bank for Virginia gubernatorial nominee Glenn Youngkin. Hoosier volunteers made over 60,000 calls for Team Youngkin’s successful campaign. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | | Building One Indiana For All On Halloween, Governor Holcomb handed out candy to trick-or-treaters at the residence. Thank you to Albanese Candy and Zachary Confections for donating the candy to help make it a special night for Hoosier families. Governor Holcomb announced that nearly $102 million in Community Crossings grants have been awarded to 218 community partners across the state. Through this program, we are able to help Hoosier communities complete vital infrastructure projects. Governor Holcomb received his flu shot from Dr. Box. Getting your flu shot is a great way to protect yourself and others from the flu. For more information and to learn where you can get your shot, click here: Photos: Gov. Holcomb high-fiving a trick-or-treater. Gov. Holcomb awarding Community Crossings grants. Gov. Holcomb receiving his flu shot. | | Gov. Holcomb Responds to Biden Vaccine Mandate Governor Holcomb offered the following statement in response to OSHA publishing the emergency temporary standard (ETS) which mandates companies with 100 employees or more require the COVID-19 vaccine or weekly testing: “I direct the Indiana Department of Labor to work with the Attorney General on a lawsuit challenging the federal government regarding the OSHA ETS. This is an overreach of the government’s role in serving and protecting Hoosiers. While I agree that the vaccine is the tool that will best protect against COVID-19, this federal government approach is unprecedented and will bring about harmful, unintended consequences in the supply chain and the workforce.” | | Chairman Hupfer Statement on Biden Mandate Overreach Kyle Hupfer, who serves as Chairman of the Indiana Republican Party and General Counsel of the Republican National Committee issued this statement on the Biden Administration’s vaccine mandate guidelines for private businesses: “Joe Biden talked down vaccines during the campaign, promised to shut down the virus, and said vaccine mandates were not a policy he would pursue. Fast forward to today, and now he wants to put hard working Americans out of work if they refuse to take the vaccine. Make no mistake, I firmly believe the vaccines are safe, effective, and the best way to protect you and your families from COVID-19. However, the federal government has zero authority to force private business to impose this mandate on their employees. I applaud the RNC, Governor Holcomb, and other leaders throughout the country who are fighting this unlawful overreach.” | | | Tera Klutz Announces Reelection Auditor of State Tera Klutz announced her bid for reelection earlier this week. Successes under Auditor Klutz’s leadership include Indiana earning national recognition for improved government transparency, managing Indiana’s financial systems throughout the pandemic, and improved efficiencies and cost saving measures in the state’s bill paying process. The State of Indiana has maintained a Triple A credit rating from all rating agencies throughout Klutz’s term. Auditor Klutz has prioritized recruiting more CPAs onto the auditor’s team and continues to prioritize the safety and security of taxpayer funds. “Hoosiers have seen the difference the first CPA to hold the auditor’s office has made. Tera Klutz is a great auditor for the State of Indiana and I’m thrilled she’s gearing up to run for another term. The Indiana Republican Party looks forward to supporting her efforts and helping her win another four years.” -Chairman Kyle Hupfer. | | | NRCC Adds HD 1 to Target List The Red Wave that started in Virginia and New Jersey earlier this week has expanded the map of possible Republican House picks. The NRCC is adding Indiana’s 1st Congressional District to their list of targets! Read the NRCC's update here: | | Big Win in Virginia Virginia Republicans won big on Tuesday, led by Governor-elect Glenn Youngkin. This was an all-hands-on-deck effort and members of our Indiana GOP team volunteered to help Virginia Republicans get the vote out. We made over 60,000 calls to help get out the vote for Team Youngkin. The total victory in Virginia this week sets the stage for more Republican victories in 2022! | | Upcoming Republican Events : Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner : Fayette County GOP Chili & Soup Supper : IFCR Fall Dinner : Warrick County Lincoln Day Dinner | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Secretary of State Holli Sullivan Attorney General Todd Rokita Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved._

Hi team, This has been a big week for Massachusetts. Michelle Wu’s historic win makes her the first woman and first person of color to lead as mayor of Boston. This is a great sign of things to come, as Mayor-elect Wu is a climate advocate working for a Green New Deal and equitable transit for Boston, and a strong progressive leader for its diverse communities. Now, it’s time we sharpen our focus on our race for Massachusetts’ governor so we can lead with urgency and bring bold change to every corner of the Commonwealth. [**It’s crucial that we hear from everyone on this grassroots team about what matters most to you and your family. Team, please take a moment and share your priorities with us in our November Issues Survey:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38334824/314981678/-1292885432?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211105_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdiMjFhMi01YTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7xIX5XA9QMGyqdPtkhYbXebFJHy_Vy0pALJZ3lljZ0=&emci=3fbafdcd-433e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=117b21a2-5a3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496) | [SHARE YOUR PRIORITIES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38334825/314981679/-1292885432?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211105_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdiMjFhMi01YTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7xIX5XA9QMGyqdPtkhYbXebFJHy_Vy0pALJZ3lljZ0=&emci=3fbafdcd-433e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=117b21a2-5a3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23957496)

Let's keep the momentum going!

Meet me at Ki's tonight and support my campaign. We can do this if we all work together! Let's turn our district red and make our communities more safe, protect our children, and stop the crazy spending of our tax dollars!!

See you at Ki's Restaurant at 5p tonight (details below)

If you're not able to attend, please consider donating to my campaign so we can bring common sense back to WDC. Niki Conforti

name: Whitney
subject: not the email I was hoping to send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VfQYwPMJHNVqMh6bMBg2V7iMUaCLtL9SjIT-VoCntI0=/l7AG6U1ZqT1mfhAqWoTVaAHQB4-VLfDgs9gq4smnp1M=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211105-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Watching the election results roll in here in Virginia Tuesday night was humbling. Republicans won big, and now pundits are pontificating about what it means for races like ours in 2022.

**This is a wake-up call. 2022 is shaping up to be the biggest challenge we 've faced yet.**

Seven Republicans are already campaigning to unseat Abigail next year, and national Republicans and outside groups are ready to pour more money into our district to attack Abigail and distort her record.

Every day since being elected to Congress, Abigail has worked hard to protect health care, expand access to broadband, and cut prescription drug prices. **These issues impact people 's lives on a daily basis.**

We have reason to be hopeful, though, and it's because of supporters like you. We worked so hard to flip VA-07 in 2018 -- Abigail was the first Democrat to win here since 1968. And in 2020, it wasn't any easier. You've been by our side through the toughest challenges, and we've overcome them every time.

Tuesday night didn't turn out the way we hoped, but I know that together we can accomplish anything. [_**That 's why I hope you'll consider contributing to our campaign today. Every contribution shows that we are motivated and ready to do what it takes to win next year.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/VfQYwPMJHNVqMh6bMBg2V7iMUaCLtL9SjIT-VoCntI0=/l7AG6U1ZqT1mfhAqWoTVaAHQB4-VLfDgs9gq4smnp1M=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211105-1-EM&amount=25)

We are grateful to have you on our team,

Whitney

clean_body: | | Peter, Watching the election results roll in here in Virginia Tuesday night was humbling. Republicans won big, and now pundits are pontificating about what it means for races like ours in 2022. This is a wake-up call. 2022 is shaping up to be the biggest challenge we 've faced yet. Seven Republicans are already campaigning to unseat Abigail next year, and national Republicans and outside groups are ready to pour more money into our district to attack Abigail and distort her record. Every day since being elected to Congress, Abigail has worked hard to protect health care, expand access to broadband, and cut prescription drug prices. These issues impact people 's lives on a daily basis. We have reason to be hopeful, though, and it's because of supporters like you. We worked so hard to flip VA-07 in 2018 -- Abigail was the first Democrat to win here since 1968. And in 2020, it wasn't any easier. You've been by our side through the toughest challenges, and we've overcome them every time. Tuesday night didn't turn out the way we hoped, but I know that together we can accomplish anything. We are grateful to have you on our team, Whitney * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. subject: It’s been over 20 years since a Black man represented California in Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Quartey for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38335844/314986069/641313821?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.05_b1_qq_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2IyYTNhMC01ZTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MTkTS0EGYnU0yMoTyOjuvrX5Vg3K3zDIafugVV4vrDQ=)

Folks, “We have to make people imagine that Black people can win.” That was a headline for an article in the LA Times’ newsletter yesterday, along with the reminder that it “has been more than 20 years since a Black man represented California in Congress.” Although, today, Congress is the most racially and ethnically diverse it’s ever been, we certainly still have work to do to make it more proportionally representative of America. [**Help strengthen this campaign so people won’t need to just imagine, by chipping in $20 for 20 years, or whatever you can afford here. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38335845/314986070/641313821?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.05_b1_qq_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2IyYTNhMC01ZTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MTkTS0EGYnU0yMoTyOjuvrX5Vg3K3zDIafugVV4vrDQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38335846/314986071/641313821?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.05_b1_qq_all&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2IyYTNhMC01ZTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MTkTS0EGYnU0yMoTyOjuvrX5Vg3K3zDIafugVV4vrDQ=) As the son of an immigrant father from Ghana and a mother raised in the Jim Crow South, I am no stranger to adversity. Whether it was at school, on the football field, in the military, or in my community, I have been committed to welcoming others of diverse backgrounds. My lifelong dedication to inclusive public service didn’t stop with the Navy because servant leadership is about stepping up anywhere and everywhere with compassion. And that’s what I’m doing here in CA-25 -- stepping up. [**It’s time to remind the Washington establishment that Black voices deserve to be heard, but I need your help to make it happen. name: Mike Collier for Lt. Governor
subject: We need new leadership that values public schools and educators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
After election night, we’re hearing a lot of talk about the role public education will play in next year’s elections. |
#
---
Hello team — After election night, we’re hearing a lot of talk about the role public education will play in next year’s elections. But what many pundits are getting wrong is why educators, students, and parents are frustrated at this moment. The lack of support for educators and families during the pandemic laid bare the immense challenges facing our public schools here in Texas. **Dan Patrick failed to provide any meaningful solutions for our public school system when it mattered most.** Instead, he made it harder for schools to decide what health and safety measures to implement to protect their staff and students. And amidst this all, he continued to aggressively support the expansion of charter schools across our state, continuing his attacks on public education. Mike is committed to standing with our students and educators so they have the resources and funding they deserve. But that requires courage and political will that Dan Patrick simply does not have. **We need new leadership that values public schools and educators. Will you contribute $5 or any amount to defeat Dan Patrick and rebuild a strong public education system?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38335872/314986262/2022723758?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211105_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDRkMTRjNi01ZTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VdUa99RlqaywC2y_tC9wwxSxSgOCh4IrPsW9-bwjbpM=)

clean_body: After election night, we’re hearing a lot of talk about the role public education will play in next year’s elections. | Hello team — After election night, we’re hearing a lot of talk about the role public education will play in next year’s elections. But what many pundits are getting wrong is why educators, students, and parents are frustrated at this moment. The lack of support for educators and families during the pandemic laid bare the immense challenges facing our public schools here in Texas. Dan Patrick failed to provide any meaningful solutions for our public school system when it mattered most. Instead, he made it harder for schools to decide what health and safety measures to implement to protect their staff and students. And amidst this all, he continued to aggressively support the expansion of charter schools across our state, continuing his attacks on public education. Mike is committed to standing with our students and educators so they have the resources and funding they deserve. But that requires courage and political will that Dan Patrick simply does not have. We need new leadership that values public schools and educators. Will you contribute $5 or any amount to defeat Dan Patrick and rebuild a strong public education system? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being with us. Together, we will fight to ensure every Texan has the opportunity to get a good high-quality, public education. Mike Collier for Lt. Governor The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

**Now that the Bolsheviks have been defeated in Virginia, it's time for punishment. **

These Commies want to end Western Civilization as we know it -- and they will if we don't show strength. Newly elected Republicans must exact a toll for the bad behavior we've seen from those Communists in Richmond and Northern Virginia.

**Lawless regulations must be removed, and the perpetrators of the violation of any regulations must be brought to justice.**

[**HELP TEAM BELL - DONATE TODAY**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=afbc2cf417&e=af4b86f5c6)

Keep in mind, these Communists won't just stop now that they've lost.

**They want a push a culture of strife, violence, chaos and sadness for 99% of people while the 1% political class lives high on the hog.**

Their idea for America is completely opposite of Western Civilization as we know it.

**That's what's on the ballot in 2022.**

**If the Bolsheviks plan to destroy Western Civilization, they'll have to walk over my cold, dead body to do it. ** [_**Chip in today and help my team during this perilous time in American history**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=9d0670c72a&e=af4b86f5c6).

name: John Kasich
subject: Can this model work for others?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
The real question here is if this strategy can be successfully duplicated by other Republicans? [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=035b9dc9b06f47929164e77b4ca2ec99&_e=1Zx7ScE8VihpuvbGjjgwGins4yl6ESXcjCQ3-OovFsWyTPnBiXVN6iwJ75tAiBWrfKb93J12mf_M8oKnCfaHcTogYVS7gbSLIlhVvKe34qHPdBOclG39OJLQDy4Hdtleb_-K7YWyQ39LW35SLpv16urLarin5ju3BiCsru3mlQU-EIciRgU2GwXqzJQsr9vSr_zfTyDlm70B7ylNqw4O4pLXVwUBO9irxIwRP9R31z-HACDnluEd_6M5bPtEP9tiu10E3N8pq60ry1Z-N6PpEA%3D%3D) Peter - you may have been paying attention to the elections this past Tuesday. One of the big ones was the race for Governor of Virginia. The Republican candidate won, but he did so largely without Donald Trump. There are some important takeaways from that election that could have implications for Republicans as we look ahead to the 2022 Primary and General Elections. The real question here is if this strategy can be successfully duplicated by other Republicans? **Please take a moment to watch my recent interview about this topic:** [You can watch it here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=035b9dc9b06f47929164e77b4ca2ec99&_e=1Zx7ScE8VihpuvbGjjgwGu3NBKKkNmtZc1Ov8yLWy-HySHyFlqwu3KgdOvGpl-VwZwYgMW9iFP8hwZrn6mwrjYs0QpIPOi04CZ9tlqsA2dFscCpy5RwHxc7e69XugfgkdqLQSkHveSx3EgmmJim_O6NFxvAkrQ_g438-dR_kMkK8OYeYYRYkTFwAYrjjGXzJwse_6owg4mUdR2pUBRjPxdRmYZYzmqkGbY1SGZcfY6VW5fNF2QH3wjKr3RdmcUhLtWhP5TPWPzXHCGb1ttdYF2fyejAhUZTKm5WB4ODdAP7OPYExBW9Jw4inN9LI87XQ). I've long been saying that Trump's influence is diminishing the farther we get from his presidency. Moderate Republicans voted for Biden in 2020 because they couldn't stand Trump's behavior, but in this election, they came home and supported the Republican candidate who did everything he could to keep Trump out of the race. **When I say that our efforts are working, this is exactly what I mean**. Firing up your political base is important, but so is attracting the moderate voters who want to vote Republican but couldn't - and still can't - stomach Donald Trump. I'm out there every day raising awareness about these issues and doing what I can to make a positive impact - to restore sanity to Washington - and to support Republicans who are focused on helping people, not on tearing us apart. [But I need your help to keep up the fight](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=035b9dc9b06f47929164e77b4ca2ec99&_e=1Zx7ScE8VihpuvbGjjgwGjadcYqJeHk-scAQMGD2uel4vBpYb-BzwHbOSCFIjTJkV77GT1LrKIpLSjhkTEErIQlK3WzfpJEx1-fMBm0ZkDREYegpr2TDztNFn03wLBS6cXWM_-p9rYy6AGw2RH1ecpvb0HcaVH6LFq2iVVWWvXPjcRbTeumH6wIWJT_Fc05JHnxqzvsb_fTWamKxVWwiQOFPD_i3_EfS27rxM-bEIsnop-3ilMyjcEf_f_UYYIzNTQa6sdcEDAfivB9PFksLEA%3D%3D). The funds we raise go directly into our advocacy efforts and I'm reaching out to [ask you to consider making a donation right now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=035b9dc9b06f47929164e77b4ca2ec99&_e=1Zx7ScE8VihpuvbGjjgwGjadcYqJeHk-scAQMGD2uel4vBpYb-BzwHbOSCFIjTJkjOAXHz8JAkkwkWQXP685vCSta0gOI8mzFSWi85t5GLt-3otSvRJhJ9mPq2IA0Y6qs9KomDULJ1e8tAeD7L_kZOnsrKMz3tzfpMr7f8oDwzWvuyPO5DTdKcjQRNohQAu2aAa666zyysagYAEi6behbfYOXtN87TWCy_DngYkMJvpUG5uDulcrhR6k3E7tMGrGSnj1XWoHG4gt6jFZujz7SQ%3D%3D) to help. I'm counting on you. [Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=035b9dc9b06f47929164e77b4ca2ec99&_e=1Zx7ScE8VihpuvbGjjgwGjadcYqJeHk-scAQMGD2uel4vBpYb-BzwHbOSCFIjTJklQqc9er-rsbBX5dAYy9yNWPlGyazBS6s0FcVyB5e4m0P92vXLEcQf5RjHQnFW_UOQgjyJYdxbTagfG8J9rLFIL397Q94igxmgnBDWslHElRc99fLcl_ZTFhV15b0O3Vh3AfzPbWkKPHTLOYBc0PajTD-9eDqMMGHqzGwCXSSVLtWawjiDvTXJwv5jqQdvBSdwZ5-ktlnPh-3MnDHBrFAJQ%3D%3D) I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country and get our government working again for all of us. Thank you! -John Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
candidate or candidate's committee.
www.JohnKasich.com
[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnkasich.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_s=035b9dc9b06f47929164e77b4ca2ec99&_t=jzWInJ1uNMhHbk8V_TLjEtkD_FRNOxQ-W2nls4VqYL9xZWOsrkZJUmbwG4mXl565nai-MoB9gmStGN5XMksdpe933uvvlDo9wkjJrQGkOIo9L85_DwBJ-KAyo1vjf3go6dpNa9qYMD1wvYEn4yYLfWztCx760xATkKtiZytx5cI%3D)

body:
# [#]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nov21-gbp-contest?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nov21-gbp-contest?amount=10]
Packers fan? Then you’re in luck! We are giving away a ticket on December 12th to see the Chicago Bears lose to the Green Bay Packers at Lambeau Field! Tom wants to go with one of his top supporters — so please enter the contest now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nov21-gbp-contest?amount=10]

The Packers aren't just a sports team — they're also a part of Wisconsin's rich progressive tradition. They are the only American professional sports team that is owned by the community, not billionaires. This community model ensures that the Packers never leave Green Bay, even if there's a lot of money to be made elsewhere. They truly embody the Wisconsin spirit.

So what better way to celebrate the Green Bay Packers than to join Tom at a Green Bay Packers game!JOIN TOM AT THE PACKERS GAME! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nov21-gbp-contest?amount=10]

We hope you’ll join Tom in cheering on our state team!

From one cheesehead to another,

Everyone at Nelson HQ
NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by November 30, 2021. You may enter by contributing to Tom Nelson for U.S. Senate or without contributing by submitting your name here. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: One ticket to the Packers vs. Bears game on December 12, 2021 to attend with Tom Nelson in Green Bay, Wisconsin. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. All prizes will be awarded. This promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 United States, the District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico and are at least 18 years of age (or an older age of majority under applicable law). name: Ryan Sonntag
subject: Re: 🚨 Sound the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
We have an update since yesterday, and this is an emergency. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame]Hi friends,
Yesterday, Eric emailed you about Florida Democrats' dwindling advantage in voter registration.
Today, Governor DeSantis announced from right here in Pinellas County that there are officially more Republicans than Democrats registered to vote in the state of Florida.
This is an emergency, and we need your help to fund voter registration efforts and win important races. Please, will you click here to make a contribution RIGHT NOW and help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame]
Thanks,
Ryan Sonntag
Team Lynn
Begin forwarded message:
Dear friends,
It’s time to sound the alarm. Republicans in Florida have outpaced Democrats in voter registration, and this is absolutely the top threat to our success across the state.
I’m proud to support Florida Ground Game, an organization exclusively dedicated to registering more Democrats in Florida.
Their expert team has selected targeted regions that will have the biggest impact in Congressional and state legislative races, not to mention our statewide efforts to elect a Democratic governor and cabinet. Pinellas County is one of their top targets, and I hope you’ll join me in supporting their efforts.
Please, my friend, will you donate today to help register Democratic voters? Your contribution will be split evenly between Florida Ground Game and our campaign.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. This contribution will be split evenly between Eric Lynn for Congress and Florida Ground Game.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame]In 2012, Florida had 500,000 more Democrats than Republicans, but right now, we only have a 24,000 voter advantage.
Republicans closed that gap through consistent work over the course of a decade, and if we don’t act now, they WILL overtake our registration numbers. We cannot let that happen, and that’s why we need to make strong investments in voter registration efforts right now.
Please, click here to support Florida Ground Game through a split donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame]
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

name: Charlie Crist
subject: I will not accept Joseph Ladapo as Florida’s surgeon general
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Sign my petition calling on Gov. DeSantis to withdraw Ladapo’s nomination |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38338104/314995597/328633952?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA3NDUxYS02NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISixDgXzzZDxj-YGO7TDHh9OO0y17UjXoxkGToTqdFI=&emci=df6e7dfb-a53d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7007451a-673e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)
---

Friend,

From day one, Gov. Ron DeSantis has been soft on COVID-19, and now he’s taken it a step further by appointing a surgeon general who shares his _disregard for the health and safety of Floridians._
* Surgeon General nominee Joseph Ladapo has _lied about_ the effectiveness of vaccines, _refused_ to confirm he's vaccinated, and even _spread misinformation_ about breakthrough infections.

* He’s also issued an emergency order permitting parents to decide if their _COVID-positive_ child could attend school or not.

**[Ladapo has shown himself truly unfit to hold this high office at a time when Florida needs medically sound leadership:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38338105/314995598/328633952?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA3NDUxYS02NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISixDgXzzZDxj-YGO7TDHh9OO0y17UjXoxkGToTqdFI=&emci=df6e7dfb-a53d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7007451a-673e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)**
[Sign my petition: Gov. DeSantis must withdraw Ladapo’s nomination](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38338106/314995599/328633952?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA3NDUxYS02NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISixDgXzzZDxj-YGO7TDHh9OO0y17UjXoxkGToTqdFI=&emci=df6e7dfb-a53d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7007451a-673e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)
---
* According to Newsweek, Ladapo also “appeared in a COVID-19 conspiracy video” that claimed (A) the flu was more lethal than COVID-19 and (B) masks were ineffective against the virus.

* Finally, he _refused_ to wear a mask when meeting with a state senator recently diagnosed with breast cancer.

By nominating Ladapo, Gov. DeSantis has done our state a serious disservice.

**I will not accept this abject failure of leadership from our governor, and I will not accept Joseph Ladapo as Florida’s surgeon general.**

Our children and our families deserve so much better. I’m running for governor to bring Floridians together for the common good. Our children deserve safe schools, and we need to do what’s necessary to put this pandemic behind us and get our economy in post-pandemic shape.

**[Join me in calling on Gov. DeSantis to withdraw Ladapo’s nomination for surgeon general. Please add your name to my urgent petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38338107/314995600/328633952?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA3NDUxYS02NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISixDgXzzZDxj-YGO7TDHh9OO0y17UjXoxkGToTqdFI=&emci=df6e7dfb-a53d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7007451a-673e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=8807089)**

\-- Charlie Crist

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38338108/314995601/601477077?refcode=20211105_p_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDA3NDUxYS02NzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISixDgXzzZDxj-YGO7TDHh9OO0y17UjXoxkGToTqdFI=)

Team BTE,

We hope that November is off to a great start for you. The holiday season is just beginning, and that means that the 2022 midterm elections are right around the corner!

At the start of every month after our end-of-month deadline, we dig into our fundraising numbers so that we can budget and set goals. And yet again, we find ourselves constantly humbled by every single generous contribution that you’ve given to our movement.

With the grassroots donations that you’ve kindly chipped in, our candidates and staffers have received resources, training, and financial support that they wouldn’t normally have access to. With each individual we provide our services to, we’re one step closer to creating a government that works for ALL.

Every dollar matters because every seat matters. And every seat matters because every voice in that seat’s community matters. And it builds and grows from there. Small actions have powerful ripple effects that go a long way, one step at a time — that’s how we will achieve long-lasting, meaningful change in this country.

**It takes all of us, so thank you for being with us every step of the way.**

**_Barrier To Entry PAC_**

clean_body: Every dollar matters because every seat matters. | | | = = Team BTE, We hope that November is off to a great start for you. The holiday season is just beginning, and that means that the 2022 midterm elections are right around the corner! At the start of every month after our end-of-month deadline, we dig into our fundraising numbers so that we can budget and set goals. And yet again, we find ourselves constantly humbled by every single generous contribution that you’ve given to our movement. With the grassroots donations that you’ve kindly chipped in, our candidates and staffers have received resources, training, and financial support that they wouldn’t normally have access to. With each individual we provide our services to, we’re one step closer to creating a government that works for ALL. Every dollar matters because every seat matters. And every seat matters because every voice in that seat’s community matters. And it builds and grows from there. Small actions have powerful ripple effects that go a long way, one step at a time — that’s how we will achieve long-lasting, meaningful change in this country. It takes all of us, so thank you for being with us every step of the way. name: Mayor John Cranley
subject: It’ll take more than a new paint job to fix what’s wrong with the Brent Spence Bridge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
It’s time to update Ohio’s infrastructure from Cincinnati to Cleveland and everywhere in between. | **_Ohio earned a “C-” on our 2021 infrastructure report card from the American Society of Civil Engineers. That’s why repairing and replacing Ohio’s failing infrastructure is a key part of our plan for Ohio’s comeback. _** **_[Sign on now to say you support making infrastructure upgrades a priority for our state’s future>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38338326/314996872/-63420790?refcode=ea.40698679-683e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.40698679-683e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDY5ODY3OS02ODNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qM7N67M1viySdvqrvLTowSGtR-2295rTw2ff3oxjsCw=&emci=6cb33417-603e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=40698679-683e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)_** Folks — If you’ve ever had to drive down to Kentucky from Cincinnati, you probably have some thoughts about the Brent Spence Bridge. At nearly 60 years old, the Brent Spence is still one of the busiest bridges in the United States, and its age is starting to show. Literal chunks of concrete have fallen from the bridge in the last decade — _more than once._ When it was built back in the ’60s, the bridge was designed to carry about 80,000 vehicles a day. Flash forward 58 years, and estimates suggest that the Brent Spence is carrying _twice_ that number every single day. **It has one of the highest crash rates for interstate highway bridges in the country.** _The Brent Spence is actually classified as “functionally obsolete” because it’s not up to current standards._ Multiple bridge lanes have been closed since March to repaint the Brent Spence — it’s only started to reopen fully in the last few days — **but the fact is, it’s going to take more than a paint job to bring it up to par.** **Two presidents have tried and failed to fix this bridge, friend. They just can’t get it done from Washington.** And it’s not just the Brent Spence Bridge. Infrastructure across Ohio is crumbling — bridges, roads, sidewalks, water systems, you name it. It’s so bad that the American Society of Civil Engineers gave us a **C-** on our 2021 infrastructure report card. _Ohio’s hardworking families deserve better._ We deserve to drive on functional roads and bridges. We deserve drinkable water and reliable sewer systems. Our communities _need_ a 21st century upgrade. **So as governor, I’ll prioritize repairing and replacing Ohio’s failing infrastructure — including the Brent Spence Bridge — from right here on the ground, and we’ll do whatever it takes to bring that C- grade back up where it belongs.** **_[With pragmatism and real leadership, our state can tackle the hardest jobs and write the comeback story our communities deserve. clean_body: It’s time to update Ohio’s infrastructure from Cincinnati to Cleveland and everywhere in between. | Ohio earned a “C-” on our 2021 infrastructure report card from the American Society of Civil Engineers. That’s why repairing and replacing Ohio’s failing infrastructure is a key part of our plan for Ohio’s comeback. Folks — If you’ve ever had to drive down to Kentucky from Cincinnati, you probably have some thoughts about the Brent Spence Bridge. At nearly 60 years old, the Brent Spence is still one of the busiest bridges in the United States, and its age is starting to show. Literal chunks of concrete have fallen from the bridge in the last decade — more than once. When it was built back in the ’60s, the bridge was designed to carry about 80,000 vehicles a day. Flash forward 58 years, and estimates suggest that the Brent Spence is carrying twice that number every single day. It has one of the highest crash rates for interstate highway bridges in the country. The Brent Spence is actually classified as “functionally obsolete” because it’s not up to current standards. Multiple bridge lanes have been closed since March to repaint the Brent Spence — it’s only started to reopen fully in the last few days — but the fact is, it’s going to take more than a paint job to bring it up to par. Two presidents have tried and failed to fix this bridge, friend. They just can’t get it done from Washington. And it’s not just the Brent Spence Bridge. Infrastructure across Ohio is crumbling — bridges, roads, sidewalks, water systems, you name it. It’s so bad that the American Society of Civil Engineers gave us a C- on our 2021 infrastructure report card. Ohio’s hardworking families deserve better. We deserve to drive on functional roads and bridges. We deserve drinkable water and reliable sewer systems. Our communities need a 21st century upgrade. So as governor, I’ll prioritize repairing and replacing Ohio’s failing infrastructure — including the Brent Spence Bridge — from right here on the ground, and we’ll do whatever it takes to bring that C- grade back up where it belongs. Let's do this, John = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: You need to see this to believe it
body:
As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Cri
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmsemut6ub8qeg916hk26mi0uiba9tc1c37cs798_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chj6eo34cdh2bs)
---
Fellow American, As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Critical Race Theory” agenda of the radical Left. But hear me on this: I can tell you, from firsthand experience, that there is _GREAT_ reason for optimism! **Turning Point USA recently launched our Exposing Critical Racism Tour** , a no-holds-barred effort to fight back against the racist Left on college campuses. And so far, it has been one of our most successful tours _EVER_ _!_
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuc2ev6u82fks0fgc1ipnvv6ebuaisvcgclt61q0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chj6eo34cdh2bs)
---
But with four dates remaining (and the potential for more to be added!), I want to ask for your help to make the most of this tremendous live event. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more today to help us continue promoting the Exposing Critical Racism Tour, executing these live events to their fullest potential, and supporting these students to ensure that our presence has a lasting impact on their campuses?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5g1vm618s76fv9ijf7nq7nrjou8cr8qadd9jktg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chj6eo34cdh2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi6ge1gd95umc21nj89g966jrffsbvggth2q10sg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chj6eo34cdh2bs)
---
I’m including a few photos of some recent events in this email, because you really need to see the enthusiasm among these young patriots to believe it. _**_THOUSANDS_**_**of college students have come out to these events -- even on some of the most Left-wing college campuses in America. We even drew a sizable crowd in Burlington, VT a few days ago!** And these students aren’t just coming to be entertained. They’re being equipped with the facts, the arguments, and the encouragement they’ll need to stand up to their college administrations and professors, and to take on the racist ideology of the radical Left wherever they encounter it. Because, as I’ve said many times, _if America doesn't kill Critical Race Theory, Critical Race Theory will kill America._
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zii0a4h9ota2c1874dm6ks6o1deedtm7vgfb7p8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chj6eo34cdh2bs)
---
That’s why we're going right into the belly of the beast by visiting college campuses with the _TRUTH_. [**Will you help us continue this vitally important tour with your generous gift right now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zccfajcl95694etchruebnplvjqt1untsv028v4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chj6eo34cdh2bs) Your gift will enable us to fund the travel expenses for my team. It will cover the cost of the promotional work that will bring students in the door. It will help provide transportation for students to off-campus venues when we're not allowed to meet on campus due to draconian COVID restrictions (a challenge we have dealt with a few times already). **And it will help fund TPUSA chapters on these campuses and many others, so that conservative students in hostile environments can sustain their camaraderie and support for one another long after the event is over.** Many conservatives have written off places like the University of Vermont or the University of Oregon. They say they're too far gone... too steeped in radical Leftism. And that's _PRECISELY_ why we're going there on this tour. For many students, this event may be the only exposure they get on their college campus to the truth about Critical Race Theory. Already, we're seeing just what’s possible when we carry the truth into those dark places. Students’ eyes are being opened. They’re finding their courage. They're fighting back against the poison of Critical Race Theory, socialism, and Marxism and standing up for our pro-America values in some of the most hostile environments in America.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq027lkdc5bbc6gkh57mb69013p5epqdij72vsfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chj6eo34cdh2bs)
---
[**Will you help us reach even more of them with your much-needed gift today? Please click here to pitch in your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or whatever you can possibly afford.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjmsnssdhjuh0bhf2uhlm43olguqgus1u5ej6c8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chj6eo34cdh2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi5qmvkpopj8b1ovf0m3d0lvbqqer8nmp6j9s440_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chj6eo34cdh2bs)
---
Thank you for standing with the next generation! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

---

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

| Dear Patriot, I have a major update for you today. Anthony Fauci went before my Senate committee yesterday morning -- and lied yet again. I thought that perhaps after his own agency, the NIH, admitted to funding gain-of-function research at the Wuhan Institute of Virology, Fauci would find it in himself to tell the truth. But he chose to lie yet again. Does this man realize that the American people have turned against him? No amount of glowing media coverage, or Netflix puff documentaries, can ever prevent Fauci from being judged by history for his actions during this pandemic. I'm tired of watching our representatives bankrolled by corporations that pay their workers so little that parents have to choose between healthcare and childcare. I'm running for Congress to bring the Fight for 15 from the picket lines of Chicago to the halls of Capitol Hill. clean_body: No one should choose between healthcare & childcare | | | team, Last week I joined fast food workers on strike calling out Mcdonald's and their culture of sexual harassment, and demanding a living wage. I'm tired of watching our representatives bankrolled by corporations that pay their workers so little that parents have to choose between healthcare and childcare. I'm running for Congress to bring the Fight for 15 from the picket lines of Chicago to the halls of Capitol Hill. We're going to make more noise than any corporate politicians or their lobbyists can ignore and bring a living wage to every working person in this country. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $15/hr is the floor—not the ceiling. I stood in solidarity with workers on that day and every day, until a living wage IS the minimum wage. We demanded it in Chicago, and I'm going to demand it in Congress. Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

body:
It’s no longer just about COVID
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Duxv4rl54Zz_2c5pyfendcicrUBmg9NNYBsaGX5Cv9xOMgtFHjGmVE4XytdJCNEwuuShaTFdkDJNIZag-iYsM4L7-_GSu8a_7csrDi6FILWVwAUl5fQV3IqPr96GLhqSyTy8x2szUDTu6Ed3a7qvjb2VudpjsYO3&c=I365CGydV2gxDEAmOC-KwvMSqz6R1aoyjEzmm5IVNwBoLu11zEE0aQ==&ch=abAJtxIhjPEk1Q20cN5bhWL7G1fM96WeN9nAg9KKfIXIDNnywIZ0Sg==)

---

# A power grab beyond the pale
---
We own ourselves. Sovereignty over our own bodies is the most fundamental of our inalienable rights. If the right of bodily integrity is not honored, all our other rights are jeopardized. Sadly--or infuriatingly--Michael Bennet will continue to blindly follow the inept Biden administration and the radical Left's attempts to infringe on that right. Their push to mandate the COVID-19 vaccine through threats to private businesses is an alarming step towards fascism and tyranny. Don't expect them to stop willingly. An overweening government that believes it knows better than its citizens will always seek new forms of control over our lives; methods like these can be deployed to dismantle every aspect of our freedoms. This naked exercise of unjust power is corrosive to the human spirit, and it sets a dangerous precedent. If you are ready to stand for individual rights and resist government intrusion into personal decisions, then we must stand together now. If you're ready to reject these travesties, these blatant infringements upon our unalienable rights, let's do so together with courage, strength, honor, and steady resolve. Can I count on your support? We cannot abdicate our responsibility to defend the rights of humankind by allowing our government to gain compliance through the use of force. The unconstitutional, coercive power of administrative agencies is a clear and present danger to freedom, depriving people of their livelihoods and making a life conceived in liberty impossible. At this crossroads, our path forward will be determined by the caliber of public servants placed into the halls of power by voters like you. I pledge to continuously hold myself to account in view of our founding values and the best interests of We the People. I need your support today to bring my call of duty to the Capitol.
---

| |

I’ve spent the last decade creating coalitions of leaders to get things done for the people of Ohio. Now, it’s time to get to work in Washington.

Onward,

Shontel Brown

As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

With a potential primary and another general election so soon, the Republicans know I’m vulnerable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = I’ve spent the last decade creating coalitions of leaders to get things done for the people of Ohio. Now, it’s time to get to work in Washington. Onward, Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Hoosier Republican,

* Parents are FED UP with being told they don’t have a right to influence what’s being taught in their kids’ classrooms.
