name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Pelosi worked hard to elect Cuellar in 2020, but is working harder to get him to vote with Democrats in 2021
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In 2020, Nancy Pelosi flew to South Texas to campaign for anti-choice
corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar. Cuellar voted with Trump 70% of the
time, yet Nancy Pelosi still endorsed him over Justice Democrat Jessica
Cisneros.

Yesterday, Cuellar continued to serve his corporate donors by obstructing
the Build Back Better Act — our best shot at paid family leave, expanding
the child tax credit, climate action, childcare and free preschool.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81997?refcode=em20211105-20337&t=1001&akid=20337%2E1203867%2E9hA1Qi ]Tweet from reporter Jake Sherman reads Rep. Cuellar says there are
enough moderate votes to sink BBB tonight or a rule to allow for the floor
debate on BBB.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81997?refcode=em20211105-20337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=20337%2E1203867%2E9hA1Qi ]Jessica Cisneros is running again to defeat Henry Cuellar, but she’s
going up against powerful forces in the Democratic party. Will you split a
$3 donation to Jessica’s campaign and Justice Democrats so
we can fight back and elect someone who will actually represent the people
in Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81997?refcode=em20211105-20337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20337%2E1203867%2E9hA1Qi ]Contribute

Pelosi can only afford to lose three Democrats if she wants to pass the
Build Back Better Act, and with the obstruction of Cuellar, Gottheimer,
and other centrist Democrats — the future of Build Back Better, climate
action, paid leave, universal pre-K, and more is still uncertain.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81997?refcode=em20211105-20337&t=1022&akid=20337%2E1203867%2E9hA1Qi ]Tweet from reporter Garrett Haake reads Lottttts of whipping going on
on the floor right now. Pelosi & Cuellar had a very animated chat. Now
Clyburn & Cuellar...

Pelosi worked hard to elect Cuellar in 2020. That is unacceptable. If
Jessica Cisneros had been elected, she wouldn’t be choosing Big Oil and
Wall Street over the interests of the people — and she wouldn’t be one of
the only Democrats standing in the way of progressive policies.

We have another shot to defeat corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar, and have
Jessica Cisneros join AOC, Cori Bush, and Bernie in Congress. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81997?refcode=em20211105-20337&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20337%2E1203867%2E9hA1Qi ]Will you
split a $3 contribution between Jessica Cisneros and
Justice Democrats to help her take on the establishment and beat Cuellar?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=20337%2E1203867%2E9hA1Qi ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=20337%2E1203867%2E9hA1Qi ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211105-20337-footer&t=1026&refcode2=20337_1203867_9hA1Qi&akid=20337%2E1203867%2E9hA1Qi

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=20337%2E1203867%2E9hA1Qi

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Nothing but higher taxes, unnecessary regulation, a prioritization of felons' rights over ours, and weakened individual freedoms. This destructive one-party rule is clearly a threat that we need Sheriff Joe Lombardo to keep us safe from... and yet another reason why we need to take Nevada back! == | == | Since keeping us safe is something that Joe has always done, we can count on him to do so in a number of ways as our next Governor. He'll STOP any push for tax increases, FIGHT BACK against skyrocketing unemployment, and unnecessary regulation, STAND with our police, and make OUR rights the priority! So if that's a vision you can get behind, contribute to the Keep Nevada Safe mission below - let's back Joe and end the single-party rule in our state! | | | == | | | == | Thank you for the support, Team Joe Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Could you make a $3 contribution to help execute our path to victory today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey folks — it's Vanessa, Malcolm’s campaign manager, here.
With just about one year between us and the 2022 midterm elections, the team and I put together an internal memo this morning to outline our path to victory over the next 12 months.
Here are the big takeaways:
* Malcolm’s inspiring story of growing up a gay, Black, working-class American will resonate with voters across Pennsylvania, and he is strongly positioned to win this race

* Winning this race will require us to organize and build our grassroots coalition across all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties

* Executing our plan will be expensive, and contributions from small-dollar donors will be critical in funding Malcolm’s path to victory

There’s a lot more information below, so I hope you’ll continue reading. But before you do, I have to ask:
[Could you make a $3 contribution to help execute our path to victory today? It’s going to take all of us playing our part to elect Malcolm to be a champion for working folks in the U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38339971/315004210/-360183459?refcode2=109471fc-6f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211105-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDk0NzFmYy02ZjNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eyqTqsxNtYh_Dhm9w1nfKfqUrD5gxx9gthbG9qpNd6Q=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38339972/315004211/-360183459?refcode2=109471fc-6f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211105-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDk0NzFmYy02ZjNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eyqTqsxNtYh_Dhm9w1nfKfqUrD5gxx9gthbG9qpNd6Q=)**
In solidarity,
Vanessa

* * *

November 5, 2021
Malcolm Kenyatta’s Path
To: Team Malcolm Supporters
From: Vanessa Clifford, Campaign Manager
The 2022 Pennsylvania U.S. Senate race will play a key role in dictating national party control. With Joe Biden outperforming Hillary Clinton’s performance in 2016 and defeating Donald Trump in 2020 and Senator Pat Toomey only just winning his past two Senate races by 2 points and not seeking reelection in 2022, Pennsylvania Democrats are well-positioned to take this seat next year.
Looking at the crowded Democratic primary field, the enthusiasm is high. But as more candidates jump into the race, they face a long and complicated path to the nomination. Malcolm Kenyatta is strongly positioned in the primary. Here’s why:
* His unique and inspiring story positions him well to be the candidate who can run on a message that we need to fundamentally change who represents us in the Senate.
* Unlike other candidates in the race, Malcolm was an early supporter of President Biden, and he most aligns with Biden on issues and ideology that are broadly popular and that contrasts him with the other candidates.
* Malcolm is the one candidate in the race that can reassemble and energize the Biden coalition that won the state for Democrats in 2020.
* Population changes in the state and the fundamentals of the electorate in both the primary and the general favor a candidate from Southeastern Pennsylvania.
* Malcolm’s message and lived experience will resonate in both suburban and urban areas of the state.

**Kenyatta is the Biden Democrat in the Race.** Biden remains popular with Democratic primary voters in Pennsylvania. Kenyatta is the one candidate in the race who most aligns with Biden on both issues and ideology. He was an early endorser unlike other candidates in this race, endorsing the day Biden announced. And he is in the best position to replicate the winning Biden coalition consisting of black voters, suburban voters, progressives, community organizations, labor unions, and moderates.
**Kenyatta is also getting attention from the western side of the state.** Mayor Chardaé Jones of Braddock, PA endorsed Kenyatta, admiring and relating to his background coming from a “poor, working-class family.” Kenyatta has also received a number of endorsements from western PA mayors and state legislators. He is connecting and resonating with people from all corners of the state, uniting rural and urban Pennsylvania.
**Kenyatta has a story that appeals to other important primary demographics: Younger voters and LGBTQ voters.** Malcolm Kenyatta is fighting to break down barriers in Pennsylvania. In his first run for state representative in 2018, despite fierce resistance and homophobic attacks, Kenyatta emerged out of a crowded Democratic primary field to represent Northern Philadelphia. He became not only one of the youngest State Representatives in Pennsylvania but also the first openly gay person of color. This would be a breakthrough in Pennsylvania – the state has not nominated a gay person or a person of color to be a U.S. Senator. Kenyatta’s lived experience — in addition to his progressive agenda centered on economic, racial, and environmental justice — has the potential to excite many demographics, but especially younger voters and LGBTQ voters.
**Kenyatta is running the most grassroots campaign — and people are responding.** Malcolm Kenyatta has endorsements from counties all across the Commonwealth. He counts endorsements from the Mayor of Braddock, City Councilors from Philadelphia, and State Representatives from Allegheny County. As Kenyatta travels the Commonwealth, his list of endorsements grows, and voters are responding to his message. He is the only candidate to have already shown he can put together a winning coalition of voters from across the Commonwealth and his supporters are proof.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38339973/315004212/-360183459?refcode2=109471fc-6f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211105-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDk0NzFmYy02ZjNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eyqTqsxNtYh_Dhm9w1nfKfqUrD5gxx9gthbG9qpNd6Q=)**

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0c9471fc-6f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/109471fc-6f3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDk0NzFmYy02ZjNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eyqTqsxNtYh_Dhm9w1nfKfqUrD5gxx9gthbG9qpNd6Q=&id=120380453) to unsubscribe. By submitting your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic campaign updates from Malcolm PAC. Msg & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info, STOP to stop receiving messages.

Peter,

I’m writing today because I want to show you – in his truest form – the man I’m running against for Congress.

Peter DeFazio, the failed Chairman of the House Transportation Committee, refers to a fellow congressman, Brian Mast, a veteran who lost both legs in an IED explosion in Afghanistan as a **“F***ing A*****e”** simply because Rep. Mast attempted to introduce several amendments to a piece of legislation that my opponent didn’t agree with.

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=ebfddb02edb54d3dad2c03e13cd00f89&_e=SljP75a08nG-HlI_hR7-OnlBAk272FpiTxcoV1k8Ad2X1iOgSWFP7QPBE_OQob0OhhU-PmkKaLXLLa4Rgn6qZ_Sh06KNi8igPQUikBmZrNCnouKTxS8BTm6fiSIdi8aJF7ng8oik5Yz7R4iAP3Y4q2EhXHz8QgBfrVILHX5GUlZpxhMafMLdFUtN_O0O9gz_HKTeZrY7GYtcDH9-vdB-ZlWUSmJ3lRxuWKosKodZmcDII3xM3RPDpN9FIYrPrsQffM4TYjxyXK8YUsJPXiGs47nS71MMuWyk7NWdj3peAVfBByMagQRPnuujP2jQcVW3wTA5kk9TZFI5NwRMCtB-jqyDyNdPXuUnpy4FxqbnoH64EJh_r5xvItcBdPU2voYs3poK4sgp7DHsgXhKzOUCDshTbl_BHy-U5Z6u4jiJNbGDLv50ZDcpptvdSQxhC9V-lz98ZWpphWS8myKn0NNIEw%3D%3D)

So much for bipartisanship, eh?

I can tell you this: if I’m elected to Congress, whether I agree with an opponent or not, I’m certainly never going to be caught on a hot mic calling them derogatory names.

Sadly, Mr. Defazio’s treatment of a combat veteran wounded in the line of duty is emblematic of how Democrat’s feel not only about our veteran community, but Republicans in general.

**Tuesday night’s victory proved to everyone in America that Republicans have every chance to win back the House next November.**

**In fact, one prominent political prognosticator predicts that if Republicans were to outperform our 2020 numbers at the same level that we did in Virginia, we’d pick up more than 51 house seats. It’s time to retire this veteran-hating career politician.**

Thanks to the radical Left, our security is at stake. Just because Nevada doesn’t sit at the border doesn’t mean we are immu
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z85vkp0bi5gci7rlph7g0r060oaaglamo6u33ito_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4crlcqqb5d346mpn3clj6lrb2c30ecrmas5lejjm9d5mc4ob4sr5m2r34olks1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6cc5n6mo6fcjkcoq61cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphm8ob0cdgm0oh5u)
| |
---
|
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8elogcikilimtgrofphdr954p0dirme12vs2380_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm0or1c1h2bs)
|
---
Friend,

Las Vegas is a sanctuary city. Our southern border is a war zone. Drugs are pouring into our communities.

Thanks to the radical Left, our security is at stake. Just because Nevada doesn’t sit at the border doesn’t mean we are immune from the devastating effects of illegal immigration.

And here in Nevada, they can vote. Illegal immigrants can get driver’s licenses, and all you need to vote in Nevada is a license. It’s disturbing.

**We need a strong conservative Governor to clamp down on illegal immigration. Will you chip in to Dean’s campaign to make it happen?**

**As Governor, I will do everything in my power to combat the negative effects of illegal immigration on Nevadans. **

If you are concerned about how the radical Left is refusing to address the crisis at the border, I need your support.

Things have been tough here in my home state of Nevada.

Under the current liberal leadership, Nevadans have faced endless lockdowns, business closures, and rising crime rates.

We have a Democrat governor more interested in locking us out of work than putting us back to work.

Las Vegas has become a sanctuary city.

People who work for a living are scared.

I’ve seen a lot in my time, but current leadership brings it to a new level.

We can’t go on like this. It's time Nevada had a conservative governor with a lick of common sense.

I’m running for governor because Nevada deserves a whole lot better than Democrat Steve Sisolak.
[**DONATE TO DEAN**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm46jntqg58vaj6a1a0vd5ijpat6lesjsksfpf60_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm0or1c1h2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfbqakfbb62drjq8p66o7cs3jcr2e7jdbr0jr3q8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm0or1c1h2bs)
[**DEAN HELLER FOR NEVADA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8bvomqvkbh6fi15bum1qm5btn02fb5ed86jnqc0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm0or1c1h2bs)
I was raised here in Carson City, Nevada. That’s where I got my Western values. I had a dream to graduate from the University of Southern California, and in 1985 I did just that.

Then I spent some time in the business world when I felt called to serve.

I’ve had the distinct honor of serving my fellow Nevadans in the Assembly, as Secretary of State, and eventually in Congress on both the House and Senate sides.

I thought I was done with politics.

But the last few years have been devastating for my statesmen.

Toxic liberal leadership has led to endless shutdowns, business closures, and upticks in crime.

I know that Nevada needs measured conservative leadership.

And I’m up for the challenge.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zduh33nhhvnn0kd29n4nbonc1lmin520qmb0r8po_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm0or1c1h2bs)
**I love the constitution. That’s why I will always defend your right to keep and bear arms. You know with me, you’ll get a fighter for the Second Amendment. **

That’s just one of the many reasons I’m running for Governor.

Now that you know where I’m coming from, do you think you could bet on my campaign in the race to FIRE SISOLAK?

The Democrats won’t let go of Nevada easily. And I’ll need every conservative who wants to see a change to step up and chip in if we’re going to win.
[**CHIP IN $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfmesqrk0s7uknn03i0k8iiohotvtt1gq699d3pg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm0or1c1h2bs)
Thanks to Democrat leadership and their weak stance against the Defund The Police movement, crime rates in our cities is skyrocketing.

Violent crime in Las Vegas this year alone is higher than the national average.

How can our families thrive when our streets are not safe?

I am 100% committed to fully funding and supporting our law enforcement.

Our police deserve the respect and resources they need to keep our communities secure.

I’m honored to have the support and endorsement of the Nevada Police Union.

I know when police can do their job, they can keep us safe.
[**DONATE TO REPUBLICAN DEAN HELLER**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlv0ck6porca7mvsfinodrmvrl9baprt8lo6lfu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm0or1c1h2bs)
This race means everything to me and the future of Nevada.

With your help, we can bring common-sense conservative leadership back to the Silver State.

Thanks for your time,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5mib5b4c4iibimlcmes6s0jegeoihmnt39g8rb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm0or1c1h2bs)
Dean
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z09ts883a30u12kvs8ik739ofcjc1vb9ofa4f998_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm0or1c1h2bs)
---
| Text Pit Crew to 775-234-0070

|
---
| Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
| 18124 Wedge Pkwy #1044, Reno, NV 89511 |

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2znhhgaovt0p73qlonm64tn881jnhvh31fdfpjs20).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zulkr3mkh8698ghbfenh9cu2dt1n8o1jo5mfk338_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdi62o33c5g649fg)

name: Dustin Rhodes, Campaign Manager
subject: REMINDER: Come shoot with Tiffany Shedd in Gilbert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friends, There is still time to RSVP for our shooting event in support of Tiffany Shedd’s campaign for Attorney General next Tuesday, November 9th. We are expecting to have an exciting assortment of fairly unusual firearms for attendees to shoot including:
* A Barrett 50 BMG rifle provided by Medford Knife and Tool
* Two Israeli firearms; an UZI SBR and a Tavor X95 Rifle (current IDF issue)
* A Bruger and Thormet (B&T) APC9K, which is the U.S. Army's replacement for the venerable H&K MP5

**Gilbert Gun Club Event** [_Invitation Here_](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=d5774aa33f614f63aaef06b970f01b01&_e=A7Fr3m_mSAv-_ywllaCPnW3W918Z0OfY_xEKo94Ww4Mb7fHQv7cBdi6dCfouPEpsfFONI4PRB8lzHqJ5CYizXt_y2EGLaRKBm-lgmAXBLb5aIZINrBA_bxuIGPAauCE8YxEd2Q4_8ceHlGFjCe3Q-GXdKT5-ssEMKCLR_o4ZBrSd4BeAq1u1lUKMeX8DXnneUQFP9InznJUhwZ0zYjUD1MBlSS38SZ4Xs8U5heQ7tjJl_w_v_hS-aUZHBTikyVO3Sv7fmPVVF0DWK5PjRzELDqVZWTT4Mx11M2PNJbykCyQsjqAK-SgwjFItmBnKIINgS2xFFH8CdJ6OnJVtMy2n18FdmaM-uei5SE-GuKUxJ2w%3D) Tuesday, November 9th 5:00 P.M. - 8:00 P.M. You can also [RSVP online right now by clicking here.](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=d5774aa33f614f63aaef06b970f01b01&_e=wMLNvNBrnikezbOXJQJr4uxhWJcOlAwVMIagmr6UewsQWK_ytrmB7OXAhzP9qR3NS5qsf9b0qJBMaUyv6Y1sDlmxQRaw4kUwuPjvJJre8JNn063UeCvvvlU4u-cGiYpCXMJMk6OL5IJWHCJmiC6U7f0BevFKcndN-gfT7rnJT1jJcrgVPhOMm3aI3wv1OddvRV_P4tYMdsWCpHH6TogfCR3rOEcZESQsxEcuEChVNpEqrKlCUOtBd274ACi5qG-MlsiKWatrqg1VN-KOhVgvSQ%3D%3D) We hope to see you next Tuesday. name: Alisha Shelton
subject: Waiting to hear from you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want to hear from you about the issues that matter the most to you, your families, and your communities.

| _Thank you for signing up to receive email updates from Alisha’s campaign! To make sure you don’t miss a single update, please add[ _info@alishashelton.com_](mailto:info@alishashelton.com) to your address book._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38340510/315008505/1120240658?refcode=blu-asc-wel-sur-web&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2Q2MjZmOC03MjNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hm0BERRn40zwFQfsZ1KVXoak9HBkRcq5NBft5H_VXcg=)

| Peter,

Since launching my campaign, I’ve seen firsthand that Nebraskans are energized and ready for a Representative who will remember her roots and fight for the people of Nebraska — and that’s exactly what I’m prepared to do.

That’s why I want to hear from you about the issues that matter the most to you, your families, and your communities. [_**Will you take a few minutes to fill out my survey and share your priorities?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38340513/315008507/1375915483?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2Q2MjZmOC03MjNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hm0BERRn40zwFQfsZ1KVXoak9HBkRcq5NBft5H_VXcg=&emci=65b270c0-511a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=93d626f8-723e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12219043)

Friend,
**Do you still stand with President Trump?** If you do, join him by endorsing my campaign! Like President Trump, I am not a DC insider, and will always put the hard-working people of Wyoming first. I believe in the America First Agenda because it is the Wyoming First Agenda. My deep roots in Wyoming are only rivaled by my family’s future in Wyoming. When Wyoming prospers, my family prospers, and when Wyoming suffers my family suffers. This is personal. I have no interest in having someone who is incapable of understanding these realities represent me or MY state. If you are ready to put America First again, join me today. clean_body: | | | | Friend, Do you still stand with President Trump? If you do, join him by endorsing my campaign! Like President Trump, I am not a DC insider, and will always put the hard-working people of Wyoming first. I believe in the America First Agenda because it is the Wyoming First Agenda. My deep roots in Wyoming are only rivaled by my family’s future in Wyoming. When Wyoming prospers, my family prospers, and when Wyoming suffers my family suffers. This is personal. I have no interest in having someone who is incapable of understanding these realities represent me or MY state. If you are ready to put America First again, join me today. Liz Cheney is being funded by wealthy DC elites and Liberal Never-Trump haters. 94% of Liz Cheney’s donations are coming from outside of Wyoming. My campaign is by the people, for the people. If we want to take our Congressional Seat back, I need your help today. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: American Update
subject: Let's change course before it’s too late
body:
I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8068%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Qn3Z17azqNJQwuxNbzxrhg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17807%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ymif0pP4s6zL1rVG3ObfsA&sysid=1)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical--same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked “facts” to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation’s history--a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen--echoing what she learned in school. And when she’s challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as **invalid** , **hateful** , and even **racist**. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I’m not surprised--I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation’s history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of “oppression” and “injustice” but an **exceptional nation worth defending**. This young lady is an **_informed citizen_**. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. **I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership? ** You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the State of American Education **using this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/informed-citizen-survey/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17808%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=npl1%2f7oYmuaULnHdrWVUzQ&sysid=1) This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it’s too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the “state of knowledge” in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. ** The goal of this new campaign we’re leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” either deliberately deceived or who just didn’t receive about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government. ** That’s because we’re seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
| |

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I'm asking for your input.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
Don't let me down.
[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJyNUcFuqzAQ__4bSbE4eRn6IR-tg_9t9rRHTOi934cZqJUPn473_dPm3LdgOLjvIk7YUZQFIlCVBmZQdakEQxEgCIXUmeZcd5kpON6W1WmgRjtRvZvfLBDtadWsVFceIEO8DJSH7Ecj_EG_D5BTeQcnluXnJjh9v9PLnUqOeXVFN8-z2nHTrBL8ad_l4T39Di_ovmzrG_g)

Friend,

The Fake News Media, working in close conjunction with Big Tech and their partners, the Democrats, to SILENCE you.

_**Remember when they took FREE SPEECH away from the 45th President of the United States?**_ I do.

body:
Our opportunity to make a difference in this race doesn’t start in January -- it starts right now.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38341546/315014171/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGIwOTU5Yi03NjNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nqksNQ-ah8CvvrXZMS19G5np4OVXmPrkHrbNc1C8-IE=)

Peter,

There are some bright spots for Democrats coming out of Tuesday’s elections but the reality is that we came up short.

That’s why I’m asking you for $7 today to help us win in Maryland. To be blunt, I don’t want to wake up on November 9, 2022 wishing we could’ve invested more to elect Tom. **We set an emergency $12,000 goal to jumpstart our November fundraising, and our deadline is Sunday at midnight. Will you please chip in?**

You can use this link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/em-emergency-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38341547/315014172/67334922?refcode=bpi_em_20211105_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGIwOTU5Yi03NjNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nqksNQ-ah8CvvrXZMS19G5np4OVXmPrkHrbNc1C8-IE=)**

I know $7 may not seem like it makes a difference in big state-wide races like this, but campaigns like Tom’s -- and like Terry’s, and Phil’s -- need grassroots donations to keep ads on the air, run polls to refine our strategy, and get organizers talking to voters in every corner of the state. **When we come up even $7 short of our goals, it means tough decisions about where to make detrimental budget cuts.**

I’ve experienced enough wins and losses to know that early investment wins races. Our opportunity to make a difference doesn’t start in January -- it starts right now.

**That’s why I’m asking you to double down on this fight and rush $7 to our campaign today.** There is absolutely no room for error for our race here in Maryland after what we saw on Tuesday, Peter.

body:
If this law is overturned, that means more guns in more public places -- not just in New York.
#

Friends,
The Supreme Court is hearing the biggest gun safety case in more than a decade.
**Here’s what’s at stake:** The NRA is pushing to overturn a New York concealed carry law. If the Supreme Court overturns the law, that means more guns in more public places — and not just in New York.
**Here’s what you can do to help us keep up the fight:**

❌ Massive price increases

❌ _**"Woke” Leftist culture**_

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701780:JC721B2iN:m:1:3298722022:8BE051A5796042FC17345C2E4F42AC04:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: James, Campaign Manager
subject: Wesley's New Op-Ed on Biden's Assault on our Energy Industry!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Did you read Wesley's recent Op-Ed in the Washington Examiner about President Biden's assault on our Energy Industry? If you haven't read it yet, you can find it [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=6184435a4dba4112a533b99b16a3d6f2&_e=urespd_JJ5PKRtdles7GtEiXMAFWZ3EBtLHNdv0DfoxEZesVgwdsME0qLkAjc_hFsgXChjXSXgmruEYzGu_YuWvM0TOTy8Ah5hzmXlZV-aNGYwimsghset_C7CO4XwlZWF4H7qPMmDQo8ylTIehjJMkK60vsAObocxNZbqzI2HN8vG8529N2ilNczgFkJXtlaFVeYbMuQ_LcUa36y2_NQodrAdibQd2vStMiYYUw_HSyXFFirBMtDiOri1GCA5KvnBI3L6tMYI-l8zB4VYtYDWeJg3QRKYCbrToETF_LaOpjMkdexYngB5rIWH_2aksYq_bx0b46sx4a8OmXXIfM1M-14o0ZtiRZviGtkLzDdzCT_6TRifWk9gvBDOYr4oCmT_7oXJchiEgyiymNOnS0dA%3D%3D) or read it below!

Sincerely,
James

**Biden's Assault on the Energy Industry**
November 05, 2021, by Wesley Hunt

During the 2020 presidential election, the Democrats, candidate Joe Biden, and the media tried to sell voters on a centrist Biden presidency. When Republicans pushed back, pointing to Biden’s pledge to end domestic oil and gas production and his promise to overturn the Hyde Amendment, we were called liars. We were told that President Donald Trump, who had garnered more votes than any other sitting president in history and whom I supported, was an extremist, while Biden was a shining beacon of American virtue.
The people are now feeling the disastrous effects of the radical policies President Joe Biden and the Democrats have executed. Hyperinflation is ravaging our country, our supply chain is broken, prices of household goods have shot up, and many are suffering.
Democrats are continuing to try to push through a $3.5 trillion tax and spending package that would increase taxes on millions of middle-class people and devastate small businesses. As part of their plan, they have a big bull's-eye focused on the Texas oil and gas industry, looking for ways to destroy the industry with fines, outrageous taxes, and burdensome regulations.
Biden and his leftist congressional allies are out to get the oil and gas industry. On Biden’s very first day in office, he signed an executive order that revoked the Keystone XL pipeline’s permit, canceling the entire project. With the stroke of a pen, 10,400 jobs were lost across our country with zero regard to the lives and families of these employees. A few days later, Biden terminated public land lease sales, resulting in a potential loss of up to 300,000 jobs by 2025.
While Biden claims to care about the environment, he bowed to President Vladimir Putin when Russia decided to create a pipeline of its own. Waiving economic sanctions against Russia has been instrumental in weakening our country’s dominance on the world stage. Biden’s weakness on foreign policy also has sunk U.S.-China relations to an all-time low. China is on record illegally purchasing more than 553,000 barrels per day from Iran, keeping Iran’s economy afloat and its aspirations of a nuclear weapon possible despite U.S. economic sanctions.
Biden’s incompetence both on the domestic and world stage displays negligence toward middle-class workers and a lack of respect for our allies across the globe. The fiasco that occurred in Afghanistan is just another example of Biden’s foreign policy failures. All this after only nine months in office. Every day, I wonder what Biden will do next to damage our economy and embarrass us with our allies. It seems to be never-ending.
I am running for Congress in Texas’s 38th Congressional District,** ** encompassing the Energy Corridor — home to many of the world’s energy companies. Every day, I hear from those across the political and socioeconomic spectrum who are worried about Biden's attempts to destroy the oil and gas industry. From executives to entry-level employees, the brilliant men and women who work in our energy sector are frightened by the shortsighted agenda that is being deliberated by this administration. These hardworking individuals are in fear of losing their jobs, but beyond that, they know we don’t have to choose between environmental progress and energy security.
While the costs of groceries, food, gas, and other household expenses have increased drastically due to Washington Democrats’ failed economic policies, they now want to pass a massive, multitrillion-dollar tax and spending spree. Biden wants to add more debt to our country than we had during World War II, accounting for inflation. This unprecedented level of spending is ludicrous. At this rate, I fear the consequences of this massive spending bill will not only affect my children but my grandchildren and their children as well.
Hidden in this socialist bill is yet another tax specifically aimed at the oil and gas industry.
As Democrats mock empty grocery store shelves as “high-class problems,” everyday people are suffering from price increases that haven’t been experienced in decades. If Biden, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, and Majority Leader Chuck Schumer get their way and pass their $3.5 trillion spending spree, Houston will suffer a devastating blow, companies will close, and thousands will lose their jobs.
This is why I am running for Congress. Houstonians and Americans are suffering. They need someone who will fight for them, they are ready for change, and they know that time is running out.
_Wesley Hunt is running to represent Texas's 38th Congressional District in the U.S. House of Representatives._

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=6184435a4dba4112a533b99b16a3d6f2&_t=YDAtWEfuqKUN8bnbeVjgQW0nYIix9acDvgDF2Jcfbrtn8-a4A4Cnilf4eM61HJGv2HsDG8GGWL3eHVTFCMPIiB_4ynO6-SVQsy3BStLZ9Q03NqK0AglF_H3bhB42bqXYweVGvJ8tNGrbaJ3Synk2lbONIk02c3f27GJgjzJI64o%3D).

| | Friend, We know how dedicated and determined you are to protecting the freedom to vote. We also know you’re not here just for yourself but for your community and eligible Americans across the country. In a year full of blatant attacks on our democracy and a new variant of the coronavirus, you have worked tirelessly to help put a stop to anti-voter politicians and Big Lie conspiracy theorists. **THANK YOU. ** Progress takes immense effort and often happens slowly. That’s why it’s vital that every volunteer, donor, and supporter remembers that**with your work, we have already made and continue to make important strides in the fight to protect the freedom to vote and create a better future for Georgians—and Americans all over the U.S.** This month, we want to reflect on your achievements and show gratitude to those who have helped make this progress possible. **Join us on[Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38342251/315016882/-438117422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU2ZjFkMC03OTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y7Ee-17nL6cklQ3X7GWtxlnUrA7UPeZfvAdlkR54BNM=&emci=ba349eef-733e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2d56f1d0-793e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1037277), [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38342252/315016883/1928873018?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU2ZjFkMC03OTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y7Ee-17nL6cklQ3X7GWtxlnUrA7UPeZfvAdlkR54BNM=&emci=ba349eef-733e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2d56f1d0-793e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1037277), and [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38342253/315016884/-865552193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU2ZjFkMC03OTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y7Ee-17nL6cklQ3X7GWtxlnUrA7UPeZfvAdlkR54BNM=&emci=ba349eef-733e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2d56f1d0-793e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1037277), or follow the hashtag #WithYourWork. ** **There is still much more to be done, but in order to sustain this work, we must celebrate our victories along the way.** And we’d love to hear from you! Email us at [info@fairfightaction.com](mailto:info@fairfightaction.com) with the subject “With Your Work” to share examples of successes you’d like to lift up. As always, thank you for your passion and perseverance. Thank you for continuing to do the work. — Team Fair Fight |

clean_body: The fight is not over, but let’s look at how far we’ve come Fair Fight | | | Friend, We know how dedicated and determined you are to protecting the freedom to vote. We also know you’re not here just for yourself but for your community and eligible Americans across the country. In a year full of blatant attacks on our democracy and a new variant of the coronavirus, you have worked tirelessly to help put a stop to anti-voter politicians and Big Lie conspiracy theorists. THANK YOU. Progress takes immense effort and often happens slowly. That’s why it’s vital that every volunteer, donor, and supporter remembers thatwith your work, we have already made and continue to make important strides in the fight to protect the freedom to vote and create a better future for Georgians—and Americans all over the U.S. This month, we want to reflect on your achievements and show gratitude to those who have helped make this progress possible. Join us on, , and , or follow the hashtag #WithYourWork. There is still much more to be done, but in order to sustain this work, we must celebrate our victories along the way. And we’d love to hear from you! Email us at mailto:info@fairfightaction.com with the subject “With Your Work” to share examples of successes you’d like to lift up. As always, thank you for your passion and perseverance. Thank you for continuing to do the work. — Team Fair Fight | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight PAC - All rights reserved. name: Nikki Fried
subject: Fighting for Florida
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

When I announced my run for governor in June, I told you I was doing this because it’s time for something new in Florida.

Yes, I’m running against America’s most dangerous governor, Ron DeSantis. He’s a threat to Floridians, a threat to our future, and a threat to our country with his Presidential ambitions.

But I’ve always said this race is about more than Ron DeSantis. We’re building a movement to break a rigged system that has perpetuated inequality, ignored our environmental challenges, and put politics before people.

If you agree, click here to chip in now to help us break the system and fight for Florida. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=115win]

This is our strategy because it’s what Florida needs. After more than 20 years of GOP governors, we need a leader who will fight for our public schools, small businesses, working families, and environment.

I’ve been bold as Commissioner of Agriculture, kicking the NRA out of gun permitting, legalizing hemp, protecting voting rights, and taking dozens of actions to protect our environment.
As Governor, I’ll continue to be bold in my fight for you.

This is also our strategy because it’s how we win. We can’t just run against dangerous leaders like Ron DeSantis and Donald Trump. Instead, we need a clear vision that reaches voters--
Democrats, NPAs, and even some Republicans--from the Panhandle to Key West.

I’m asking for your support today because I’m more confident than ever that we can win this race by offering something new to Floridians. If you’re behind our vision and plan to win, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=115win]

Thanks for standing with us. Have a wonderful weekend.

Warmly,

Nikki

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-21?refcode=1105win]

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

subject: Joe Biden did what?!
body:
Will you comply? | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=372234b250&e=ae0ea222da)
---
|
Friend,

Yesterday, Joe Biden and his administration deployed the next two steps that two different _UNCONSTITUTIONAL_ vaccine mandates will be put into effect.
Over 100,000,000 workers will be affected.
Any business with over 100 or more employees must have their employees fully vaccinated or be fined. While our country is having supply chain shortages, the highest inflation we have seen, and an already disrupted workforce, Biden and his Democrat allies believe this will be the solution to our problems.

The U.S. Chamber of Commerce, The National Retail Federation, and the Retail Industry Leaders Association, all agree that the implementation and the fines will only HURT business.

We want to know what you think, Friend.
**Do you think businesses should comply with Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandate?**
---

[NO! ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=7c534cba93&e=ae0ea222da)

| | **\- November 5, 2021 ****-** **\- Did you see INDems in the news? -** Indiana Democrats' work is starting to pay off. Our effort to meet Hoosiers where they are and promote how President Joe Biden and Democrats' American Rescue Plan and Build Back Better agenda is creating a better future for Hoosier families _and _getting attention from others. That's because thanks to the [Rescue Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343004/315019832/2075701864?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc3ZDkzYS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GyJY5U0KJL_mr_4jsjdAQqh05egwNYhCktKG99YYuE=&emci=f709ad53-763e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d077d93a-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535), Hoosiers are seeing transformational investments in their communities. This includes fully-funding Indiana's public schools, investing [$250 million for broadband expansion,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343006/315019834/-2111566667?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc3ZDkzYS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GyJY5U0KJL_mr_4jsjdAQqh05egwNYhCktKG99YYuE=&emci=f709ad53-763e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d077d93a-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) providing [$540 million to solve the state's childcare crisis](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343007/315019836/62110823?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc3ZDkzYS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GyJY5U0KJL_mr_4jsjdAQqh05egwNYhCktKG99YYuE=&emci=f709ad53-763e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d077d93a-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535), supplying $500 million for Governor Eric Holcomb's [READI program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343009/315019837/-781903993?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc3ZDkzYS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GyJY5U0KJL_mr_4jsjdAQqh05egwNYhCktKG99YYuE=&emci=f709ad53-763e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d077d93a-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535), and delivering economic relief in all 92 counties. Democrats have delivered this for Hoosier families -- and we're on another tour! The Democrats' "[Small Town, Indiana](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343014/315019842/1276187964?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc3ZDkzYS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GyJY5U0KJL_mr_4jsjdAQqh05egwNYhCktKG99YYuE=&emci=f709ad53-763e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d077d93a-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535)" tour is going on now with leaders like Deputy Chair for Rural Communities Kent Yeager, Dr. Jennifer McCormick, State Senators Shelli Yoder and Fady Qaddoura, and educators like Melania Wright and AFT's Sally Sloan showing how Democrats are solving the issues that matter most to Hoosier families, like agriculture and public education, regardless of Zip code. Indiana Democrats' next stop is November 9th in Jasper and Wheatfield. Combined with the American Rescue Plan. American Jobs Plan, Redistricting, and "Small Town" tours, the Indiana Democratic Party will have visited 55 out of 92 counties across the state in just a few months. Our goal is to meet Hoosiers where they are and celebrate how we are solving today's most-pressing problems facing families. We'll continue this effort through the 2022 election year. We hope you'll join us! **\- INGOP Kyle Hupfer calls Holcomb's READI Program "Socialism" -** The Indiana Republican Party has become so obsessed with branding the Democrats' agenda as "socialism" that they've now turned on one of their own: Governor Eric Holcomb. INGOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer this week described Governor Holcomb's READI program as "socialism" when he attacked the American Rescue Plan. Hupfer also called issues like broadband internet, childcare, and Indiana's public schools as "socialism" too. This line of attack by the Republicans not only demonstrates how extreme their partisanship has become, but they're also condemning the very issues they talk about with Hoosiers across Indiana. This is further evidence Indiana Republicans do nothing but provide Hoosiers lip service on a string of promises that they will continue to vote against, including broadband, childcare, and liveable wage jobs. They'll vote no but sure take the dough! In contrast, Indiana Democrats are working overtime to deliver better opportunities for Hoosier families. Thanks to President Joe Biden's American Rescue Plan, Democrats secured more than $250 million in broadband internet expansion, provided $540 million for childcare service providers, and fully-funded the state's public school systems for the first time in over a decade. Indiana Democrats want a better future for Hoosiers and their families, and that means delivering on the issues that matter most. We'll continue to inform Hoosiers about these issues. **\- Opportunities -** **\- Annual Holiday Party -**
[**Get Your Tickets Here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343015/315019845/-710561404?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc3ZDkzYS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GyJY5U0KJL_mr_4jsjdAQqh05egwNYhCktKG99YYuE=) **\- Federal Election Commission Upcoming Trainings -** The Commission will host several training events this fall to help political committees understand and comply with the federal campaign finance regulations. Our [Virtual Conference](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343016/315019846/-1174116220?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc3ZDkzYS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GyJY5U0KJL_mr_4jsjdAQqh05egwNYhCktKG99YYuE=&emci=f709ad53-763e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d077d93a-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) on November 16 - 17 will offer two days of in-depth training in an online, interactive format. The conference, led by FEC Commissioners and staff will feature group sessions and breakout workshops tailored to meet the needs of campaigns, party committees, and corporate/labor/trade PACs. Please visit their [Trainings page](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343017/315019847/-762270721?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc3ZDkzYS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GyJY5U0KJL_mr_4jsjdAQqh05egwNYhCktKG99YYuE=&emci=f709ad53-763e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d077d93a-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) to see a complete list of upcoming workshops. While you're there, sign up to be notified when registration opens for upcoming programs, such as their December 8 Nonconnected PAC webinar. If you have any questions, please call 800-424-9530 (option 6) or email them at conferences@fec.gov. **\- Spring Interns 2022 -** **** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
____________________________________________________________________________________ Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit paperwork to the Party and their school.

____________________________________________________________________________________ Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

____________________________________________________________________________________ Qualifications Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

_____________________________________________________________________ Start/End Dates and Schedule Applicants for the Spring 2022 internship are now being accepted until December 15, 2021. We are not currently accepting applications for Summer 2022. Spring Interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible.
_____________________________________________________________________ How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. _**-Save the date-**_ For events, check out our mobilize page **_[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343018/315019848/-1021999857?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDc3ZDkzYS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GyJY5U0KJL_mr_4jsjdAQqh05egwNYhCktKG99YYuE=&emci=f709ad53-763e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d077d93a-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535)_**. |

Indiana Democrats' next stop is November 9th in Jasper and Wheatfield. Combined with the American Rescue Plan. American Jobs Plan, Redistricting, and "Small Town" tours, the Indiana Democratic Party will have visited 55 out of 92 counties across the state in just a few months. Our goal is to meet Hoosiers where they are and celebrate how we are solving today's most-pressing problems facing families. We'll continue this effort through the 2022 election year. We hope you'll join us! \- INGOP Kyle Hupfer calls Holcomb's READI Program "Socialism" - The Indiana Republican Party has become so obsessed with branding the Democrats' agenda as "socialism" that they've now turned on one of their own: Governor Eric Holcomb. INGOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer this week described Governor Holcomb's READI program as "socialism" when he attacked the American Rescue Plan. Hupfer also called issues like broadband internet, childcare, and Indiana's public schools as "socialism" too. This line of attack by the Republicans not only demonstrates how extreme their partisanship has become, but they're also condemning the very issues they talk about with Hoosiers across Indiana. This is further evidence Indiana Republicans do nothing but provide Hoosiers lip service on a string of promises that they will continue to vote against, including broadband, childcare, and liveable wage jobs. They'll vote no but sure take the dough! In contrast, Indiana Democrats are working overtime to deliver better opportunities for Hoosier families. Thanks to President Joe Biden's American Rescue Plan, Democrats secured more than $250 million in broadband internet expansion, provided $540 million for childcare service providers, and fully-funded the state's public school systems for the first time in over a decade. Indiana Democrats want a better future for Hoosiers and their families, and that means delivering on the issues that matter most. We'll continue to inform Hoosiers about these issues. \- Opportunities - \- Annual Holiday Party - = \- Federal Election Commission Upcoming Trainings - The Commission will host several training events this fall to help political committees understand and comply with the federal campaign finance regulations. Our on November 16 - 17 will offer two days of in-depth training in an online, interactive format. The conference, led by FEC Commissioners and staff will feature group sessions and breakout workshops tailored to meet the needs of campaigns, party committees, and corporate/labor/trade PACs. Please visit their to see a complete list of upcoming workshops. While you're there, sign up to be notified when registration opens for upcoming programs, such as their December 8 Nonconnected PAC webinar. If you have any questions, please call 800-424-9530 (option 6) or email them at conferences@fec.gov. \- Spring Interns 2022 - ** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. __________________________________________________________________________________ Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field. We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit paperwork to the Party and their school. ________________________________________________________________________________ Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects ________________________________________________________________________________ Qualifications Applicants must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once _________________________________________________________________ Start/End Dates and Schedule Applicants for the Spring 2022 internship are now being accepted until December 15, 2021. We are not currently accepting applications for Summer 2022. Spring Interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible. _________________________________________________________________ How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. -Save the date- For events, check out our mobilize page . | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party** 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal gove
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z93gdsr3jbuiimijs1k1tum2el8jfn89lrloeie8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm6o32c1h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb4b65vuk269ei4ug1iar8a44badfspmuj929s2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm6o32c1h2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znks0k9jm1kmg688snn5ue5tp82do09bnj61lch0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm6o32c1h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2tlu8t8qhebjcrfnhkj4p7cnrh57hl0ehb3n7s8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm6o32c1h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zk2hlisfjj7drb6vjlveht5sej2rqpvni7apdkqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm6o32c1h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zflmpivilakaotg2md5s7e9ivmj5ffg5ctkpv16g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm6o32c1h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvu713bq4s5n5ghffedjla4hjlb2466i67eg8f7g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdi62or0c9g649fg)

name: Liz Mathis
subject: What my Hy-Vee fortune cookie had to say...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
The key to winning this race is knowing what matters to Iowans
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343106/315020214/-688045907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMzMWVhOS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_njKYzEcsHh8svrkeWLX5aY1K__izW2Gvg7GRx6uic=&emci=f120891a-573e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=40c31ea9-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6566505)
Hi Peter,

Out on the campaign trail, I have heard over and over again from Iowans that my opponent hasn’t been listening to what matters to their families. Iowans deserve a representative who knows them and the hardships they face. That is why traveling around the district to hear from Iowans has been my top priority.

**Last week, I was cracking open a fortune cookie, and wouldn’t you know it, the fortune inside read,_“You will be rewarded for being a good listener.”_** It reminded me that some of my most important supporters are online, which is why I am asking: [**If we haven’t gotten a chance to meet, will you take a minute and virtually introduce yourself?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343107/315020215/-688045907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMzMWVhOS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_njKYzEcsHh8svrkeWLX5aY1K__izW2Gvg7GRx6uic=&emci=f120891a-573e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=40c31ea9-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6566505)

[**That’s why I’m running for Congress -- I want to draw inspiration from the stories of Iowans to deliver meaningful and impactful change. But I can’t do that without knowing what matters to my online supporters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343109/315020217/-688045907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMzMWVhOS03YzNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_njKYzEcsHh8svrkeWLX5aY1K__izW2Gvg7GRx6uic=&emci=f120891a-573e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=40c31ea9-7c3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6566505)

We're shipping out this exclusive hat signed by the Heisman Trophy winner and candidate for U.S. Senate directly to ONE lucky winner. Act quickly - we're giving away this autographed Team Herschel hat in just a few days. Good Luck! Team Herschel NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, To enter without making a contribution, Void where prohibited or otherwise restricted by law. The promotion begins on November 3, 2021 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on November 8, 2021 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on November 8, 2021. One winner will receive the following prize: one (1) autographed Run Herschel Run hat. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia, and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this promotion may apply, they are listed in the official rules. body:

---|---|---

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. To enter without making a contribution, click here. Void where prohibited or otherwise restricted by law. The Promotion begins on Thursday, November 4, 2021 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Wednesday, December 1, 2021 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Wednesday, December 1, 2021. One winner will receive the following Prize: one (1) red Make America Great Again hat signed by former President Donald J. Trump, with an approximate retail value of $1,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is Rick Scott for Florida, PO BOX 76024 WASHINGTON, DC 20002. Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Please make a [contribution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb8lmc4bvs0oas18iv94cbhp4o091ecjq1sucsro_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgm6o32cjh2bs) today to help our campaign do our part to take back America. Peter — we’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: We won’t stand for partisan, gerrymandered redistricting in North Carolina.
Right now, Republicans are pushing through maps that would GUARANTEE them control of 70% of our congressional seats — despite the fact that our state was split nearly 50/50 in last year’s presidential election.
This plan doesn’t represent North Carolina, Peter — but more than that, they ensure that we’re headed for yet more court battles over our state’s legislative maps.
Democrats and our allies have taken the GOP to court **three times** in the last decade because of their partisan, unconstitutional gerrymandering, and they lost _every single case_. We will ALWAYS stand up for North Carolinians’ right to elect their own representatives — rather than have elected officials choose their voters.
_You’d think they might have learned from their mistakes._
Look, we’ll fight these battles all over again over our new maps if we have to, but it would better serve the interests of hardworking North Carolinians if the GOP would just work with us to deliver fair maps in the first place.
**[We’re fed up, Peter. If you are too, sign on right now to DEMAND the GOP quit playing partisan games with our redistricting process and draw maps that fairly represent North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38343429/315021537/-1325770495?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjcwNzM0OC03ZTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UIMewSVkU_EvIMMsCti08ssT1sRSJrcNketo42FEjDc=&emci=7253e741-7e3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a6707348-7e3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)**
