name: Derek Kilmer
subject: A few words on National Native American Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter --

This National Native American Heritage Month, I hope you'll join me in honoring the nearly 600 federally recognized Tribal communities in the United States. Each nation brings its own unique cultures and traditions that add important chapters to the history of America.

It's also important to pause and recognize our country's history of racial injustice, broken promises, and violence toward Tribal communities. It's crucial our government lives up to the promises it's made in the past and **honors its trust and treaty obligations with Tribal communities.**

Over the last several years, I've worked with the U.S. Commission on Civil Rights to identify the failures of the federal government in meetings those obligations - and to lay out a strategy for addressing them. And this past month, I joined Representative Marilyn Strickland and Brenda Mallory, the Chair of the White House Council on Environmental Quality, for a visit to Tribal communities in Washington. We met with Tribal leaders to call for federal investments in their communities and conservation efforts in support of their treaty rights.

Native American people have shown us the importance of protecting our natural resources -- including salmon and shellfish habitats, land, and waters. In Washington, our tribes play a key part in driving our local economy, and throughout history, countless Indigenous Americans have made the sacrifice of serving our nation in the military.

President Biden and Vice President Harris have committed to fulfilling the federal government's trust responsibilities with tribes. I'm committed to partnering with our local Tribal communities -- and colleagues like Rep. Strickland -- to make sure we make progress.

Happy National Native American Heritage Month to all who celebrate!

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/mfsWa1fAR_Uu7pi8YNA2-MOVoOKI-2EWpQ4Ftd4f8Z0=/4vg-8cV-CR9JsjzMcZc5S6QWEb5nUnH1uyMckN2HLsg=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mfsWa1fAR_Uu7pi8YNA2-MOVoOKI-2EWpQ4Ftd4f8Z0=/DmbQocIBGS6-IaVKFRIGcSEjNGg0QhUPqYD8GMkLGZg=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/mfsWa1fAR_Uu7pi8YNA2-MOVoOKI-2EWpQ4Ftd4f8Z0=/zV1WMnIH4hUjEOvSZ3Yztlrl9WCp_f8A_jppfXj3Q6g=).

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 11/5/21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=1)
---
Friend, This week, Republicans in Virginia turned out, winning very important elections, and laying the groundwork for Illinois Republicans to follow in 2022. I’m thrilled to see Governor-Elect Youngkin win in Virginia. But it isn’t just that he won, it’s _how_ he won. He ran a thoughtful, inspired campaign that spoke to voters on what matters most—their wallets, their freedom, and, most importantly, their children.

**This is also my vision for our state, and I fully believe that this is the blueprint for how to connect with voters and win in Illinois, as well.** Illinoisans are fed up with corrupt, partisan politics and the blue-red divide and just want to know that their communities are safe, the economy is strong, and they can give their kids the best possible future.

Governor-Elect Youngkin was able to persuade voters across the ideological spectrum, regardless of party, by appealing to their core values and priorities. And, just as Youngkin stressed in his campaign, nothing is more important to me than for parents—not the government—to have the power to decide what’s best for kids when it comes to education, health, and more.

A pro-family reset is long overdue which is why I've proposed an “[Illinois Parents’ Bill of Rights](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/illinois_parents_bill_of_rights?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=2),” which ensures that parents of minor children have a variety of educational, financial, and health-related rights when it comes to raising their kids as they see fit. Let’s restore the relationship between the parents of Illinois and their government to one that gives back to parents the autonomy and respect that they never should have lost in the first place. S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** This week's volunteer to highlight is our Frankfort Township Director, Hillary Kurzawa. Hillary is a member of the Will County Young Republicans, an active participant in the parents' rights movement, and a law enforcement spouse. Thank you, Hillary, for your friendship and support! [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA4dwaJPNhirhYJj_HL_KuUpuDmQGJFct6VLqlYVhQHz0&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=3) [If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=4)
* * *
**In the News** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=eKGbydSB9rDqvJVph9-ErIR6WyDcbefOjacM6w_ci1snSdyUgV9yiJfxGdPCX0yiCaYpUshtyZgMu40p-fz3sN27Ce9wke3Ds26Yc2tikVgZ8CpzGxN9UMSKEtovby6MDL7BiGwwqJuHmjSQvh-TnFs1QLzQ_-JwVBLuc84WeOsAf6khTGMB5WddGe7mD4T7t37W27jdgG8RcUbofGzClKiO2lwthNdlUjnXTzmG8Zo&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=5) **This week I joined the Galeburg's Morning News radio show to talk about a wide range of issues in Illinois and how we have a leadership deficit under JB Pritzker. Illinoisans are ready for change and I share why I can be the change Illinois needs.** [Listen to my interview on WGIL here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=eKGbydSB9rDqvJVph9-ErIR6WyDcbefOjacM6w_ci1snSdyUgV9yiJfxGdPCX0yiCaYpUshtyZgMu40p-fz3sN27Ce9wke3Ds26Yc2tikVgZ8CpzGxN9UMSKEtovby6MDL7BiGwwqJuHmjSQvh-TnFs1QLzQ_-JwVBLuc84WeOsAf6khTGMB5WddGe7mD4T7t37W27jdgG8RcUbofGzClKiO2lwthNdlUjnXTzmG8Zo&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=6)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqARbecgVv2v_nMq_UzgZJcUoTocdMuuBKEWLktJ22i8jg&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=7) It's always special to meet fellow brothers on the campaign trail! With Veterans Day next week, take a moment to thank a veteran or service member you see. They were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice for our country and I am forever grateful for all of our military men and women in Illinois, past and present, who our keeping our home safe and free. [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqARbecgVv2v_nMq_UzgZJcUoTocdMuuBKEWLktJ22i8jg&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=8)
* * *
**Attention Elmhurst and DuPage County-Area Supporters** A week from today, November 12th, I'll be hosting a discussion on my experience prosecuting Saddam Hussein at Elmhurst Brewing Company starting at 11:30am—[you're invited to attend](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/saddam_hussein_presentation_with_paul_schimpf?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=9)! I served as the lead American attorney advisor to the Iraqi prosecutors in the trial of Hussein. Under my guidance, the Iraqi prosecutors were able to induce a remarkable courtroom confession where Saddam admitted culpability in the massacre of hundreds of Iraqi civilians. At our event next week, I'll be sharing some behind-the-scenes details and accounts from the experience. [RSVPs are required to attend so sign up by getting your tickets here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/saddam_hussein_presentation_with_paul_schimpf?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=10) [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/saddam_hussein_presentation_with_paul_schimpf?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_5&n=11)
* * *

clean_body: | Friend, This week, Republicans in Virginia turned out, winning very important elections, and laying the groundwork for Illinois Republicans to follow in 2022. I’m thrilled to see Governor-Elect Youngkin win in Virginia. But it isn’t just that he won, it’s how he won. He ran a thoughtful, inspired campaign that spoke to voters on what matters most—their wallets, their freedom, and, most importantly, their children. This is also my vision for our state, and I fully believe that this is the blueprint for how to connect with voters and win in Illinois, as well. Illinoisans are fed up with corrupt, partisan politics and the blue-red divide and just want to know that their communities are safe, the economy is strong, and they can give their kids the best possible future. Governor-Elect Youngkin was able to persuade voters across the ideological spectrum, regardless of party, by appealing to their core values and priorities. And, just as Youngkin stressed in his campaign, nothing is more important to me than for parents—not the government—to have the power to decide what’s best for kids when it comes to education, health, and more. A pro-family reset is long overdue which is why I've proposed an “,” which ensures that parents of minor children have a variety of educational, financial, and health-related rights when it comes to raising their kids as they see fit. Let’s restore the relationship between the parents of Illinois and their government to one that gives back to parents the autonomy and respect that they never should have lost in the first place. S/F, Paul Schimpf Volunteer of the Week This week's volunteer to highlight is our Frankfort Township Director, Hillary Kurzawa. Hillary is a member of the Will County Young Republicans, an active participant in the parents' rights movement, and a law enforcement spouse. Thank you, Hillary, for your friendship and support! In the News This week I joined the Galeburg's Morning News radio show to talk about a wide range of issues in Illinois and how we have a leadership deficit under JB Pritzker. Illinoisans are ready for change and I share why I can be the change Illinois needs. Social Media Spotlight It's always special to meet fellow brothers on the campaign trail! With Veterans Day next week, take a moment to thank a veteran or service member you see. They were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice for our country and I am forever grateful for all of our military men and women in Illinois, past and present, who our keeping our home safe and free. Attention Elmhurst and DuPage County-Area Supporters A week from today, November 12th, I'll be hosting a discussion on my experience prosecuting Saddam Hussein at Elmhurst Brewing Company starting at 11:30am—! I served as the lead American attorney advisor to the Iraqi prosecutors in the trial of Hussein. Under my guidance, the Iraqi prosecutors were able to induce a remarkable courtroom confession where Saddam admitted culpability in the massacre of hundreds of Iraqi civilians. At our event next week, I'll be sharing some behind-the-scenes details and accounts from the experience. Get Involved Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? ** so we can share our highlighting the service of our Illinois veterans. Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. subject: Will you personally endorse Andy's re-election campaign?

body:
In 2019, Andy shocked the whole country by unseating one of the nation's most unpopular governors in a deep red state. But he didn't win this race on his own -- it was a true grassroots victory. Peter,

In 2019, Andy shocked the whole country by unseating one of the nation's most unpopular governors in a deep red state. But he didn't win this race on his own -- it was a true grassroots victory.

Folks from across the Commonwealth stepped up to show their support of Andy and the Kentucky values he was fighting for. With your help, we knocked on more than one million doors and had face-to-face conversations with hundreds of thousands of Kentuckians.

The support of each and every member of this grassroots team truly made the difference in that race -- we won by just over 5,000 votes.

name: Great America Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6566%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=teXnlVbWv7ENZ5HkKinOTQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67888%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OZ8KnEcozOkzAcJt51ML%2bg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67889%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CE7xvqucOQ%2fft%2bj2BBNeCg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67880%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VIjryMxHs72ZLFp25SeVoQ&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6566%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=teXnlVbWv7ENZ5HkKinOTQ&sysid=1)_

subject: Ted Cruz said WHAT?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **TED CRUZ via FOX NEWS: "We will finish the job in '22, retake the House, and RETIRE Nancy Pelosi"**

**[Did you see what Ted Cruz just said!? We have a monumental choice to make: We can either sit back and let him attack our beloved Speaker of the House -- or we can respond with a MASSIVE day of grassroots fundraising to defend our House Majority and make Cruz rue the day he ever came after Speaker Pelosi. If outstanding Democrats like you rush a gift before midnight, we could be on track OUTRAISE Republicans, PROTECT our House Majority, and make Ted Cruz's outrageous attacks BACKFIRE. Will you rush $3 at this consequential moment to elect House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-GsE_xqvC-)**

We need to move NOW.

Ted Cruz just launched an OUTRAGEOUS attack against our beloved Speaker:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

_**No one goes after Nancy Pelosi and our House Majority and gets away with it.**_

We're calling for a MASSIVE response -- 1,500 gifts before midnight -- to DEFEAT House Republicans and make Cruz's attacks completely BACKFIRE.

****[Will you help defend Speaker Pelosi and her House Majority with any amount straight away?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)****
| [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTRgv-)[MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)

---

Right now, we have a critical choice to make.

We can either let Ted Cruz raise millions for Republicans, attack our Speaker, and let House Republicans barge back into power...

...Or we can rise up, have a HISTORIC fundraising day to defend Speaker Pelosi and our House Democrats, and make Cruz's attack BACKFIRE.

****[Can Speaker Pelosi and our House Democrats count on your $3 before midnight to defend our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)****
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: You need to see this poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Folks --

I hate reaching out with bad news, but this can't wait. Two recent polls
are showing me down by single digits.

Folks, it’s clear that we need to mobilize all Democrats, and
that we need to do it fast. We’ve got to fight back against the GOP’s
attacks so that I can win re-election as Senator for the great state of
New Hampshire -- our Senate majority depends on it.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5808?t=1006&akid=1342%2E3611125%2ECJSyzr ]Can I count on you to split a donation between me and my friend Tim
Ryan to ensure that we defend and expand our Democratic Senate majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5808?t=1007&akid=1342%2E3611125%2ECJSyzr ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5809?t=1008&akid=1342%2E3611125%2ECJSyzr ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5810?t=1009&akid=1342%2E3611125%2ECJSyzr ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5811?t=1010&akid=1342%2E3611125%2ECJSyzr ]Donate $200

Tim and I are both in extremely competitive Senate races that will
determine the control of the Senate -- and the future of our country.

Now, neither of us is scared of a good fight -- especially when the cause
is just -- but we can’t do it alone. If we want to win and expand the
Democratic majority so we can pass legislation that will help everyday
Americans, we need your help and we need it now.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5808?t=1011&akid=1342%2E3611125%2ECJSyzr ]Will you please split a donation between Tim and me so we can hold my
New Hampshire Senate seat and flip Ohio blue?

Thanks for being with us.

With every good wish,

Maggie

Maggie Hassan
Senator for New Hampshire

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: I need your help to protect free speech
body:
I was one of cancel culture’s first targets and I won’t be the last. As the movement termed “cancel culture” was launchi
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfkq8lih9cgc9pbbssg2rlkg4qulluggukmvnh18_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgmeo74cdh2bs) Hi there, _I was one of cancel culture’s first targets and I won’t be the last._ As the movement termed “cancel culture” was launching a few years ago, I was already being cancelled by the radical Left. Speeches I planned to give at DePaul University, Gonzaga University, Cal State Los Angeles, Grand Canyon University, and more were all initially cancelled because these campuses “objected” to my views on matters such as Black Lives Matter, “safe spaces,” and free speech. In a nation that’s supposed to value free speech, the open expression of thought, and the debate of different values and viewpoints, I was “cancelled” because I’m an outspoken conservative who would dare speak against leftist viewpoints on college campuses. **There is a growing movement of the Left that says it is incumbent to protect campuses from dissenting ideas. Well, I’m not going to allow conservative students to be kicked off of campuses like I have been. ** [**That’s why I’m assisting Speech First and DEMANDING that the federal government stop sending YOUR tax dollars to colleges and universities that DENY the free speech rights of ANY students on campus. And I need YOU to join us today by signing this national petition.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zd6aq9duvh22pf82j20u0g4tfofa1v222sfneieg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgmeo74cdh2bs) [**Yes, let's defund colleges who silence conservatives!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv7ngovjf70ered3gd4l0s52m2kdli2ev7okggno_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgmeo74cdh2bs) Colleges and universities are continually cancelling conservative speech and enforcing restrictive “speech codes” that punish students who don’t hold Leftist views of the world. **It’s time that we join together as a collective free speech movement — led by Speech First, who has a record of winning lawsuits against universities that target free speech — to protect freedom of speech on college campuses. ** [**Sign the national petition today to help me!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze4klsiv56ccp7lpv71kkj0v34l14ulgfpgtkj00_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgmeo74cdh2bs) [**Yes, let's defund colleges who silence conservatives!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z87ikhpsivh12eifjlhj98sqi3g09hdriehl5bd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chgmeo74cdh2bs) Let’s save speech, Ben Shapiro

name: Alex Padilla
subject: What’s in the Build Back Better framework:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hi there,
The Build Back Better framework would be a very big deal for California, so I wanted to reach out directly to explain a little bit about what the bill will actually do once it passes.
It’s one of the biggest pieces of legislation since the New Deal, so I won’t go through every single provision in this email, but I wanted to point out a few pieces that are important for Californians to know about:
**Climate: The single largest effort to combat climate change in American history.** It includes massive investments in a clean energy economy, 50% reductions in greenhouse gas emissions, and a new Civilian Climate Corps that will put Californians in good-paying, union jobs addressing climate change.
**Child Care: Provides universal, high-quality, free preschool for every 3- and 4-year old in America.** In addition to the lifelong educational benefits, it will also free millions of Californians from rising child care costs — under the Build Back Better framework, middle-class families will pay no more than 7% of their income on high-quality childcare.
**Health Care: Expands coverage and access to long-term care.** By closing the Medicaid coverage gap and expanding Medicare, the Build Back Better framework will help hundreds of thousands of Californians gain coverage. It will also expand access to long-term home and community-based care to more Californians and improve the quality and wages of caregiving jobs.
**Here's the bottom line:** President Biden’s Build Back Better framework will lower costs and cut taxes for working families and make child care, home care, education, health care, and housing more affordable. It will create good-paying union jobs for Californians, combat climate change, and help parents — especially working parents — make ends meet.
The time for small changes has passed — it’s time to go BIG and pass Build Back Better.
Thank you,
Sen. Alex Padilla
* * *
Alex Padilla is the son of immigrants from Mexico who worked tirelessly to give their kids a better shot at the American dream. Each and every day, he goes to work in the U.S. Senate to make that dream more accessible to others.
[**Can you please make a contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign today? We need to keep his voice in the Senate, and any amount you can afford to give will go a long way >>>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211105-1-15&t=1&refcode2=435_159979_IhYtO0&akid=435%2E159979%2EIhYtO0)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21?refcode=em211105-1-15&t=2&refcode2=435_159979_IhYtO0&akid=435%2E159979%2EIhYtO0)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=435%2E159979%2EIhYtO0)

name: Sarah
subject: quick question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**

body:
In Virginia, in New Jersey, and right here in New York, Republicans wildly outperformed expectations and flipped so much from blue to red... [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6569%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=seQrpq%2bFR%2f4m1Ypys%2fgz4A&sysid=1)
|
---
| | [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67883%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u9vyvKEbpqu8TnAm0knTsg&sysid=1)
---
| Friend,

In Virginia, in New Jersey, and right here in New York, Republicans wildly outperformed expectations and flipped so much from blue to red...

**And all of these upset victories sent one very clear message -_a _RED TSUNAMI_ is on its way in November 2022! _**

We are witnessing voters hold every one of these Democrat “leaders” accountable, from Joe Biden to Bill de Blasio, for their tax hikes, crime spikes, and failed education policies. [**__These conditions are creating a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to Save New York!__**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67884%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RJ86AVYHNjXZaudVx990GQ&sysid=1)

If it can happen in solid blue Virginia, it can happen here - so will you help usher in a Republican victory and make sure another state rejects the radical left agenda?
---
| [PITCH IN!](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67895%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C7das5H0iU5QY7RyigLQRw&sysid=1 "PITCH IN!")

---
| [$10](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67897%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Uou%2fK0umnSt5dqQnnXq3Ow&sysid=1 "$10")
---
| [$20](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67898%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ia3hGyj%2b33nMEDKa56uIEg&sysid=1 "$20")
---
| [$50](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67899%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JPsNM6Sbq09GyFeYEt1Wew&sysid=1 "$50")
---
| **We won’t get another chance like this to fix all the damage these tyrants have created and take back New York and America.**

**_This is how we end the attacks on our wallets, our safety, and our freedom!_**

Virginia voters just made it clear that they reject far-left policies like **_“Woke” indoctrination of our kids._** We can do the same here in New York, and also reject their **lawless “Defund the Police” and cashless bail crime spikes, their draconian mandates shuttering firehouses, and so many of their other horrible failures!**

Because it’s now crystal clear - the American people don’t want their leaders to dig in their heels after jeopardizing their rights and safety... **They want these leaders _GONE!_**

We can send them packing in New York if we build on the momentum right now... [**_Pitch in to this critical and WINNABLE fight today!_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67890%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=38UUSnLq30YblcgVdlEyqg&sysid=1)

_Lee Zeldin_

clean_body: This is astounding -- | | = = ICYMI: Rolling Stone put out a new, bombshell report that alleges that organizers of the January 6th Capitol insurrection planned directly with White House staff and members of Congress. This is astounding -- especially since we already know that Scott Perry was instrumental in helping Trump attempt to overturn the 2020 election, and we need answers. Team, we’re counting on you to step up in a big way and defend democracy. It’s becoming clearer by the day that we need to get Scott Perry out of office, but we need your help to do that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Perry attempted to pressure the Justice Department. He spoke openly about the so-called “Big Lie." He backed Trump and the insurrection at every turn. = Thanks for acting fast on this, Team Eugene ** | | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. clean_body: Will you follow President Trump on social media? | | | Peter, We’ve been asking and asking, but we still haven’t heard from everyone. That’s why we’re emailing you directly. We need to know by 11:59 PM TONIGHT where you stand. It’s important. | Do you support President Trump in starting his own social media site? | | | | Thank you. Republican Polling Alerts

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Virtual Townhall Next Tuesday, 7 PM - Ammon will focus on the indoctritaion of children in public education and solutions!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter, Should public schools be indoctrinating children with ideologies such as sexual orientation, gender identity, critical race theory, social parenting, authoritarianism and more? What about not needing parental permission to teach sexual education or to vaccinate your child? What is happening to parental rights? During this Virtual Townhall I will be focusing on the challenges and the needed solutions to correct the public education system and protect our children.Also, I will be announcing the endorsement from another national figure. It is humbling when a person who has spent decades standing for liberty, and who is respected by millions across the country, is willing to put his name with mine.Be sure to [REGISTER](https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/) for this important Virtual Townhall, Tuesday the 9th at 7:00 PM.

Click her to register <https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/>
Thank you, Ammon Bundy[VoteBundy.com](http://VoteBundy.com)
P.S. You are invited to an Old Time Barn Dance and Dinner! Lots of family fun! November 11th, Thursday at 6:30 PM. Click here to see the details and buy tickets: <https://votebundy.com/go/9a52d9b7-0739-48ee-b504-b61e428f3b36>

Friend,

When I first entered politics during the 2020 election, I did so because I believed -- as I do now -- that the American Dream is still very much alive if we are willing to FIGHT for it.
---
My family is living proof of that ideal. _We went from slavery to West Point in just 5 generations._ Which is why I wanted to share our ad from 2020 with you that tells my story.
---
**But I’ll be honest, right now, we’re facing an uphill battle. Pelosi has gone on a record-breaking fundraising blitz and made our race her #1 TARGET to save her majority.**
---
_**That’s why I need your help running ads of our own to cut through Pelosi’s lies and attacks.**_

clean_body: This is why I’m running to RETIRE Pelosi... | Friend, When I first entered politics during the 2020 election, I did so because I believed -- as I do now -- that the American Dream is still very much alive if we are willing to FIGHT for it. My family is living proof of that ideal. We went from slavery to West Point in just 5 generations. Which is why I wanted to share our ad from 2020 with you that tells my story. But I’ll be honest, right now, we’re facing an uphill battle. Pelosi has gone on a record-breaking fundraising blitz and made our race her #1 TARGET to save her majority. That’s why I need your help running ads of our own to cut through Pelosi’s lies and attacks. Pelosi’s DCCC has raked in over $106,500,000 this year, amassing a daunting war chest to attack us in this MUST-WIN race. But remember, we only need to win 5 seats to FLIP the House and RETIRE Pelosi. She knows our fight to win Texas’ BRAND-NEW 38th congressional district will be the END of her majority... That’s why this race has sent Pelosi into a full-blown panic. As long as we can keep pace and fend off her attacks and smears with ads of our own, Pelosi’s majority is destined to crumble. The game the Left is playing is dirty... plain and simple. But my determination to FIRE radical liberal Tony Evers and take back the great state of Wisconsin for conservatives is steadfast. In order to create change we MUST be willing to do everything legal we can to WIN, including beating the Left at their own game. Anyone who attacks us for that determination lacks the will to win this fight. We cannot fix a broken system from the outside. First, we need to win this TOSS-UP governor’s race. We already have a clear edge among registered Wisconsin voters, Friend. Wisconsin's most conservative congressional district has nearly 100,000 more registered voters than its liberal counterpart. But we can’t allow this advantage to go to waste... If we become complacent while the Left plays by a different set of rules, it doesn’t matter how many voters we register. Folks, we knew that Steve Sisolak -- Nevada’s first Democratic governor in two decades -- was going to face a tough re-election campaign.
**But here’s the bad (ok, SCARY!!) news** : _Even with political analysts, national news outlets, and polls saying Nevada is going to be a complete TOSS-UP -- donations have slowed down to a halt._
After Virginia showed that Trump Republicans are doubling down on flipping battleground states, we called on this team to help us reach a 250 grassroots donor goal to fight back.
And right now -- we’re only at a staggering **38%** of our goal... Team, don’t forget everything Donald Trump did to try to flip Nevada red in 2020:
**→ He sued our state after Gov. Sisolak passed a mail-in voting law
→ He filed voter suppression lawsuits in our most diverse county
→ He undermined our voting system on national television
→ He called out Gov. Sisolak at multiple rallies**
**_...And while we held the line, Biden only won Nevada by 3%. Now Steve Sisolak is facing 6 MAGA opponents who are prepared to team up with National Republicans to finish the job._**

clean_body: | | | | | | | Folks, political experts are calling it: the Nevada governor’s race is going to be a nail-biter. Steve Sisolak is facing an uphill battle in toss-up Nevada -- and we’re calling on every good Democrat to help him defend this seat. | | Folks, we knew that Steve Sisolak -- Nevada’s first Democratic governor in two decades -- was going to face a tough re-election campaign. But here’s the bad (ok, SCARY!!) news : Even with political analysts, national news outlets, and polls saying Nevada is going to be a complete TOSS-UP -- donations have slowed down to a halt. After Virginia showed that Trump Republicans are doubling down on flipping battleground states, we called on this team to help us reach a 250 grassroots donor goal to fight back. And right now -- we’re only at a staggering 38% of our goal... Team, don’t forget everything Donald Trump did to try to flip Nevada red in 2020: → He sued our state after Gov. Sisolak passed a mail-in voting law → He filed voter suppression lawsuits in our most diverse county → He undermined our voting system on national television → He called out Gov. Sisolak at multiple rallies ...And while we held the line, Biden only won Nevada by 3%. Now Steve Sisolak is facing 6 MAGA opponents who are prepared to team up with National Republicans to finish the job. Keeping Nevada Blue depends on this grassroots team. We’re up against millions of dollars in attacks -- and the only way to fight back is with a people-powered coalition. | | | | | | | | | | | | \-- Team Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. body:
As we speak, Congress is getting ready for a vote on the Build Back Better Act tomorrow. But not everyone is on board. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPPDvg4fxV66ZF3u87Ye3a6_khC4C5l5IX9cpU_lkDGkqPV1eGxjkbRECWdQ5lKfYurPVCQWs7BjQgcafRBPIbdwwomt2LYsRo6s68DVTnU7RNUo3bhO3CdHYYO3ElZj0cDryGqTMjEdvHRWHg4tPq8ZSn0gCxKmsGjr-xReKAeY4082Y-VIY8AJ2ebll1Jzf1yP0R5VCussiXpA8qNU4fIIaivUJ5-wqXgRD6dXmtHdS/3gr/1QXt6SnBRW2xtL5aJoueNA/h0/rsFKY-PoutCkMhOCESmJQB083tZR73wevxtpakRmVuo)
Peter, As we speak, Congress is getting ready for a vote on the Build Back Better Act. But not everyone is on board. **Lawmakers like Kyrsten Sinema have consistently been holding up progress on the Build Back Better vote.** They've withheld their votes. They've been taking out popular policies like paid family leave and prescription drug reform. They won't stop getting in the way of Democrats delivering for the American people. As a result, they've robbed the Democratic Party of critical wins — wins that the party needs in order to keep their House and Senate majorities in the midterms. **[Senator Sinema needs to feel the pressure of this moment, and we need to show her that we are ready to oust her for someone who will work for us in Congress. We're laying the groundwork to make that happen, and we need your support. Will you chip in whatever you can?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSXz5CwrWhQnbYuCm7iE5PXIgnMhChnvBq7ZV06bvq5DMiVVsij_o8vliWkecb9wz2ONfoMvACQgk3TwtGYI-Plq1W5yAPsllaX0mhfkmm6CAq8vHImu1RsoQQn2NzQT3-IcTjuPwPp0eFx1ZLcycZaDzbXsLaJhyXxEHy1LpECVqqOPjWM8AbOevRnguTnpKYJ6ZYMmGenw0vAL-qeHtDD-mKOZSWyhALqCCIlLRuOe2M-VW6t6VLK8fCDHQnBkmMp--f0KW7spr6q_Ji6lrS58b0GTLmw6EN1cA77F2oVJu5tGWNPTvC-eV8-OmXGakJ/3gr/1QXt6SnBRW2xtL5aJoueNA/h1/S4DP1YqfmjGWDAUYM2HWKmKryDBwVdcygX9GcG5dGOU)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSXz5CwrWhQnbYuCm7iE5PXIgnMhChnvBq7ZV06bvq5DNzmqQa9l2e6ex5hIFkzVi-P-AcCwJvJQd9DueUAonUByVCp_J1Unv9mriCGdajEBvYIBiCAIEM_5GAIb5gWpvxPoP70JWms3Xc1qAyv8udLtPLfxg_nj3B5wPIHfuKURfvP8PrTyTIoOjTF7sOA9oOjH20M_iqhT6wjp46ykglCsTUTR1OiiJzPTn9yml6zOLw_Xj0zbrIvcFqRt8st6O_Epos8rPRH8CXAjw0xWr1djRalcJZUufChILbPiEni8dUN_b0RBSb3ebGx-VIxqul/3gr/1QXt6SnBRW2xtL5aJoueNA/h2/z04Tx-jafVR4d6cLTNNYMl_KCzIVq_VVBxjhse4otsU) If passed, the Build Back Better Act would make a significant difference in the lives of millions of Arizonans. President Biden's agenda is broadly popular in Arizona — and polling shows that Arizona Democratic primary voters are more likely to support a candidate who does. Despite all of this, Senator Sinema continues to block progress towards a vote on the Build Back Better Act. She continues to ignore constituents, dodge reporters, and refuses to respond to even other Democratic lawmakers in Washington. It's clear that Senator Kyrsten Sinema isn't the right person to represent Arizonans in the Senate. **But we can't wait until a primary challenger jumps in the race** — beating an incumbent Senator is hard, so we need to act NOW to build the infrastructure we'll need to defeat her. **[That's where our work comes in, Peter, and we could really use your help getting our efforts off the ground. 100% of your donation today will go towards grassroots groups based in Arizona that are laying the foundation for a successful primary challenge. Please chip in today, if you are able.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSXz5CwrWhQnbYuCm7iE5PXIgnMhChnvBq7ZV06bvq5DNCPaVaFKChkeD4GyxdsnKVPOE-w4y5A_flLiUIltaKcAa5bEJWFeEaXT3xpQVMh7Pd_qjZmKNH-IUB0hFXQJGNc0ablVlisdE8cAceVO7bi_eXALH5OcutJO3n7bkqLr-IgGC_49UFSN6HEOr-N8sS1MirYvehBWbbUhnK21_M8RvrLp_00po0QqPVhu1CCrWxdh4Av9eGQUvYPojowNn9-ID6_FTYLXQjHuj731MdPFWKoeD-w_OCMyJj6oO7158sDkK_pqWzO8Bc6NUEEn6B/3gr/1QXt6SnBRW2xtL5aJoueNA/h3/6lKPXy5LLGbI3q2VC8rtENZU8w42FdUzh7IoGME6MAg)** More soon, Primary Sinema PAC

clean_body: As we speak, Congress is getting ready for a vote on the Build Back Better Act tomorrow. But not everyone is on board. | | | Peter, As we speak, Congress is getting ready for a vote on the Build Back Better Act. But not everyone is on board. Lawmakers like Kyrsten Sinema have consistently been holding up progress on the Build Back Better vote. They've withheld their votes. They've been taking out popular policies like paid family leave and prescription drug reform. They won't stop getting in the way of Democrats delivering for the American people. As a result, they've robbed the Democratic Party of critical wins — wins that the party needs in order to keep their House and Senate majorities in the midterms. If passed, the Build Back Better Act would make a significant difference in the lives of millions of Arizonans. President Biden's agenda is broadly popular in Arizona — and polling shows that Arizona Democratic primary voters are more likely to support a candidate who does. Despite all of this, Senator Sinema continues to block progress towards a vote on the Build Back Better Act. She continues to ignore constituents, dodge reporters, and refuses to respond to even other Democratic lawmakers in Washington. It's clear that Senator Kyrsten Sinema isn't the right person to represent Arizonans in the Senate. But we can't wait until a primary challenger jumps in the race — beating an incumbent Senator is hard, so we need to act NOW to build the infrastructure we'll need to defeat her. More soon, Primary Sinema PAC | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: Team Bass
subject: Do you agree abortion is health care?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Friend --

This week, Ohio lawmakers introduced a total ban on abortion in the state. This ban goes even further than Texas' six-week ban by directly outlawing an abortion procedure or administering, procuring, or selling any instrument, medicine, or drug to terminate a pregnancy.

And like Texas, Ohio's restriction empowers people to bring civil action against an individual who performs an abortion -- pitting neighbor against neighbor.

State legislatures have introduced over 560 abortion restrictions across 47 states this year. These restrictions go directly against a person's constitutional right to seek an abortion and will disproportionately harm women of color, nonbinary people, and people already at a disadvantage in our health and criminal justice system.

**[No law or politician should stand between a doctor and their patient. Karen is determined to protect reproductive rights for every single Angeleno because abortion is health care. Add your name next to Karen's to support accessible, affordable reproductive health care.](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTToI76qnE3M1oLDPaMELv863VY7at5cqgaYU0o-5Ho=/-9EVc-QkPeyCgtfb2jTOZZVdQwa62N9VjuX-gakmti0=?ms=em21_211105_roe_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211105_roe_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211105_roe_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211105_roe_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

_Roe v. Wade_ was not the beginning of people getting abortions, it was the beginning of people not dying from them. Our state is a leader in protections for reproductive rights, and right now, California lawmakers are considering a bill that would make seeking reproductive care more accessible and affordable.

Abortion has been legal for 40 years. We refuse to go back in time in the fight for reproductive rights -- not now, not ever.

**[If you're with Karen in the fight to defend reproductive rights, add your name right now. We need all hands on deck to stop these draconian attacks on our rights.](https://act.myngp.com/el/BTToI76qnE3M1oLDPaMELv863VY7at5cqgaYU0o-5Ho=/-9EVc-QkPeyCgtfb2jTOZZVdQwa62N9VjuX-gakmti0=?ms=em21_211105_roe_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask2&refcode=em21_211105_roe_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211105_roe_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211105_roe_adv_gq_act___tb_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

Thank you,

Team Bass

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

name: Team Jayapal
subject: We’re not waiting any longer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Progressives like Pramila are ready to deliver transformational change to the people. Let's pass the popular agenda that people gave us the House, the Senate, and the White House to make a reality.
#
Here we go again, Peter: some people are saying that we should DELAY a vote on the Build Back Better Act.
We know what delaying a vote on this transformative legislation means: more time for Big Pharma, Wall Street, and corporate PACs to derail popular, necessary, and long-overdue investments in working people, families, and our communities.
**We’re not waiting any longer.**
[**NOW is the time to invest in childcare, paid leave, pre-k, health care, climate action, housing, and lowering the cost of prescription drugs — not next week or next year. If you agree, donate $3 or whatever you can afford toward our movement so we can continue supporting Pramila’s tireless efforts to pass the Build Back Better Act this week.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211105?refcode=em20211105-780&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=780_420207_yGOuzO&akid=780%2E420207%2EyGOuzO)

Progressives like Pramila are ready to deliver transformational change to the people. Let's pass the popular agenda that people gave us the House, the Senate, and the White House to make a reality.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Last week, we asked our grassroots supporters to help us reach a $20,000
goal before the end of October so we could continue to organize volunteers
and expand our voter registration efforts across Texas.

In response,
thousands of folks stepped up, chipped in, and helped us
knock that goal out of the park. From the bottom of our hearts — thank
you.

We’re so grateful you’re a part of our fight to work towards a safer,
healthier, and more just future for Texas. Because of your support, we’ll
be able to keep building our voter registration efforts and fighting to
reach millions of voters before the 2022 midterms

Powered by People will fight for Texans in 2022 and beyond, and we’re
relying entirely on grassroots support to help make our plans a reality.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48458?refcode=ema20211105-161357&amount=3&t=1001&akid=161357%2E444211%2EAdWIx- ]If you can, would you please consider chipping in your
first
$3 contribution to help us keep fighting for the progress
we deserve in Texas?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48458?refcode=ema20211105-161357&amount=3&t=1020&akid=161357%2E444211%2EAdWIx- ]Contribute $3

The most powerful thing we can do in the face of GOP voter suppression and
extremism is come together and fight back. That’s what unites all of us —
volunteers, staff, donors, and voters — a commitment to defending our
rights and demanding better.

Thank you for being a part of our team,

Kate Roberts
Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48458?refcode=ema20211105-161357&t=1021&akid=161357%2E444211%2EAdWIx- ]Donate »

body:

clean_body: We were so so close | Friend, I know I’ve been asking a lot from you lately. I’ve been asking for your support on almost a daily basis, but I want you to know that without your support, I can’t keep standing up to Nancy Pelosi’s Radical Agenda in Washington. It was because of your support I was able to secure victory for conservatives in the CLOSEST HOUSE RACE IN OVER 30 YEARS. So, believe me when I tell you it’s not going to get any easier for us, and that’s why we’ve got to keep the pressure on Nancy and her Radical Liberal allies. | I just missed my October deadline and it’s going to hurt me in the long run if I can’t quickly make up ground. If there’s one thing that we can’t let Nancy Pelosi see, it is that our resources are low. So, if you are willing and able, can you rush a donation before MIDNIGHT to help us make up ground and keep fighting off Nancy Pelosi’s wicked plans for America. God Bless, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Electing a Democrat to represent Nebraskans living in the Second Congressional District will be as difficult as it is important.
**[That is why I am enthusiastically supporting Tony Vargas. Not only do I believe he can win, I believe he should.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38345511/315030459/1129282168?refcode=20211105_em_fr_b1_bk_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTdjYTllMC04ODNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IF2JUUnqqTNirAi7CiDw-mnUE4ZNo3YA7FYVZA8GhkU=)**

I’ll explain how your donation will have a huge impact, but please chip in $15 now. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38345512/315030460/1129282168?refcode=20211105_em_fr_b1_bk_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTdjYTllMC04ODNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IF2JUUnqqTNirAi7CiDw-mnUE4ZNo3YA7FYVZA8GhkU=)
He is off to a good start and President Biden’s victory in the Second Congressional District should give us confidence. But no one should doubt that this is going to be a battle of inches.
Tony is running in one of the most competitive races in the entire country.
To win a close race like this, Tony has to outwork and outraise the incumbent every step of the way.
You know that incumbents have a big fundraising advantage especially with corporate PACs.
We have to show voters that we are committed to victory. To win Tony needs our help. He will need to pay for ads, mail pieces, and voter outreach to win this race.
I hope you will help. There is no such thing as a small donation. Every dollar matters.
[**_I promised him I’d help him raise $8,000 by midnight, so I’m reaching out to his top supporters to ask: Will you join me in supporting Tony and chip in $15 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38345513/315030461/1129282168?refcode=20211105_em_fr_b1_bk_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTdjYTllMC04ODNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IF2JUUnqqTNirAi7CiDw-mnUE4ZNo3YA7FYVZA8GhkU=)

**Bob Kerrey**

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

* The other, Audrey Henson, was a proud member of a group called “Republicans for Hillary”!

We can’t afford to nominate another phony politician for this seat. That’s why I’m humbly asking you to support my candidacy.

Derek, there's no doubt that Democrats took some big hits on Tuesday.

**But it's candidates like Chris who can help us turn things around as the 2022 cycle kicks into gear.**

He's got a strong platform that's pro-union, pro-working family, and pro-healthcare. He's not afraid to take on corporate power. And he's got a clear record of fighting for his values — whether it's as a voting rights advocate or as a leader in the push to successfully unionize the Pitt faculty.

The GOP will be moving fast to try and stop Chris. After this week's elections, you can be sure they're fired up to fight in swing districts like PA-17.

name: Adam Laxalt
subject: BREAKING: Nevada Senate race moves to "Toss-up" as momentum shifts toward us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans are ready to FLIP the Senate!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701265:JyLLuB2Ne:m:1:3253819041:48FAF0B8E87797D568897C4254D4167B:r)
Peter,

In the wake of historic victories in formerly deep-blue Virginia Tuesday, Nevada Republicans are ready to flip the Senate as momentum shifts toward our movement.

Wednesday morning, the University of Virginia's Center for Politics - one of the most well-known political analysis organizations in the nation - has moved Nevada's Senate race from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss-up." Because I represent the biggest threat to their majority, Democrats are already focusing their false attacks on me.

This is a major sign of momentum and a clear recognition by the national media that Catherine Cortez Masto is on the ropes. [**Whatever you can give -- even just $1 -- we need your help to keep this huge momentum going.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701265:JyLLuB2Ne:m:1:3253819041:48FAF0B8E87797D568897C4254D4167B:r) [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701265:JyLLuB2Ne:m:1:3253819041:48FAF0B8E87797D568897C4254D4167B:r)
---

Virginia showed what we've known for a long time - especially here in Nevada - that parents are stepping up to fight for their children's education. They won't stand for critical race theory indoctrinations or efforts by radical liberals to get between them and their kids.

The results Tuesday are no surprise to those of us but if we want change, we must continue the fight and make sure our voices are heard loud and clear next November, just as Virginians made their voices heard Tuesday.

I am thankful for your continued support as we fight to protect Nevada. With your help - along with leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis who have endorsed my candidacy - we will be victorious.

Best,
Adam Laxalt

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701266:JyLLuB2Ne:m:1:3253819041:48FAF0B8E87797D568897C4254D4167B:r) A note for Peter, from Adam Laxalt:

Peter, thank you for your support as I take on the Democrat establishment to FLIP Nevada and the U.S. Senate. Our movement is off to a great start, but the battle has just begun.

Even CNN has rated my race one of the MOST LIKELY blue to red flips for 2022. It's clear, the road to the Senate majority runs through Nevada, but I need your immediate help to fight back against the Democrats' fundraising machine.

[**Help restore a Republican majority**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701266:JyLLuB2Ne:m:1:3253819041:48FAF0B8E87797D568897C4254D4167B:r)
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58701267:JyLLuB2Ne:m:1:3253819041:48FAF0B8E87797D568897C4254D4167B:r)
---

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: 11/5 Newsletter
body:
The election in Virginia and New Jersey ought to send shock waves through the Democrat Party.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_5_news_letter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_5_news_letter&n=2) Dear Peter -- The election in Virginia and New Jersey ought to send shock waves through the Democrat Party. Glenn Youngkin won his race handily (more on this election below), and New Jersey Governor Phil Murphy won a narrow victory in a race few thought would be close. Phil Murphy has presided over some of the most onerous COVID-19 restrictions in the nation. Voters came out in heavy numbers to show their opposition to these draconian policies. The New Jersey race is instructive for the election for governor here in Illinois as Governor Pritzker continues his authoritarian approach to the pandemic. Next week the latest 30-day executive orders are set to expire. Will the Governor learn from what has happened in New Jersey and side with the people or will he continue his authoritarian dictates? We will be watching. There is a path to victory for principled conservatives in blue states. The next big win for Republicans in blue states will be right here in Illinois. I am the candidate who can unite our party in defeating JB Pritzker. Join our movement today. Visit https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker. Best Regards, Gary Rabine Get Involved Want to help the Gary Rabine campaign? Go to https://www.rabineforgovernor.com/volunteer and sign up! | |
---|---
|

---
##
### Glenn Youngkin wins Virginia gubernatorial election with pro-family message
Glenn Youngkin’s victory in the Virginia governor’s race sends a clear message that voters want candidates who will stand up for families and oppose the far-left agenda of woke politicians.
I have met Glenn Youngkin and I can tell you he is a common-sense leader who can’t be bought. Throughout his campaign, Glenn sounded the alarm about the war on families. Instead of ignoring the concerns of parents, he embraced them. Not only was his message the right message, but it proved to be a winning message.
Woke politicians in Illinois should be worried. In 2022 people in Illinois will stand up for Life, Liberty and Freedom as Virginia has.
Governor Pritzker wants to be the wokest of the woke and he continues to ignore common sense and continues to wage his war on families. He has doubled down on vaccine mandates.
and mask mandates. He has signed legislation to put sexually explicit and borderline pornographic material into classrooms and he has pushed legislation to take away the Right of Conscience for working people. While Pritzker was not on the ballot in Virginia, his far-left views were. Voters in Virginia rejected woke politics and I am confident voters in Illinois will do the same.
### Cook County court sides with the cops
This week, Cook County Judge Raymond Mitchell put a hold on the Dec. 31st deadline to lay off Chicago City employees who have not been vaccinated. I sent out the following statement hailing this important decision.
“This is a win for Chicago Police officers and their union leader, John Catanzara, who simply want to be able to make healthcare decisions for themselves. It is my hope the court will take the next step and rule these vaccine mandates unconstitutional but at least the brave men and women who serve in the Chicago Police Department will not have to worry about losing their jobs as they fight for their right of conscience.
The continued overreach of government to control our daily lives should concern each and every one of us. This is not about vaccines. This is about the right of free citizens to make healthcare decisions for themselves. This is about protecting and preserving our freedom and our liberties. Just last week, lawmakers sent the Governor legislation to take away the Right of Conscience for working people. I ask this Governor to stand with working men and women and veto this legislation. JB Pritzker and our legislators swore an oath to uphold the Constitution. It is time he and our leaders in Springfield did their job.”
### Another dubious distinction for Illinois
Illinois ranks 7th in the nation and the highest in the Midwest in job quit rates, according to a new report.
In August, a whopping 200,000 Illinoisans quit their jobs. Dubbed the “Great Resignation, the high quit rate is part of a national trend of people leaving their jobs.
But in Illinois, the lack of state leadership in helping employers find ways to retain workers is not helping. The hostility toward job creators is only serving to make a bad situation worse. Instead of constantly raising taxes, our leaders would be well served to work with job creators to not only create new jobs in Illinois but find ways to keep those jobs.
* * *

clean_body: The election in Virginia and New Jersey ought to send shock waves through the Democrat Party. | | | ---|---|--- Dear Peter -- The election in Virginia and New Jersey ought to send shock waves through the Democrat Party. Glenn Youngkin won his race handily (more on this election below), and New Jersey Governor Phil Murphy won a narrow victory in a race few thought would be close. Phil Murphy has presided over some of the most onerous COVID-19 restrictions in the nation. Voters came out in heavy numbers to show their opposition to these draconian policies. The New Jersey race is instructive for the election for governor here in Illinois as Governor Pritzker continues his authoritarian approach to the pandemic. Next week the latest 30-day executive orders are set to expire. Will the Governor learn from what has happened in New Jersey and side with the people or will he continue his authoritarian dictates? We will be watching. There is a path to victory for principled conservatives in blue states. The next big win for Republicans in blue states will be right here in Illinois. I am the candidate who can unite our party in defeating JB Pritzker. Join our movement today. Visit to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker. Best Regards, Gary Rabine Get Involved Want to help the Gary Rabine campaign? Go to and sign up! | | ---|--- | Turning Point USA’s Charlie Kirk to headline fundraising event (11/14) Turning Point USA’s Charlie Kirk to headline fundraising event I am pleased to announce Charlie Kirk will be joining me at a rally for freedom on Nov. 14th. I hope you consider attending this exciting event as Charlie Kirk and I talk about the important issues we face nationally and right here in Charlie’s home state of Illinois. About this event: · When: Sunday, November 14th, 2021 · Where: Renaissance Schaumburg Convention Center, located at 1551 Thoreau Dr N, Schaumburg, IL 60173 Additional details: · 3:30-5 PM VIP Meet & Greet, including photo with Charlie · 5:00pm - 7:00pm Charlie, Gary, and additional speakers o $500 per person - VIP Meet & Greet + VIP Seating o $300 per person - VIP Seating o $150 per person - Standard Seating "Event Details Here" Glenn Youngkin wins Virginia gubernatorial election with pro-family message Glenn Youngkin’s victory in the Virginia governor’s race sends a clear message that voters want candidates who will stand up for families and oppose the far-left agenda of woke politicians. I have met Glenn Youngkin and I can tell you he is a common-sense leader who can’t be bought. Throughout his campaign, Glenn sounded the alarm about the war on families. Instead of ignoring the concerns of parents, he embraced them. Not only was his message the right message, but it proved to be a winning message. Woke politicians in Illinois should be worried. In 2022 people in Illinois will stand up for Life, Liberty and Freedom as Virginia has. Governor Pritzker wants to be the wokest of the woke and he continues to ignore common sense and continues to wage his war on families. He has doubled down on vaccine mandates. and mask mandates. He has signed legislation to put sexually explicit and borderline pornographic material into classrooms and he has pushed legislation to take away the Right of Conscience for working people. While Pritzker was not on the ballot in Virginia, his far-left views were. Voters in Virginia rejected woke politics and I am confident voters in Illinois will do the same. Cook County court sides with the cops This week, Cook County Judge Raymond Mitchell put a hold on the Dec. 31st deadline to lay off Chicago City employees who have not been vaccinated. I sent out the following statement hailing this important decision. “This is a win for Chicago Police officers and their union leader, John Catanzara, who simply want to be able to make healthcare decisions for themselves. It is my hope the court will take the next step and rule these vaccine mandates unconstitutional but at least the brave men and women who serve in the Chicago Police Department will not have to worry about losing their jobs as they fight for their right of conscience. The continued overreach of government to control our daily lives should concern each and every one of us. This is not about vaccines. This is about the right of free citizens to make healthcare decisions for themselves. This is about protecting and preserving our freedom and our liberties. Just last week, lawmakers sent the Governor legislation to take away the Right of Conscience for working people. I ask this Governor to stand with working men and women and veto this legislation. JB Pritzker and our legislators swore an oath to uphold the Constitution. It is time he and our leaders in Springfield did their job.” Another dubious distinction for Illinois Illinois ranks 7th in the nation and the highest in the Midwest in job quit rates, according to a new report. In August, a whopping 200,000 Illinoisans quit their jobs. Dubbed the “Great Resignation, the high quit rate is part of a national trend of people leaving their jobs. But in Illinois, the lack of state leadership in helping employers find ways to retain workers is not helping. The hostility toward job creators is only serving to make a bad situation worse. Instead of constantly raising taxes, our leaders would be well served to work with job creators to not only create new jobs in Illinois but find ways to keep those jobs. | Paid for by Rabine for Governor | PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159 A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5e69dbchfij320m7iskkkofatsgbc7mbgjfps08_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chimcoj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhkgo2cjrk9d3r9fop5hmd94qhc2akfiiec7ecu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chimcoj4cjh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zifms7ckm2rj5lmuueeon99rp7kn2q289mn4bcmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chimcoj4cjh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1pvsd9jj1cq4gdahri2odafslkolk9vgmuhr488_rp22sh2s8i66pj3chimcoj4cjh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: Mark Meuser
subject: If you’re reading this, you know how bad things could get in our Nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
I have never seen something as egregious as the vaccine mandate that the federal government is forcing on us |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5518d53911d548569b813a9566a10868&_e=ecpwYMAksGSoa5Vurjw1ca0wkiyVLsrRzYGjZcH6zHuHPa2uKPdLAp1BsS7WGFpQ5rsfVkKYA0bh4x8MdaBXqcTLNE-N5dCR1eYyvAnj8ln7UkxZYMazJNw-r0qr9LoW_5LP0Kdu-Q-F81Pj8ICqcZXdiWfvPduegKNrXVM48uf6_19bqTjtRHYaauTaOzc1XDOr1utxgm_lCEfLXWsdkywLv1Ra3mHyr21BwWbE4Opu3IP4kxHxRtVr_SpQ73Hw5Ecj78Xh8SwOrzOo_7fJI15hFEB4ymUjsIqGL0WBopzus92SfQjiKCyY-pqxSiJ9_zuW_y0vTjETZ1dk52wYyw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I'm a constitutional law attorney. I spend every day reviewing constitutional violations and filing complaints to protect our inalienable rights as Americans. **But I have never seen something as egregious as the vaccine mandate that the federal government is forcing on us.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5518d53911d548569b813a9566a10868&_e=ecpwYMAksGSoa5Vurjw1ca0wkiyVLsrRzYGjZcH6zHuHPa2uKPdLAp1BsS7WGFpQ5rsfVkKYA0bh4x8MdaBXqcTLNE-N5dCR1eYyvAnj8ln7UkxZYMazJNw-r0qr9LoWN_yMzVpywL7m-wGpaPn-7sOTQKaAmPNg7IO2VWZP3W6CWdwlCebhV00M8UsuCwmXjbjEeOMrYkGiyTLv44hujNwVNp-5_bJ0YdTW-9CAqpwy2v09V7VJQdOmSGvfMVpEQwRD_G6RdvUwZu3S9mo1PrgrDdM62ld2ieH-Wt7wv8yefZmgTbUxKWT06hGZCzEYroHiO5byPE6drwWrPKwl_A%3D%3D)

Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and to now add potential forced vaccinations. **Democrats' overreach is beyond out of control, and some liberal legal pundits and the mainstream media think that mandating medical treatment is within the government's right. Let me assure you, it is not.**

You may not be the target of the first rounds of vaccine mandates, but it's only a matter of time before Democrats force you to be vaccinated even to leave your house.

As for today's announcement from OSHA, my firm and I have already filed a lawsuit to stop these mandates.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5518d53911d548569b813a9566a10868&_e=ecpwYMAksGSoa5Vurjw1ca0wkiyVLsrRzYGjZcH6zHuHPa2uKPdLAp1BsS7WGFpQ5rsfVkKYA0bh4x8MdaBXqcTLNE-N5dCR1eYyvAnj8ln7UkxZYMazJNw-r0qr9LoW8o7WXU3trcB7psker5_ygtv13lTBQfA1-SS5IMjG7z1Y3s90xYvyNO8272RrBBMaIAm6Ly-DYYYgnHw515ZffDyoIYjNwaaNP9gFcow8tSXx_LtPrJUa2gU5Ivv0ShJdJiLgx9G8fpco518lOoKDm5Ph_8RdNO49b-yX-veUgZh8qgHmXgSlNJBFUrFriHrtBV1sYwYPqJdC-IjjQeGp7Q%3D%3D)
**It is outrageous that whether we can work if we’re unvaccinated will be decided by a group of bureaucrats we didn't even elect!**

Chances are if you are reading this, you agree with me that the heavy hand of government has gone too far. [**You know that it is a violation of our rights as Americans to have our medical autonomy taken away from us.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5518d53911d548569b813a9566a10868&_e=ecpwYMAksGSoa5Vurjw1ca0wkiyVLsrRzYGjZcH6zHuHPa2uKPdLAp1BsS7WGFpQ5rsfVkKYA0bh4x8MdaBXqcTLNE-N5dCR1eYyvAnj8ln7UkxZYMazJNw-r0qr9LoWtleVDhUNut2q47OvGq8gW-vMQSgukNHKLv63jL99CQVb9YSfg6TzM3T7ozclNCytMF93JNI9qjfUuD95B099Z4Y8oNTHzGGJPpMgGa44gNlVR9LR2bswidkaJHbyAx5qpadfzjX-Jrk_5bWqX_C8JOc0QnZt8EEYxL2NTaJKnNE5xNTBLRFw_74SUU4biCp_5Svp4HdbRW4KwU3HOKGbeQ%3D%3D)

[**But being reactive can only be effective for so long. I need your help to get to the root of the problem. Can you help me make it to the U.S. Senate where I can stop this government overreach at the source?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5518d53911d548569b813a9566a10868&_e=ecpwYMAksGSoa5Vurjw1ca0wkiyVLsrRzYGjZcH6zHuHPa2uKPdLAp1BsS7WGFpQ5rsfVkKYA0bh4x8MdaBXqcTLNE-N5dCR1eYyvAnj8ln7UkxZYMazJNw-r0qr9LoWQW85vUbMosNvCOCP1xPC4I1gj2wzPSsF_oXN-eHGqqxfs60yWME2XR6nF5DbDCMzGDUeovQZGNSORqvXKVt_0EJGICvVQGFuNgML16Kcvxeysilkijqs-kPyUR7BkQ4Upa_WTyDISBMtvFpNKGiFzROyrdOOELIF7qCK2vLt2YcScABbEMo6io1618QqP2vSOfhuDNvMAl0tfRlq7OBT0A%3D%3D)

Running for office as a Republican in California is a challenging but winnable battle. We need to stay strong and show our opponent that we are ready to take him on. [**Can you help power my campaign for U.S. Senate by making a quick contribution of $5 or more today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5518d53911d548569b813a9566a10868&_e=ecpwYMAksGSoa5Vurjw1ca0wkiyVLsrRzYGjZcH6zHuHPa2uKPdLAp1BsS7WGFpQ5rsfVkKYA0bh4x8MdaBXqcTLNE-N5dCR1eYyvAnj8ln7UkxZYMazJNw-r0qr9LoW6bjuLAXzHND5HOI0Z_LroAFe-7vwtQsj-QQOgj7NwBDoKq4fJ1yAcQIRlUCAGFKaZOe5hlSdOCcv0j39XI3854r7Zi3LKDxWRIV8P7hhL0SY5dFOZhHcQjqxNdHR3ZuN8F7FBeGJJhmhFN01-TSlfkUnU9VjCwwpBm1yKUrqYzHhDLblWFOcExeqYRxEBFrFpFOcyDyl8DXkgp2xe08NDw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

**Mark Meuser**
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[** Donate Now >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5518d53911d548569b813a9566a10868&_e=ecpwYMAksGSoa5Vurjw1ca0wkiyVLsrRzYGjZcH6zHuHPa2uKPdLAp1BsS7WGFpQ5rsfVkKYA0bh4x8MdaBXqcTLNE-N5dCR1eYyvAnj8ln7UkxZYMazJNw-r0qr9LoWjnul8c_CkydKLAzN4lqoHF1foFDnNGDJFZU2QE4D8JrREWJvGhRzXEapdUNbflugHDVEhtN1-lbUgnu66sEV3bpqG9_ylcPK7UVDZcn0DpOxNkXMRMSa6DMpisroD9BO9oehp_2_AZS6sv5WgaMxG1aaP29c85Tr-JXQAiBr8n7UIy6W3ULtbrMXnrrOTfxx6Dj3T3rvg2wD5H3lgI_EUA%3D%3D)

body:
We have several events scheduled in Mid-Missouri, and I wanted to provide you with additional details. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7c6adb59bd25/i-hope-to-see-you-soon?e=4df934edcc)
---
| |
---
| | ‪Friends,

I have spent the past two months traveling across the 4th District—listening to Missourians, meeting with voters, grassroots activists, and elected leaders, and spreading the message about my campaign.

We have several events scheduled in Mid-Missouri, and I wanted to provide you with additional details.

**_Upcoming Events-Please RSVP & Share!_

November 7:**
Jamestown Bonfire, Hot Dogs, Dessert & Fixings
‪4:00 – 5:30 PM
‪Advanced Chimney Techniques
365 W. Row St, Jamestown, MO 65046
Freewill donations accepted
‪
**‪November 9:**
Columbia Meet-and-Greet
‪5:30 – 7:00 PM
Dickey BBQ
‪1412 Forum Blvd, Ste 130, Columbia, MO 65203
‪
‪**November 12:**
Prairie Home Fish Fry
‪4:30-6:30pm
‪Prairie Home Missouri Lions Club
517 Main St, Prairie Home, MO 65068
Freewill donations accepted
‪
‪**November 16: **
Claysville Chicken Dinner
‪5:30-7:00 PM
Claysville Store
‪5650 Claysville Rd, Hartsburg, MO 65039
Suggested Contribution: $50/person or $75/couple
‪Host Committee: $500

**November 22:**
California Steak Dinner
5:30-7:00PM
Centennial Hall at the Moniteau County Fairgrounds
610 E South St, California, MO 65018
Freewill donations accepted
Host level: $500
Sponsor level: $250

We’re running a grassroots-powered campaign—county-by-county, city-by-city, and person-by-person. Your support is essential as we work to Defend the American Dream.

If you can host a meet-and-greet so others can learn more about our campaign, or if you are planning to attend any of the events above, please reply to this email.

I hope to see you soon!

God Bless!
Sara Walsh
