name: Bruno Amato
subject: Speaker McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
If we don’t double down on our efforts, that could be a reality. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoJUmEIvv2tpr47ZCn3v2NNrpNe6-m8BU2ZYWfFAC_NiGbmm1m5s1l6YCBWSfNvY1Yu_1ngH3TvM6Vuw2Zhy7439WSy1k5YLvV_u587TxibvEsx59Gtfk9bCMqo5s0cQrf8-2v0jAbX0hBgUYSsXGoZZdl48j1Ctim_KC5t9QsMMML64vWH0nTxlpQ91bbCas1gLxkE_XqAfHLLxCR_SL_xZSWhSHRjLeKudnvTJUC0yXFYM48MQo6b4GcWIUZWCSUrzFpzug8SSMgJvfAwndhTJWssN82VzsJgymQ09cjeqlDvyRxMMA8foDrgUznAaba/3gr/QXRT7oUJQ6WEAfWR75_eng/h0/fzsUwdjc5TURxV5fAeEIgxf-0DKQMkiOhR-HKdbtHjA)
---
Folks,

Dave Wasserman, the election guru who rarely gets a race wrong, issued a stark warning to Democrats on Tuesday night: | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoJUmEIvv2tpr47ZCn3v2NNrpNe6-m8BU2ZYWfFAC_NiGbmm1m5s1l6YCBWSfNvY1Yu_1ngH3TvM6Vuw2Zhy7439BOsAe7nOPXGRa4JM0I5N5uhSzyX6qm4nRQr0FCSQWlY5Nblyj73W5n1CTIER2yLBa4aHIR5lINwAtJvPvJLmRc5GDXgsID4LSIFdPcR5MltyTBsgAU3A0xQyn08vdUZTuH9SL7xajn6dWaspdcTaNLqSHhu3PW1Buq4DhLEfioCaXNSjd21KtVNdT0JbPPl0sIjOg4viBjjy69Kx13M1GUOb9z3Bj7oDCbJCA-GN5R/3gr/QXRT7oUJQ6WEAfWR75_eng/h1/7yFC4eQOpGLIpaeIDCyX8SDNgbD2TJGIoUvWxrKtk4U)
---
That’s right, if we don’t up our game immediately, Kevin McCarthy could be in the Speaker’s chair to start off the next Congress.

**It’s up to us to stop that from happening.[Can you rush a $5, $15, or $25 donation to our campaign today to help stop the Republican momentum and show Kevin McCarthy that we’ve had enough of his failed leadership?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoJUmEIvv2tpr47ZCn3v2NNrpNe6-m8BU2ZYWfFAC_NiGbmm1m5s1l6YCBWSfNvY1YUivEgdoCsvrmISo2JLSwidRWVOBgMaAP6uFpzJb25Vlpvgs1o0I-783QYYcAHDIjY5nfKwotw35x00fV0kONZB-yrK3iZ-bQKmZ4PM8ayIw6ulxxQBqcyMJXN7pdf421T53PpOz5LseqI-NtxKCZRnCXosth6N7jsp0rZ0bJGOc1HkT6O_f7iVX8qbWg94f7pwNOndxT3EumJ9RMYqZXY5xAuAfNZO8s7V46A_rBKuK3ZCtY2oy7LsWaGuVv0vDx/3gr/QXRT7oUJQ6WEAfWR75_eng/h2/xYNocv5BZCBit1Eu2zThfxhwNw_4lBViGmS5jIVCVWY)**

Now, folks, I know that the results in Virginia weren't what we hoped for, but we’ve got to take this as a wake-up call.

Republicans across the country are going to be more motivated than ever before, but I know that with the grassroots support we’ve already seen from across CA-23, we can build a campaign capable of unseating Kevin McCarthy once and for all.

And with just over a year until Election Day, your support now is more critical than ever before.

clean_body: If we don’t double down on our efforts, that could be a reality. | | | Folks, Dave Wasserman, the election guru who rarely gets a race wrong, issued a stark warning to Democrats on Tuesday night: | That’s right, if we don’t up our game immediately, Kevin McCarthy could be in the Speaker’s chair to start off the next Congress. It’s up to us to stop that from happening. Now, folks, I know that the results in Virginia weren't what we hoped for, but we’ve got to take this as a wake-up call. Republicans across the country are going to be more motivated than ever before, but I know that with the grassroots support we’ve already seen from across CA-23, we can build a campaign capable of unseating Kevin McCarthy once and for all. And with just over a year until Election Day, your support now is more critical than ever before. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. Let’s do this, Bruno Amato | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: Leslie Hubert
subject: Find out how to run for local office!
body:
Another Local Candidate Bootcamp! Join us from the comfort of your own home!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_local_candidatebootca3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Hi Friend -- After the great response we received following our Monday night Bootcamp, we've added more to the calendar! We wanted to make sure that you saw our **Virtual Candidate Bootcamp****** coming up on November 11th, December 6th, and December 8th. We will cover how to set up your campaign, working with local stakeholders, how to effectively message and so much more! Join us as we walk through an in-depth overview of how to run a successful campaign. Whether you're considering or committed to running for local office, or perhaps you're helping someone else run, we hope you'll join us from the comfort of your own home, and learn what it takes to run! **Zoom-In:** Thursday, November 11th @ 9am Monday, December 6th @ 7pm Wednesday, December 8th @ 7pm
##### _*When you RSVP, you'll receive the zoom link, no later than an hour before the bootcamp, and course materials._
| [](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_11_11_2021?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_local_candidatebootca3&n=2 "NOVEMBER 11th RSVP") [NOVEMBER 11th RSVP](https://act.wisgop.org/virtual_candidate_training_11_11_2021?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=virtual_local_candidatebootca3&n=2)

Our only hope of turning this around is a **_SURGE_** of support for Democrats in key battlegrounds, but **we’re falling short of our critical $20,000 fundraising goal.**

| | Peter,

As a doctor, I know that it is critical that every single person have access to quality, affordable health care. That includes reproductive health care.

Republicans disagree. In 2021, Republicans have enacted the highest number of restrictions on abortion in one year.

It’s extremely disappointing that Republican legislators have made destroying abortion access a top priority. But it won’t discourage me from fighting back.

Abortion access has always been a priority of mine. In the state legislature, I’ve championed access to reproductive health care. In Congress, I will fight to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law so that we guarantee abortion rights and reproductive health care are never threatened again.

name: Erica Smith
subject: I wanted to share my very personal experience with abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Nothing should stand in the way of a person’s right to abortion.
#
Earlier this week, the Supreme Court started hearing arguments for Texas’ extreme six-week abortion ban (S.B. 8) — and whatever outcome is decided will set legal precedent for protecting abortion access across the country.
**So today I wanted to share my very personal experience with abortion.**
I had my youngest son, Elias, at 22 weeks. He was very premature as a result of preeclampsia and pregnancy-induced hypertension. It was a really scary situation.
At 16 weeks, my doctors told me that if I continued my pregnancy I would be risking my own death. This meant I faced an incredibly difficult decision. Before Elias’ delivery, I had to decide on priority of life. **“If it comes down to it,” my care team asked, “Do you want us to save you or your unborn child?"**
Only I could make that decision. Despite my infinite love for my children and family, I made the decision for doctors to save my baby if they could not save us both.
This experience has shaped my views and policy positions on abortion rights. **Nothing should stand in the way of a person’s right to abortion.**
With the rise of back-door attempts at overturning abortion rights across several states, including here in North Carolina, we can’t afford to wait to codify Roe v. Wade any longer.
**We’ll have a fighting chance at doing so by electing Democratic U.S. Senators in 2022 who will proudly vote to end the filibuster and defend the right to safe, legal abortion.**
Send me to the Senate, and I promise I’ll be the deciding YES vote on both. So, I’m humbly asking you: [**Can you please consider making a donation to our campaign today? As your next U.S. Senator from North Carolina, I’ll do everything I can to codify Roe v. Wade and protect abortion rights.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25366?refcode=em20211105-613&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=613%2E3698%2EIleD0J)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25366?refcode=em20211105-613&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=613%2E3698%2EIleD0J)**
In solidarity,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25366?refcode=em20211105-other-613&t=21&akid=613%2E3698%2EIleD0J)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211105-613-footer&t=22&refcode2=613_3698_IleD0J&akid=613%2E3698%2EIleD0J)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Sarah
subject: RESPONSE NEEDED: Will you join Trump's site, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__

My name’s Blake Cilwick, and I’m the Campaign Manager for Winter for Montana. I’ve spent a lot of time with Tom over the past few years, and I have to tell you: he’s the real deal.

Tom loves this state and the people who keep it running — and he’s ready to fight and win against the billionaire out-of-staters and multinational corporations that think they can make our home their own personal playground.

We have a plan to win this race — but there are a lot of expenses to starting up a campaign, and we’re not exactly going to be able to count on out-of-state billionaires to help out. That’s why I’m setting a goal to raise $5,000 in grassroots donations in the first two weeks of this race.

Will you help us send a message that the working people of Montana are fighting to protect our home?

**_[Contribute $3 before November 17 to join Tom and all of us on the Winter for Montana team in this fight and help reach our $5,000 grassroots launch goal. We can do this.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXVsTjN42yK5GrRjm5AvG6QvPNQOUlpP1q7hH2SLJe27GFPQUssLDmPTOYq9rXj7zpoqQoMMk5N05CLYUmnIKHyrLYdxRcIjyn0gMGv8TDhV91hXvSbJK9rt77pRSaG3nQrr9kKu3UYdbUuGqNIZfYyX2bMfnVFtKV3pP875yWQ_nR9NEfwCv9jCFf6VMDk8Q3wPc2ydO_rOKctor-eT19rrAg3CNL57z6xYZDXYQs167aUqfPC1RYmzTVGgKaWD2kAsvC5T4uPdjyV6V198nqzj6m4jSYMnHrlu2HhnBfeAkfnaaVjK_XOTpBlwChyykwaRARzFw2Zpshe8tdaCTyEMMY8nBqB0VMy5d2JERUzqjsIESMBIbdWxgGFi7SS23DBgU_rZoRmuRP-pDVA4jH6TA/3gr/ykRbPMbhSqO7jpVjbOb7DQ/h2/-P7zS4iUgpbihfvCyRuNnQTXcUE5k0LP4kyEoNO0p4c)_** | [ CONTRIBUTE >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXVsTjN42yK5GrRjm5AvG6QvPNQOUlpP1q7hH2SLJe27GFPQUssLDmPTOYq9rXj7zpoXWeoJrZ0EhwwYsPO8oKZL2u1T0T8FkJYfmcTldxCAoaZfYmmVrRJAyanbBq1jGnhLmUH_TrUWtzhpfanGR5JndcptY1ld1NA29P9XUX7jr9pjmdieWUq3vgInQlodOfoF_hKxXqBtN2Aj1dpOSOjlo6rE5rPlCsgJrhTGeCiNSucMkdVsK5jQ4n-GQkqdg-RkJ3cnIT1w4Qu9ABjNNLwMMnDlerdTb1NdB06fAGY-OJ6RyBfhCV0vDHWikg5WX_Kh6PdeH1MmwxA45TbvpmDTmhpczg7lLi1Sx_chD1-4ni4v4ygZOMMSwrjupGtFcZAEyRzg-1fZzWsBVbzs-z2-A/3gr/ykRbPMbhSqO7jpVjbOb7DQ/h3/rEK98ZcyYzaWHein3YvHxvF929_vgnYICNbWuiV4pTs)

This isn’t going to be easy. But there are too many working Montanans barely hanging on for us to give up.

Montanans deserve dignified wages. We deserve homes, healthcare, an education, pure air, clean water, and safety from economic and environmental threats. We deserve politicians that actually live here, that share in our struggles, that aren't bought. We deserve the equity and justice they deny us.

I’m proud to stand with Tom because I know that with his leadership, we can reestablish the union strength, the anti-corruption tradition, and the broadly shared prosperity that Montana used to stand for. Together.

Are you in?

**_[Help us hit the ground running. Contribute $3 to Winter for Montana today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXVsTjN42yK5GrRjm5AvG6QvPNQOUlpP1q7hH2SLJe27GFPQUssLDmPTOYq9rXj7zpo2B2QPCUpHTeQgH766jFbxGiMFAfn-UHQSAcEwsVf_60AalmVHHpq5sMdwdU1BMnv9ly2pjfIdxVA_wf8XGHxKPbuPEO5COUc32BcP6RfG0epvfMS6tOwsQfRsMs1DKUo6KwQPrlNRXFpq398_x4xgltSW3vj-Qgpbkg4T1om-nZLDNElEzHYQ8ASrXDSozegmWmiaFZktqIXiL2fxEZOaJL2p5Ddo9HA90brgewZytSeYL7XJQ5_h9GOXN1P2iwv43NKs7EPX9XRnx3w6u09F6yH8yJrmc1Y-UYBR4agoJNKfFh9sAFu8UL-8OnC3e_-pYTKwYRMDyLI5G8mtTq1Xw/3gr/ykRbPMbhSqO7jpVjbOb7DQ/h4/cLn3Gj0Yx0uFR0zNmGaZkTmtGX6iEKDH4lrWIko0bFU)_**

I’ll see you on the campaign trail,

Blake

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: Devin Nunes is vulnerable, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him.

President Biden is abusing his power to use the full force of the federal government to make private businesses vaccinate employees.

If businesses do not comply, they will rack up fines surpassing **$130,000**. This is an unprecedented overreach by President Biden that will result in**labor shortages and irreparable damage to small businesses.**

**Join us in the fight against Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate!**

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: School Board Recall Qualifies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Parent Revolution](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorXnb7jqHvljKc-yx_oF7zPq1ZcRh9xan1_O1DwIDfDaw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_5b&n=1) This week's election in Virginia was about parental choice in schools. While California may be a “bluer” state, our parents are even more motivated. 2022 will be a good year. One extraordinary sign: A Recall against three school board members has qualified for the ballot in _San Francisco_ thanks to the signatures of tens of thousands of parents – and even SF’s very liberal state senator just announced he’s supporting it. Meanwhile, thousands of parents are coming to the Capitol on November 15 to rally against Newsom’s K-12 student mandate. It’s been over a month since he bragged California was “the first state in the nation” to impose one. We’re still the only state. Even other blue states are rejecting the mandate, and a leading infectious disease expert has just withdrawn her support for it. I’m calling on Newsom to do the right thing for once and rescind it immediately. All of this is fueling a movement of parents unlike we've ever seen. By electing leaders who put kids first and passing a school choice initiative for funding to follow the child, this parent revolution can turn California politics on its head in 2022. [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAz55JAsylVVp-vF33tvlRrQeWjAXRx4KHhTi7CxI17iOw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_5b&n=2) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_5b&n=3)California Legislator p.s. Thank you to everyone who responded to [my last post](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziop9mzIcV7R6JucTeZaHBppe-TqVmAq0ubJWtndBQu2NCA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_5b&n=4) about my plans for the 2022 election. (So far there's a favorite among the three choices.) Your feedback has been very thoughtful and I'm truly appreciative.
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_5b&n=5).

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Donald Trump is holding a $25,000 per person fundraiser for our top Republican opponent. Can you help us fight back by donating today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Trump and our opponent are holding a big fundraising event at Mar-a-Lago.
#
Peter,
This is not the news we wanted to see heading into the weekend:
NEWS | Jake Sherman | Friday, November 5, 2021 **Trump Fundraising For Republican at Mar-a-Lago** Former President Donald Trump will host a January fundraiser for the top Pennsylvania GOP Senate candidate in January.
---
Trump is holding a massive fundraiser — up to $25,000 per person — to bankroll the top Republican candidate in this Senate race and keep PA red.
Pennsylvania is the #1 opportunity for Dems to flip a Senate seat! We can’t afford to be outraised and outspent here reaching voters. [**Can you help counter this big influx of GOP cash by donating $5 right now before the weekend?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37156?refcode=em20211105-3355&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3355%2E434096%2EKv6bnm)
**[Rush a $5 donation>>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37156?refcode=em20211105-3355&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3355%2E434096%2EKv6bnm)**
With Trump’s full backing, the Republicans could break major fundraising records. Just to give you a kind of idea of Trump’s fundraising prowess, he raked in $20 million once in a SINGLE night during a virtual fundraising event.
We can’t fall behind, because the reality is 8-in-10 congressional elections are won by the candidate who spends the most money.
Peter, the good news is that while Trump and the Republicans have a bunch of donors who can afford to give $25k each on their side, we have something much more potent: a genuine grassroots campaign with hundreds of thousands of supporters. For example, if everyone reading this email donated just $1, we could instantly match the sum raised by nearly 40 max-out donors to our opponent.
[**So, what do you say? Can you kick in $5 right now to help us counter this Trump fundraising event? We can compete dollar-for-dollar, but only if a lot of people step up today to chip in.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37156?refcode=em20211105-3355&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3355%2E434096%2EKv6bnm)
Thanks for everything you’re doing to help win this pivotal election.
Sincerely,
Eric Stern 💙
Deputy Campaign Manager
Fetterman for PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211105-3355-footer&t=22&refcode2=3355_434096_Kv6bnm&akid=3355%2E434096%2EKv6bnm)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3355%2E434096%2EKv6bnm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3355%2E434096%2EKv6bnm)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Marco Lopez for Governor
subject: we need you to sign on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38346910/315048637/-89788242?code=jtk285-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Flopez-2021-oct-strategy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzhjZTYxMi05YTNlLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGAtcHAkvnJFQ5NBI1kXPdpkUO7QNo-a6WwfrThZrHo=&emci=deb60cfd-5d3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e38ce612-9a3e-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6085109)
---
Friend, it's obvious that Arizona deserves better than the failed leadership of Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kari Lake. We need a governor who will focus on what Arizonans truly need – from voting rights to health care to education. We need restoration of our state's potential. We need a leader we can believe in.
**Marco Lopez (D) is that leader. He's an Obama administration alum, a voting rights champion and a small business owner. And now, he's running for governor with the experience we need to flip Arizona blue and defend our democracy.**

Hello,
I’ve dedicated my life to service, enlisting at the age of 20 in the U.S. Navy and serving nearly 40 years before retiring as a three-star Admiral.
Now I’m running for U.S. Senate against Chuck Grassley because elected officials in Washington need to get back to true public service – not serving their own interests and those of their campaign donors.
That’s why talking to voters and grassroots Democrats has been my favorite part of running for office. Nothing can replace hearing directly from the people who are trusting you to be a steward for them and their families in DC.

Friend,
**Let’s be real. There was a reason President Trump referred to him as Sleepy Joe...**
Just this week, Biden embarrassed us on the world’s stage by falling asleep at the global climate summit, COP26! What’s worse? He never seems to know where he is. Sadly, his cognitive decline is much worse than we all expected!
**This is troubling. And it’s clear, Biden is unable to fulfill his duties as ** **Commander in Chief.**

clean_body: | | | | The world is laughing, we need leadership Friend, Let’s be real. There was a reason President Trump referred to him as Sleepy Joe... Just this week, Biden embarrassed us on the world’s stage by falling asleep at the global climate summit, COP26! What’s worse? He never seems to know where he is. Sadly, his cognitive decline is much worse than we all expected! This is troubling. And it’s clear, Biden is unable to fulfill his duties as Commander in Chief. If that isn’t enough, just take a look at disastrous policy positions which have made America less safe! Open and unsecured borders, inflation that is out of control, and excessive government overreach with COVID-19 shot mandates! We know Liberal Lisa won’t stand up to him, she’s already FAILED us by being his Chief Enabling Officer! Don’t wait until it is too late. We need to put America First. Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

clean_body: Democrats got wiped away on Election Day. We need to keep the momentum going and save our country. Help us retake the Senate. Fellow American, We are seeing the beginning of a red wave. Americans are tired of failed liberal policies, and even in blue Virginia, Republicans took back the governorship and the State House. Fellow American, we need to keep this momentum going. Even now, many of the races that previously leaned Democratic, are now toss-ups. Americans are ready for change, Fellow American. They’re ready to bring back real conservative leadership to our country. But we need your help to make it happen. We need to take back critical Senate seats, . Fellow American, the truth is that this loss is going to motivate the Democrats. They are going to come out and vote in droves, and they are going to spend BILLIONS to make sure that their radical-left candidates win. Help take a stand for the constitution, for law enforcement, for our children, and for freedom. clean_body: We can no longer afford it | | | | | | | | | Friend, Joe Biden displays nothing but weakness to other world leaders. Recently he attended a climate change conference at the United Nations and fell asleep during speeches. In what way is this acceptable behavior for a world leader? He touts how hard of a stance he takes on things, but the reality is that he is a weak puppet for the Radical Left. Let me be clear, the Radical Left does not see him as the leader of the country. They see him as a puppet with a big name that they can use to push their woke agenda on all of us. I remember a time when other world leaders feared and respected the American president because of his strength, now they simply laugh at him. America needs to regain our position of global dominance, and that starts with electing strong leaders. God Bless, Fred Keller (Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress) Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress Our mailing address is: 23 North Derr Drive, Suite 2 Lewisburg, PA 17837 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek,****

****What a terrific week for Republicans here in New Hampshire, and across the country. For those who missed it, this past Tuesday was Election Day, and the results were phenomenal!****

We had a multitude of winning elections here in the Granite State on Tuesday! Please join me in congratulating the following candidates (but not exclusive to):

Rochester Mayor-Elect, Paul Callaghan
Rochester City Councilor, Jim Gray (re-elected)
Keene Mayor, George Hansel (re-elected)

Manchester School Committeeman, Carlos Gonzalez (re-elected)
Manchester Alderman, Sebastian Sharonov (re-elected)
Manchester Alderman, Ed Sapienza (re-elected)
Manchester Alderman-at-large, Joe Kelly Levasseur (re-elected)
Laconia City Council, Henry Lipman
Concord City Councilor, Keith Nyham (re-elected)

I would also like to wish our Governor Chris Sununu a very happy birthday! The past few years have been a whirlwind of new obstacles for our state to take on, and I appreciate Governor Sununu’s willingness to address these hurdles and put Granite Staters at the forefront of his policy initiatives.

****Finally, I want to encourage everyone to consider running for local office. Our state party has great resources in addition to experienced staff members who can assist you in exploring campaign options. The election successes we just witnessed are only the beginning of big wins for NH Republicans, so if you have ever thought about getting involved locally, now is a great time to do so. Click the link below to take a brief survey, and an NHGOP staff member will reach out to you for further information. **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| | **T****hank you to everyone who made our first ever NH Republican Women’s Leadership Conference & Retreat a massive success! This is the first time New Hampshire has held an event of this size entirely dedicated to GOP women. NHFRW is operating at our highest capacity ever, producing consistent results for our members and raising more money than we have in years past which we are utilizing strategically to spread our message and build our bench of Republican women! **

**We'd like to thank Jay Lucas & Karen Ballou Lucas for hosting our Opening Night Welcome Party in Portsmouth, NH featuring US Senator Kelly Ayotte, Executive Councillor Janet Stevens & our Lilac Society Sponsors: Corky Messner & the NH Advantage PAC and Gail Huff Brown. **

**We'd also like to thank NHGOP Vice Chair Pamela Tucker for hosting our Cocktails & Capitalism Closing Reception in Rye Beach, NH featuring Karoline Leavitt, Gail Huff Brown, Matt Mowers, Tim Baxter and Julian Acciard! **

**During our conference, we heard from NHFRW President Elizabeth Girard, Governor Chris Sununu, Speaker Pro Tempore Rep Kim Rice, RNC National Committeewoman Juliana Bergeron, RNC Director of Women's Engagement Vanessa Faura and Speaker Linda Upmeyer from the Iowa GOP - among others! We received publicity from the National Federation of Republican Women, WMUR, Governor Chris Sununu and so many of you! We are so appreciative of all the support within our organization! **

**Congratulations to NHFRW President Elizabeth Girard on being reelected unanimously for a second term as the youngest State President nationwide and the 2022-2023 Executive Officers: Rep Deb Hobson (1st VP), Hon. Jane Johnson (2nd VP), Nicole Martin (3rd VP), Donni Hodgkins (4th VP), Hon. Linda Rea Camarota (Secretary), Danielle Rieger (Assistant Secretary), Virginia Drye (Communications Director), Jessica Kallipolites (Treasurer), Elizabeth Ann Moreau (Assistant Treasurer), Christine Peters (Director), Rep. Jeanine Notter (Director) and Hon. Jane Lane (Director). We are currently building our Advisory Board of appointed chairs for 2022-2023! If you're interested in serving in a larger role within the Federation - you can join for 2022 and apply **[**HERE**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nhfrw.org%2Fjoin/1/0100017cf20e76bb-8aa959bd-b5e5-4fcb-8f20-3729e998fbb8-000000/V3VJ4RESEvWeAtKkQMu3oQhJs7E=243)

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

body:
**OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** **Katie Britt On Ruthless Podcast** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zf3XLoQqWu3pMcrqp-Xl7qOF4XcYxSFtUZu3XqObUmt-RbeniBhvAN4Qlao2OFUcZzPE9qxKSgrJ5noJFEyGQo81U_lMGkuDcsPJwiGzoaax7ToT_ijjvqcU49B_lwZCf1nVdwpHZPZXHNdTO4oV1ofKpygoZcmNUnpIXCFxvLaEMBPGpO8pniVZa_EKfRLx_F7KCjHTFULmoQ58loGJM16b26iAGr9H_Gml2nJpvlSSlQAPaWMIJ2loaBCVXSYIUY%3D) I had the opportunity to discuss our campaign on the [Ruthless Podcast](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zcLqjWHq6oAOjAYI_Z-2hiAzpNgePRs8--LSuxWYZS3pxXHfNn-eg81spc1JxyStV4UWjU3W1iIpT0ZM_y5qB-_oxhQETwiaV9bISlNnvs-F_iQVvlzt5MtAxQXyBW8x_4YQJvohoRa5Ion1hIpS1_RHQuhcKOeXWCbEUd0VJoXIZu2yWJGEeD941B3u1SiXxvT3QCvb5SNBnDpO5MoxOTMim8Vn6EaHjBor2y2yiTtgVtTCGfYopuu9WVfKD0Carw%3D) (now the most listened to political podcast in the nation) this week! Our interview covered a range of topics, including the battle to preserve the American Dream for our children and our children’s children. You can listen to the full episode here: [https://open.spotify.com/episode/73gOIES4jEpA62upQacvH.](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-Vt5y2cvyacsto-Z9TbXbLuS1ihcRYfMsqCKSgWpW_eN2pvzL2C2racdo8_nITA5XRomL_iU5IIhJxDIKsFt9HhpMUsTAi9a_p2ohR-P6JCc8tyX52a_ZmRu3V0PgxpYivSok-DztCz06bqp5ON7TFprYY069B2-o5aFaPyX7NyNsvrQ01caGP6vAnFpcQGfL4MWjHTi4ADgVkEncSGT2MwYeqU7_k3oP4-iN4qwS5MuoasW843huDbyY7vqOFaZ73YKcbgi9HMClavsTFgLIuyjGa9wdsptVA3MG7cPiJSAeUpLPnCFxlPwjKIKCstvntKDJ5RlVq6Y9KeKiBqGITfwO1Bzke--JYMnzHBwTTPYuFf81YZJ_0fBSAQHWFOBXhIyJLOlmM-P2LAKR7mWP-ihIELyQ28BI8_yqVTaAzMqQXka9mx8pJX9ozXLc60vKPQ%3D%3D) [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zf3XLoQqWu3pMcrqp-Xl7qOF4XcYxSFtUZu3XqObUmt-fIfji9QBomRiKAcY89Br6JQndX4O0zy7c3DUvSQxhh0NAiPivnwpWEyEma6rxGuwhGVHlNDpXMpXl-Qk-OV3ScJhHCVJfpecRaU5YDVQjDUao2qC0W0YS-p9vhLHbbFVqBR80EdhBXPXtMyK1KDnaAZiUVjBarSYKqam0AJOEBUqmnyTwjfR0UqApQF3gL47XuGY9Q5NNvLfBjMZAWJB3k%3D) **Katie Britt urges state lawmakers take action against
Biden vaccine mandates** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zc3m1iq5LUHQ0cD0yD8f4apAZlBIENJMEI10AiOShznw5qR-pZvLWU7wsAfRGh6Nlnf5Ff4lVl7mtwZrUxT1ZSQkQU3gpj2FHSh4FPg4INLGbKucLKaphKFepkuTHQr7H_UOTyiyOPhYc9-et7mYeCJG3hIsklHTaoeSYdP_IvNSLYFkZ7y7hSsFour1jNAC77Npt08-aG0IrBd3zHzNHsBTZT2TLcnBQqvTjWwu--y1L53j0JEhRsXGxBLxBmBUQLWudUV7JOWzeBv9jbG5-qP) I urge our lawmakers to pass legislation to protect the freedom of hardworking Alabamians. The State of Alabama should do everything within its power to preserve liberty and jobs across our state. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zc3m1iq5LUHQ0cD0yD8f4apAZlBIENJMEI10AiOShznw5qR-pZvLWU7wsAfRGh6Nln1Q7Y-I27KBz468zrwGG91ucwZh6kZl6Oo7_nywUl8gE9fKGFdDKEHRfHd8fIYzQ6uxk5MG0ub7sqB8xpMi4xe6UJf0GX6AB7Jlw8dGu_LpYS8RtGpo_Otp68ytj7Q3mbs4G_BpAUMx9O3FyDOvHxOXXGVYW3rglYBibVW5_xnY2GXVbXeETy7n4tyx2NnIIKw83a8-ieygOy0VsnZenZs) ****Britt: Joe Biden’s administration continues on a path of reckless overspending and dictatorial overreaching**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zc3m1iq5LUHQ0cD0yD8f4apWF38WW-yvQw-cyvOEGTDysPwfSkwx84ZQC-AYsS2ninN528cv-E-zwdy9zYARJbZKkZb-fH2SE5vFe0SahSw13NN2dKx93yWjlfFo_sH_m8GagcbUzvjLw6UBaOb1dFPdjWuGJxfufi8yeHQwFzGk4_hkYsOlutXA6HtDJsi1ZNXW_rFkJLp-j_tyQPZM91RJeZVoVmQQvtv4fouzlhwyM3X3lTSzwMnVUF9fU-e9jGUNlN3lmmXvDMJM9YyAMih) The Biden Administration’s plan would turn the IRS into Big Brother, giving the federal government the ability to monitor the money going in and out of every American financial account with an annual total of $10,000 or more in transactions. Venmo, CashApp, local bank, community credit union — you name it, your financial account would be in the IRS’ crosshairs if you make or spend an average of $28 a day. Millions of Americans not suspected of cheating on their taxes or any other wrongdoing would have their Fourth Amendment rights thrown out the window by Biden’s proposal, representing an unprecedented invasion of privacy. We need to continue to let our voices be heard loud and clear until this proposal is dead and buried. Protecting individual freedoms and privacy is crucial for all Alabamians and all Americans, and I will fight tirelessly for these rights in the U.S. Senate. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zc3m1iq5LUHQ0cD0yD8f4apWF38WW-yvQw-cyvOEGTDysPwfSkwx84ZQC-AYsS2nilTdPuXugp2BMVdwuuDE5dCqDIlVPyBAFTZ861kZOXgAFuscAQTecPhVlIuLj6orMbwhmRyuudE3OKAgh-92y01deesfYIKtm6GEKkZpksL6H1Y_WqJoxbNkAZk8m5NJVOXlQS-y6DP7qjodbuUTaO5cPl94-tyhmVmdzBCcd0RFYy8sH7xtt6pQmwvCINq2uBxyb0Zp-NrAOj3ghF0HfJ4) ****Katie Britt Celebrates Coastal Alabama at
GUMBO’s annual Chairman’s Dinner**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zc3m1iq5LUHQ0cD0yD8f4apSWs8ZjWG1W2NiWFnFbwjGZmYiRXkyoO6cpPzbXReeGmv8SFXlVpnvYH_dNQ6sVFHP3zOnYOVdGds2zw1biR0MCkCY9UBx_GFCp60zrjXT-tf8lQejUAN_rN8mchtIneix8g6bb5DPMPE4ReGEBpi8yRYegYWmYF-kL1zI3MyDMD7-GOYbQncv7WUrVvitQ6I15Zpzy1MBM94xiIOspjOg1_jrhVYL-zO6Yb0MvOSCpzT1J1m49lkU5fCI8CnBj-3) We had a great time celebrating Coastal Alabama at GUMBO’s annual Chairman’s Dinner in Baldwin County recently! Proud to support growing good-paying jobs and opportunity in every corner of our state. The Gulf Coast plays a tremendous role in Alabama’s overall economy. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zc3m1iq5LUHQ0cD0yD8f4apSWs8ZjWG1W2NiWFnFbwjGZmYiRXkyoO6cpPzbXReeGlLJdHVkULg4-q6d_RIk-fe8bnHzPp0S8ukJh83-kgJFGCGhI1NVcdgiSoooOG6n8saRXKrLvy0vhje2gRzzyTEMrCsZ0nzhjVNdPhBUHKCABVbEqxUwoYL5wtfblcUTdrSApFWmYBAvByrGyTQltSU5MIh59IoWpDJjC81Ry1iUaBO-dHwzEXJWipBZytfe6lzRtpIHSsNUb8aDGM6oLWW) ****Katie Visits Her Hometown**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=0474864deb9e4a05a7bf8e7316594ac5&_e=qWm_gMDINYlQpBrdWKf-VjA42tQgPlm7RP7JZ4Ya-zc3m1iq5LUHQ0cD0yD8f4apGaoFv8jHLqtfccwkKdTlM-bdnqNfgXt9SiEM-wC1MLCfWVxC66FRiPQr5ZKILL-sCUw2ZnnaKDhs4Pz5oBgpbTTd1C7b9Ka2Tcd0HKZYIklJe_Juvx_60ZRZX89ZB0Xv8wMIoOcrbHk1yFli-INsqFY7ryXptlD9akvbzJCIg6xXxX9g2wUsPeelrORuYhcjbn20XkgmFpxAmt-HfuV9j7GYeSl2J5QWzdXGTv5t4I48hIJG1NyzWKiQFVS2jcG7) What a great time in Geneva County this week in both Samson and Geneva! It’s always good to be home in the Wiregrass. I even got back to Enterprise and saw Ms. Carol, who was my crossing guard in school and is still out there serving our community! Also enjoyed swinging by Village Coffee in Troy, one of my favorite stops on the campaign trail. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Katie Britt On Ruthless Podcast I had the opportunity to discuss our campaign on the (now the most listened to political podcast in the nation) this week! Our interview covered a range of topics, including the battle to preserve the American Dream for our children and our children’s children. You can listen to the full episode here: Katie Britt urges state lawmakers take action against Biden vaccine mandates I urge our lawmakers to pass legislation to protect the freedom of hardworking Alabamians. The State of Alabama should do everything within its power to preserve liberty and jobs across our state. **Britt: Joe Biden’s administration continues on a path of reckless overspending and dictatorial overreaching The Biden Administration’s plan would turn the IRS into Big Brother, giving the federal government the ability to monitor the money going in and out of every American financial account with an annual total of $10,000 or more in transactions. Venmo, CashApp, local bank, community credit union — you name it, your financial account would be in the IRS’ crosshairs if you make or spend an average of $28 a day. Millions of Americans not suspected of cheating on their taxes or any other wrongdoing would have their Fourth Amendment rights thrown out the window by Biden’s proposal, representing an unprecedented invasion of privacy. We need to continue to let our voices be heard loud and clear until this proposal is dead and buried. Protecting individual freedoms and privacy is crucial for all Alabamians and all Americans, and I will fight tirelessly for these rights in the U.S. Senate. Katie Britt Celebrates Coastal Alabama at GUMBO’s annual Chairman’s Dinner We had a great time celebrating Coastal Alabama at GUMBO’s annual Chairman’s Dinner in Baldwin County recently! Proud to support growing good-paying jobs and opportunity in every corner of our state. The Gulf Coast plays a tremendous role in Alabama’s overall economy. Katie Visits Her Hometown What a great time in Geneva County this week in both Samson and Geneva! It’s always good to be home in the Wiregrass. I even got back to Enterprise and saw Ms. Carol, who was my crossing guard in school and is still out there serving our community! Also enjoyed swinging by Village Coffee in Troy, one of my favorite stops on the campaign trail. Want to stay up-to-date with the latest breaking news from ? Just text KATIE to 484848 to start getting text updates from the campaign. Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: **TEXT "KATIE" TO 484848 Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

subject: Here Comes the Red Wave 🌊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=11b42fe25bca44b5b6d77e67f6f6a564&_e=2vva9UWV5N1kyTNNyIir3VlNvmN6Yr4N23hbIeHIkvFBfi0ixCyhSDiqHh8pGlWMPmJU8ND8re4GLjiJm_Tn1GpYVDadhxkWS4J8J2toPQOh1UDkgQCu9N-ll8gTEOSEHCk3d4VtuiSkYpzjOvFXb5JcPGK0hEHkuOosLxpDXYt2SwWGl2mPFmsVfkLqoHGONYA9ehG3OOBO6zZDQQ1L_LtDyu-V5sqqR3i7zpkgj4zNAvtTwJE_zkFfGR5y2dh_BTbdSEI9FJ92hml5w-MypkMUHPFi38zaHSv_6OZICxKnVA_lKlBHHAMEgvPVWk68cCHsnUrGRgIHAw11DFqFJoEqSkHl4F0tO39cHQuKrArzPcrF6xOrAvFe0cBbtwvXSNCIBa0DsVZb32Kmq9zpvaIJ9ZQ46esLvlgxudkN6gY%3D) | |

**Here Comes the Red Wave****🌊**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=11b42fe25bca44b5b6d77e67f6f6a564&_e=2vva9UWV5N1kyTNNyIir3dtof-AJryz3HaM0X5063cjpoBPYcSTyqsJfxxsh6CjB_sk_PiTahJa4wiXWLd5--t6bLZjK8eZmAgVsE729vDIpBVPeHQUDEi_o3juX_A5XYk7uynh1A14eWeAsJWCoIiz8_DvUxYmSsTSjyWlZLYJtI7m_jQjeQuE9RvGbQy0nSu898WkFIpnx3ONo9EloR1DKiOhHvjLptBW8cDJnhwbqs3hD2L1yNqNQtUMxirGi5V06ND3601HwPmqEszkjz7KOQOZ8OAFM747AGTrfT87nEk0jva3Dsav34yQP-BtQT4BrJlIqP7O-XSGFwIcAPA%3D%3D)
It’s coming.... No, I’m not talking about Big Foot. I’m talking about a massive Red Wave that will wipe out the Democrats and their socialist insanity.

The [GOP sweep in Virginia](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=11b42fe25bca44b5b6d77e67f6f6a564&_e=2vva9UWV5N1kyTNNyIir3dtof-AJryz3HaM0X5063cjpoBPYcSTyqsJfxxsh6CjB_sk_PiTahJa4wiXWLd5--t6bLZjK8eZmAgVsE729vDIpBVPeHQUDEi_o3juX_A5Xf5eOCWRJrbVJm384mWYUAvfpAnNuiHjK5MZblxRu_-UF5asFkeGfJz_vNzfAoFho0fkzIAP9bUPTRnB1TzWUOWTKmfnfibrImDUQR_W50d8QWItvfKXUpRG0fOkHT1VntLRHBrdHR0YmZqbM2YwsYl8D9eIVnD_25UJE954Z6E2EmXo3CHM4mAE7IRsuqv7PCfR3OlZIeXgMtvNY4NYv0g%3D%3D) this week is a win for all of us.

Democrat Terry McAuliffe was supposed to be a shoo-in. Virginia was declared a blue state – end of story. But that wasn’t the end of the story because Americans are ticked off. They are ticked off about Critical Race Theory in our schools. They are ticked off by hypocritical politicians and their nonsensical mandates. And they’re ticked off by the out of control spending and sky-rocketing prices.

It’s clear: Americans are ready and willing to protect our values and our way of life.

The amazing thing is Democrats are still doubling down on their elitist policies. They’re accusing Republicans of being [racist](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=11b42fe25bca44b5b6d77e67f6f6a564&_e=2vva9UWV5N1kyTNNyIir3cFdte7qPmDHESzXzf5WoyN9HzI2zBr76VucLi6GkHGvJVFQxMy0AhtTw1107SgVn1Dx3dxzi5nmfDzlLm1W-6tB0RzmcDid7zYG6wX7vgWjtiR8fkI9NmAcCgYlml-ENn64iryZsJFFGAijFapy2lb6cuzhx1KiMOUSdZd5W6tf6mdBZvhC714xhxpMdCO6vpkbKl-DnQuhhijd_NMKqGvzJzs0OmdsdNl62wKFhS5teWHl5RKrKvVQLmVaumr8vwyOA3TGy-EzTJVA8_pTd2ai6SyBu0stdzoeG0RqbhdXy-p44bsFZfcVWw3nXnAAzJn-rqHdnRuZTaPLMHc7iP9g7J4sFn1GHaTi-ZVEE8Vp) for standing up for parental rights in education. But guess what? [Most people](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=11b42fe25bca44b5b6d77e67f6f6a564&_e=2vva9UWV5N1kyTNNyIir3aqR0c91Za-eJIrCOzV_U4q01RXosdivoVlcVypuiA0fupCZFno7DjxvVtqGoQUUOumZLz28gvNZdAQm57747gixUAgjQlItPibZvh7y3s3bs0NsBUWMgyIGQFmiBW4GaYVNNS9aJrikJf09TcMVHOJ9O6xFVogDjqvYe_3cZULyiumWXTEjWGNP2MTYUk6uHaa_6xTy48X4m4ah9qx9hmxStvOxWa1rNXCUxoftIuZnebn1JQWpH9d1mASDEQqP98ICMP-fwdfdS2lFxxoF5gFPx7-q8nltIBuFAeQdMsb0j5hsGGaucPKc9pXJDfpqgdrb-eTVSot2tV8Xw3CeP2E%3D) – no matter which party they belong to – believe parents should have a say in their kids’ education. Most people except for Terry McAuliffe who [said](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=11b42fe25bca44b5b6d77e67f6f6a564&_e=2vva9UWV5N1kyTNNyIir3TSJgInJe59TAruTIAOFNKwp2DasjJVr9cKjpnEyLZsqfyJaaJbX2ltZ0-ZONB4ukr-rDcRUcyn-vm898kORO3FuBYR1rBUhSRvVNISZeBIgvQpnTgQkc55AkMNEV6ZZOehF6n8vFUZ5TIHKmSgNSDh5Z0f_S1U7RJD5mHpF6hdBJKd6ZwwMRXcAf9Vz7_3SOA5nEdesGgPN72x9fFggA3Hs__Hr47y29TX24QwSo34eHFSL-Ff_ij2G4rcTNVWUuvR2Rbyt0KDRpFH2qnPeJmKxD_pGojROJPGngHOnEfiEICbxfJU8BveaVICIryeBI3iAWfiHGzmewNROKmTKV1RcwP7hP8NSRIIpTFwoDN0Lv0Ft4GhpkAPUi3gfOnvzcQ%3D%3D) “parents shouldn’t be telling schools what they should teach.”

**Turns out, parents don’t like being told how to bring up their kids. **

I’ve long been in favor of getting liberal ideology out of our education system. As I’ve said before, we need to [get rid of the Department of Education](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=11b42fe25bca44b5b6d77e67f6f6a564&_e=2vva9UWV5N1kyTNNyIir3VC4tMIPJ0kuoVNymZUdhk4RJfBfRyDItI-_PYEXOW3FYKTS8HTO8mhrVPAF2AEeM8WWAt9fUunC20XzY9ciK7w8rlaH_nMaGvWzdVb1xUzL_Jwb026r1IDhaf1vs-sV-1R3j2-GYralq4YgTyvE-i7uwTHNP7wbV7Mdc9uxFW6XWQq7jWq1JU_Lo0bFCDknlPAvZM1yjKTuX2azH3NX0dRPkmkW-YwlAXO1BLsznQ-KK4uDE5pZg3-KJIvBuTzanKQHKVf43RDFeBRE7lc1rBHqY9by4Qi8dtg02fGc-GzRrjwIxZQDhhbAWXrvkcIlRAoQFcAvIqY6rUOYSzf1MspS_rGpd1AEP7FsoHJClX13mbtjqlEMA3b3j6guhvgaxg%3D%3D) altogether, and stop the elites from indoctrinating our kids.

It’s encouraging to see Americans push back and fight for freedom. Now, we just need to keep the red momentum going all the way up to the 2022 elections.

No, I’m not talking about Big Foot. I’m talking about a massive Red Wave that will wipe out the Democrats and their socialist insanity. The this week is a win for all of us. Democrat Terry McAuliffe was supposed to be a shoo-in. Virginia was declared a blue state – end of story. But that wasn’t the end of the story because Americans are ticked off. They are ticked off about Critical Race Theory in our schools. They are ticked off by hypocritical politicians and their nonsensical mandates. And they’re ticked off by the out of control spending and sky-rocketing prices. It’s clear: Americans are ready and willing to protect our values and our way of life. The amazing thing is Democrats are still doubling down on their elitist policies. They’re accusing Republicans of being for standing up for parental rights in education. But guess what? – no matter which party they belong to – believe parents should have a say in their kids’ education. Most people except for Terry McAuliffe who “parents shouldn’t be telling schools what they should teach.” Turns out, parents don’t like being told how to bring up their kids. I’ve long been in favor of getting liberal ideology out of our education system. As I’ve said before, we need to altogether, and stop the elites from indoctrinating our kids. It’s encouraging to see Americans push back and fight for freedom. Now, we just need to keep the red momentum going all the way up to the 2022 elections. | Blount County Represents 🎤 It’s always great to hang out with fellow conservatives in East Tennessee. Nancy Pelosi’s reach is growing by the minute in Washington. She has too much power, and she won’t stop seeking new ways to get more. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=02ab49ed3d07422aafa887d87b21792b&_e=zPvSomLxFCkSziUM_0zST9Pfl72HMGU7h6_hOCB2y5WLG1rAooMRo6uy1g-IHbnoGeI3aN6TaI6mzK1QACcLhjSr9ZxiUhcfqmmDXXvbGYF-SJwqD3hwG1asIVjTXF59fBeFGjom1Yv2BsnDLCEctuxmTcI8_wikQ50neQMz7ywkwzVJ4g2psVibhUQvx-d7ZZwXElTNo0gttMIKNEqJlaBYwqnidgiOE42AkhrvV2lbqrDczuYd65EM3Vmpb6cMK7yXSuCrrNgA-WPOdRxxKWOx8Y7__G9o7oE40LuewMHP2Ez7YXnSey8EAQ6EmfI7_G8_fP0mgUJrorXZbLxJDX7XRHqWL5lv7z5W6yPVVZMWLG4bTGVhcFxZcCbFEZRxM_iWrrHtpE8di86mpvdyyNI6nYVxKVFFUoeMMAHto0A8n-RnckhHvZWPBTXogDcB) Friend,

Can you join Nancy Mace in her efforts to stop Nancy Pelosi? [**STOP NANCY PELOSI**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=02ab49ed3d07422aafa887d87b21792b&_e=zPvSomLxFCkSziUM_0zST9Pfl72HMGU7h6_hOCB2y5WLG1rAooMRo6uy1g-IHbnoGeI3aN6TaI6mzK1QACcLhjSr9ZxiUhcfqmmDXXvbGYF-SJwqD3hwG1asIVjTXF59fBeFGjom1Yv2BsnDLCEctuxmTcI8_wikQ50neQMz7ywkwzVJ4g2psVibhUQvx-d7ZZwXElTNo0gttMIKNEqJlRHZIWxHZW85l1DR_ZWVezH1t7pa8FV_jPyn0R3cdhjx0VwzP-ilFMqMj6q9WdqqikE6i0oNjLO4wqUm2t6VY5PP8bnsxN9wt9zcJ04twiEMzJwoFZ1BwvG9H1JSK_vgmWCVrIxiOErVhkQehXrjRG0OXHov54FdggzHT-Kh8elkg0IM_z-n98nec69u2I8VmzoCjTBvp6bXgkhrJq6Rjrwqd5ZYxFNQJNF1rfn3iAtC) Americans everywhere are sick and tired of business as usual from the Left, putting big government over working people and demonizing hard working parents. Nancy Mace promised you she would shake up Washington. But with Nancy Pelosi’s grip on Congress, it’s hard to get ANYTHING done. That’s why Nancy Mace is committed to taking back the House next November and **she needs your help!** We only need to flip FIVE seats to do it. Will you add your name to stop Nancy PELOSI’s power grab and help Nancy MACE take back the House? [**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=02ab49ed3d07422aafa887d87b21792b&_e=zPvSomLxFCkSziUM_0zST9Pfl72HMGU7h6_hOCB2y5WLG1rAooMRo6uy1g-IHbnoGeI3aN6TaI6mzK1QACcLhjSr9ZxiUhcfqmmDXXvbGYF-SJwqD3hwG1asIVjTXF59fBeFGjom1Yv2BsnDLCEctuxmTcI8_wikQ50neQMz7ywkwzVJ4g2psVibhUQvx-d7ZZwXElTNo0gttMIKNEqJlSI8iMFbxa_VelTaOuNJWrjdih54_bYowqmB_8UkMaTPU_YHrFqE1HKcRfzx4jX-luyXEJaRRcX5JBA8fxr79j4uRuAjRwHj6pab-oN2kd_mzBn2taA8cP2YOzEmDFe0IejcL_KQUHtdhEo4D9lssxwxkH_wj8--poRyOJfs-UNRR4WQleqEaGD59-z7uICKKrE3Wqmmv03sDq4spmekGm0bp-PTtAuZrlWNMtTwePaU) Thanks, Team Mace |

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, It was a busy week on the campaign trail with Election Day support, a new ad in our Fall media blitz, and events across the state as Jane continues to share why she is the America First, grassroots candidate. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **"Patriots" ** As a mom and the only female candidate in this race, Jane knows there is nothing more important than the well-being of Ohio’s children and the importance of family and parents' voices. Because of this, Jane was the first U.S. Senate candidate in Ohio to fight back against the Leftist overreach and indoctrination in our schools, and continues to put education at the forefront of her Senate campaign. This week, we released the second ad in our Fall media blitz, titled “Patriots." [WATCH HERE](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9b65283216ab4147a2051ebee676fd3a&_e=tkMqUZ5JAlfH5XqyskYCJNHKx7kqHaF23TU7rnYMyQqgDtsL9pstvcG6zCkwUwLfegTP5UerrBNTewXzqSMdTTs5MvtcqMXYM4adBhBbsvBQ17GjpPokMJM7CFOEVAihMF0Xj5D9RTnv97ZQI_B-aEmen-klcgTnr49KADOxEorcfS3qqWNkq6x8LXbTw4p5fUNZGdkLtb4NWmvoxyV-LV1rR00tFiKgujMZMfvqRDbHwZPmpGH58qbwZbFHK3j0RH6gMwdC30c0sPnEvGMxiLg5mQyKeMkBndgRFTUX6lw%3D) [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9b65283216ab4147a2051ebee676fd3a&_e=tkMqUZ5JAlfH5XqyskYCJNHKx7kqHaF23TU7rnYMyQqgDtsL9pstvcG6zCkwUwLfegTP5UerrBNTewXzqSMdTbeaDpKwt6S0QMziWR2olfeStNUZjQgEcc13hSz3yEc6T_uOruxa4y1LrEvJxVEAivX2gdS2ATmTNDXhOMZ_QdNe5fhwyGQOOe8544RUbGYalQ0TefWMEH3mljBBAn0xGeFX6DeYH1YT0_zHFYqUKVsZmy2ArGCSWzXZvWMaNpZjylEVku3mztrCP_nrlJnImW35Ad_BueygW4-We1aaqW8%3D) This ad is part of our campaign’s aggressive six-figure statewide cable advertising blitz on Fox News Channel that will run into December. You can read more about this effort on Fox [HERE](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9b65283216ab4147a2051ebee676fd3a&_e=tkMqUZ5JAlfH5XqyskYCJKNBkxiTcKH6BrLP9KQmcXiQ-S-ZD1KlpHhHGM3yORvfTzwY71kgkBOlhLnuo7rSL-OlR8yfyie9NSnWlaQb3KWDcODWn4e-naYR6aw43V2Zt2AXKj1X408haocya6RyRG1Sy6eNBjWGtBDrD61AmtQ8fJ6cW3tqAodkkv3ECFqhQ3fkKz-q3dfa4NK-FwMaj0at6jkpwLm2Ox1dr0WBrggdSlpDpI-oRNaR3NJHLVglSYDcxUVBWaAKgGsZs7zYGkQd4HRVWpHjTKDnuCYayeXZeK9YCyAUEbMAt9REokieDjm2wPBoce9aOI0t0dN9i4ZWoES1ANs-qaB0RCXLTbc%3D). [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9b65283216ab4147a2051ebee676fd3a&_e=tkMqUZ5JAlfH5XqyskYCJKNBkxiTcKH6BrLP9KQmcXiQ-S-ZD1KlpHhHGM3yORvfTzwY71kgkBOlhLnuo7rSL-OlR8yfyie9NSnWlaQb3KWDcODWn4e-naYR6aw43V2Zt2AXKj1X408haocya6RyRKnZBkTIVQ3afqkaEtneHcp0E_7bwa9LhpxF6iTE_ef-cHUTN6LDwXSZ8vqYdX72vuJqHQ7tMzb1WxlWM38GUIj44CsLL9Dplsu26DM_cpT5lx8BbrSN9sLPKG-ENYImxH7ZjtYqEa6B-vraAZN97kD8kCo3CNpAvrH6n3xFoU-YJ9-TNFhO7lyWh_CsXx_yLShjHbhCuuhiWi39efCVgd8%3D) In addition, if you'd like a more in-depth look at Jane's focus on education and how she has been a leader on this in Ohio and throughout the country, I'm happy to share a new campaign memo [HERE](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9b65283216ab4147a2051ebee676fd3a&_e=tkMqUZ5JAlfH5XqyskYCJCkoc8e1TB0bEgcZDvEDsGfN8Qw5p5o3T9vRQxN5gvSMOGBLWFoB6MHScLnAXjT9E_NSgsdEkLvrRRhn-x3sI6AqVzxsgXp2-rZHtKFsGo2WD4YB_ou4EC7zfnKG2GIzd98uqt0o1XRP4xzSh3SUTJDv0-GQRhLWKvVm1MtZ3ETwZR_ym2D9lZLyEfOPVZax94cpV-Q0pjqV1bkW4wZWyx_qaT7zTp_w-5iUIzm9ZkJznLsmwug7FA1qN5wJq4m1ifuSBtCYcKl4khJXob31fkjqHm7KxJUtuenXCXSLECIJwXeiyl3zckjlWYzJepFSAcp6HR1hgQkLkLAVRRvE6BeOn1v6AFX6Gxo8luKpVoXB). **Once a Chairman, Always a Chairman** As Party Chair, Jane made it a goal to build Ohio's down-ballot bench of conservatives by supporting candidates up and down the ticket, including school board races. With that same goal in mind, coupled by Jane's focus on combating Critical Race Theory and unnecessary mandates in schools, Jane was proud to support over 40 school board candidates across Ohio. In addition to individual donations, Jane held a strategy call in the lead up to Election Day on suggestions for final GOTV efforts, lended our top-notch field team to candidates across the state to knock doors and make phone calls, and launched Election Day robocalls and texts to support these candidates. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9b65283216ab4147a2051ebee676fd3a&_e=tkMqUZ5JAlfH5XqyskYCJEA7vBqmSlL73Yvq2kPU_gHcO1WrkCKkX1IOfPXiLu-Et3-a_8yGFPmM4apSex7J2DRFpwvc4_rzyMi6khPOiqJFoTqDJnS0O2zI5FAo8kfEypPH607cEpfI-O9Li-Of9HvfYjmwLIsZTx4qki6gn4sz2Ag2DCE5ttOHB7RAtklo3iPvSQ0n82SUwE7ydbxNDPMDeDCNc2HF8Q1cKvAuow76VetJlI66Su5zVb9pFRQDF4rqf6c7yBpYb828iCCMY97eISDvgEnRmDDmZOULE49rS_6fSRyoP_NVGzeCJHRTB37CLkXMrQ0zfU-fnd5fhBSaLhXBDskXd1ZOEN9jWiyUfP88dvCv4nIhlOa1PLaaP2NcyWpiUvYwE2N8fL2oQiPS88y7cWRdr6BzK2JM6-IZBVW6v3Mg3nHvkIlh5bOaIKr8FWy339Cc2iIkNz2N2w%3D%3D) Nearly two dozen of these school board candidates were victorious on Election Day, a huge win for Ohio's children and a key part of taking back our classrooms. And to all those who threw their hat in the ring to raise awareness to these important issues, we commend you. We need more good candidates running for office! You can read more about Jane's efforts to boost these school board candidates [HERE](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9b65283216ab4147a2051ebee676fd3a&_e=tkMqUZ5JAlfH5XqyskYCJEA7vBqmSlL73Yvq2kPU_gHcO1WrkCKkX1IOfPXiLu-Et3-a_8yGFPmM4apSex7J2DRFpwvc4_rzyMi6khPOiqJFoTqDJnS0O2zI5FAo8kfEypPH607cEpfI-O9Li-Of9HvfYjmwLIsZTx4qki6gn4sz2Ag2DCE5ttOHB7RAtklo3iPvSQ0n82SUwE7ydbxNDPMDeDCNc2HF8Q1cKvAuow76VetJlI66Su5zVb9pFRQDguNqf3Bj2egmYvajZ_1NVPT2vRqi95m_QQft55skp2aaMTX__ha010U_-HVosp7ttgQ_bfJKzpfhfdPrQS-9KorLV1kMYn-QWBycQ7gP0MBN2xh7WE0Vvbbgxlin7JrXKKAloBYwliGcGtCQPfRHWV1mNLQ_RHkfR0-gR79pOsbyzkPRWaOM9kTL2cKcJY3tzd8XdtAp_Z44gyNTofoQpA%3D%3D). **From the Trail ** Last Friday evening, Jane was glad to join the women of the Ohio Federation of Republican Women for their annual meeting and conference in Aurora. Electing more strong, conservative women is a passion for Jane, and she was happy to talk to a group helping to make a difference! Jane spent the day in Toledo on Monday meeting with supporters and talking to folks about their concerns with the direction of the country. She had time to have some fun by stopping by for an in-studio interview with WSPD's Scott Sands. They talked about Jane's focus on education issues, the invasion at our Southern border - and a lot about favorite Halloween candy! Fun fact: Jane is a Kit-Kat and Swedish Fish fan. On Wednesday, Jane joined the Marion County Republican Women's Club to talk more about her campaign and her focus on workforce development, better schools, and getting our economy back on track. **A Resounding Rejection of Biden** Tuesday's election results in Virginia, New Jersey, and in school board races in Ohio and across the country were a resounding rejection of Joe Biden's dismal policies that have sent our country in a downward spiral. Republicans turned out everywhere to make their voices heard. Turns out, parents don't like being told they are "domestic terrorists" for wanting their kids to have a good, patriotic education free of indoctrination! But more than that, Tuesday's results point to a Red Wave that is coming in 2022. Jane talked more about this throughout the week and how her "America First, Parents First" message is key to victory in Ohio: [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9b65283216ab4147a2051ebee676fd3a&_e=tkMqUZ5JAlfH5XqyskYCJJ78cOApi5GsaulTMSzEKn0SO0bbBS8r03SvJwssOKjPBzBbe6YPleFt8SOPJowH_F4hxvHVYibnlbMUwlOJSgnSW1OfaaEWacODiLp2EGMmqLCC7sjz6DxndVSiqpUBSMUlISRm2nKQ7zxH1nroKjY60G6GhsBO0MoQnKywJz-Ivcb_FeYseX495e0VwBST6Zf2MhXoQE7ujUi5va9pt90E9VCVd3supI1BL-PRgOqseifpLcfjyvYq-Pa-opEAOngkWd98qi59YjLYIeyLa3Cb4ON49L8Jc45ga45KB_Wz1YFiV_Ze7Yr-uqzRHmyKtLPSSOexKhsPoEpj4OdP3epcykUqH-nlAcvc65Bfuobc) [**WATCH Jane on The National Desk**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=9b65283216ab4147a2051ebee676fd3a&_e=tkMqUZ5JAlfH5XqyskYCJJ78cOApi5GsaulTMSzEKn0SO0bbBS8r03SvJwssOKjPBzBbe6YPleFt8SOPJowH_F4hxvHVYibnlbMUwlOJSgnSW1OfaaEWacODiLp2EGMmqLCC7sjz6DxndVSiqpUBSMUlISRm2nKQ7zxH1nroKjYCt0_AcqUaTye4bFMGrzuzfPPERvDrPFGb1n8NR-7Fm7MOtdxoJ8PO0lRLyeeJTImrXWCfpNueZhrY6lHhvd7nOZJ4-rn6LDsR2VMXD4oyXwfxxdiFNfFaxO9KV6zsf8c9ahIjMzt9ibrAYuqXHe9xKen0CSlq0oKxG7tnpsJ-_wEiWo13lwjDbDl1H-8ZOey5aLg_ceomByCUoZ6K5vmO) **“This is a real push back on the progressive left agenda,” said Timken. “It's a rejection of the indoctrination of our children...“They want their children to be educated for the jobs of the future. clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, It was a busy week on the campaign trail with Election Day support, a new ad in our Fall media blitz, and events across the state as Jane continues to share why she is the America First, grassroots candidate. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. "Patriots" As a mom and the only female candidate in this race, Jane knows there is nothing more important than the well-being of Ohio’s children and the importance of family and parents' voices. Because of this, Jane was the first U.S. Senate candidate in Ohio to fight back against the Leftist overreach and indoctrination in our schools, and continues to put education at the forefront of her Senate campaign. This week, we released the second ad in our Fall media blitz, titled “Patriots." This ad is part of our campaign’s aggressive six-figure statewide cable advertising blitz on Fox News Channel that will run into December. You can read more about this effort on Fox . In addition, if you'd like a more in-depth look at Jane's focus on education and how she has been a leader on this in Ohio and throughout the country, I'm happy to share a new campaign memo . Once a Chairman, Always a Chairman As Party Chair, Jane made it a goal to build Ohio's down-ballot bench of conservatives by supporting candidates up and down the ticket, including school board races. With that same goal in mind, coupled by Jane's focus on combating Critical Race Theory and unnecessary mandates in schools, Jane was proud to support over 40 school board candidates across Ohio. In addition to individual donations, Jane held a strategy call in the lead up to Election Day on suggestions for final GOTV efforts, lended our top-notch field team to candidates across the state to knock doors and make phone calls, and launched Election Day robocalls and texts to support these candidates. Nearly two dozen of these school board candidates were victorious on Election Day, a huge win for Ohio's children and a key part of taking back our classrooms. And to all those who threw their hat in the ring to raise awareness to these important issues, we commend you. We need more good candidates running for office! You can read more about Jane's efforts to boost these school board candidates . From the Trail Last Friday evening, Jane was glad to join the women of the Ohio Federation of Republican Women for their annual meeting and conference in Aurora. Electing more strong, conservative women is a passion for Jane, and she was happy to talk to a group helping to make a difference! Jane spent the day in Toledo on Monday meeting with supporters and talking to folks about their concerns with the direction of the country. She had time to have some fun by stopping by for an in-studio interview with WSPD's Scott Sands. They talked about Jane's focus on education issues, the invasion at our Southern border - and a lot about favorite Halloween candy! Fun fact: Jane is a Kit-Kat and Swedish Fish fan. On Wednesday, Jane joined the Marion County Republican Women's Club to talk more about her campaign and her focus on workforce development, better schools, and getting our economy back on track. A Resounding Rejection of Biden Tuesday's election results in Virginia, New Jersey, and in school board races in Ohio and across the country were a resounding rejection of Joe Biden's dismal policies that have sent our country in a downward spiral. Republicans turned out everywhere to make their voices heard. Turns out, parents don't like being told they are "domestic terrorists" for wanting their kids to have a good, patriotic education free of indoctrination! But more than that, Tuesday's results point to a Red Wave that is coming in 2022. Jane talked more about this throughout the week and how her "America First, Parents First" message is key to victory in Ohio: “This is a real push back on the progressive left agenda,” said Timken. “It's a rejection of the indoctrination of our children...“They want their children to be educated for the jobs of the future. They want children to get back to the fundamentals of their education, reading, writing, and arithmetic.” "She told Spectrum News that she has no second guesses about embracing the former president." “That America First agenda where we had energy independence, a strong border, strong foreign policy, record low unemployment, these are all the accomplishments of President Trump under his leadership,” Timken said. “And these are the policies that quite clearly the American people want back.” Jane's record of fighting for these America First policies, combined with her focus on the issues that matter to families across Ohio, will help Jane be part of that Red Wave in 2022 so Ohio does our part in taking back our country once again. I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | | ---|---

body:
Democrats got wiped away on Election Day. We need to keep the momentum going and save our country. Help us retake the Senate.
---
Peter,

**We are seeing the beginning of a red wave.**

[**KEEP THE MOMENTUM >>> TAKE BACK THE SENATE**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dadbb1895e904619a439deb0cd1c8d76&_e=SezjjerCzMgjtYMX74afGPFqW93MM1pkhd9E2Ujm2Cr9uawdEHWVDQNbVOtchdrQwj1REgHwEVQJCQRwreSU36L322ZM2-A4R1j5zEr3uHJM1T57892ai_0X2MqP4sgl7DDsnXgumiGWANtrm7miAsQDL7liKGfJxo3TI7UIv3PeClGXRYOOLePAa-AzrSgdH_qT5PT_D180Ya19cxF00_x6iYb2RG3shaMg5Ossl46fWi2vs6-MaOxFFF8_GUhgRsQIZcqM4xSyfCYLf91EgRZiukzoNJ05xBebPvb1z1cUw87U1hkp0w9aafx3KPEm6uqaSacUMWls3Ca99Tvc_HVepEQ6f_HHZdghrJJw08BfvfdUUoKtE8Vl0U9CiW86JX-2PIJmKWAWl--BKSiB1K8QS_WCf3DsnLPIUMNdxSIe3uY4zv-g7RL15AVHyDMxaPmHm6-egRtyoIr6GvjgOviEYRE4TPOtOuOdcnSrpac%3D)
Americans are tired of failed liberal policies, and even in blue Virginia, Republicans took back the governorship and the State House.

Peter, we need to keep this momentum going. Even now, many of the races that previously leaned Democratic, are now toss-ups.

clean_body: Democrats got wiped away on Election Day. We need to keep the momentum going and save our country. Help us retake the Senate. Peter, We are seeing the beginning of a red wave. Americans are tired of failed liberal policies, and even in blue Virginia, Republicans took back the governorship and the State House. Peter, we need to keep this momentum going. Even now, many of the races that previously leaned Democratic, are now toss-ups. Americans are ready for change, Peter. They’re ready to bring back real conservative leadership to our country. But we need your help to make it happen. We need to take back critical Senate seats, . Peter, the truth is that this loss is going to motivate the Democrats. They are going to come out and vote in droves, and they are going to spend BILLIONS to make sure that their radical-left candidates win.
